name: Team Gillibrand Official Polling
subject: dpwillis67@gmail.com: do you support the Supreme Court?

body:
The Supreme Court is out-of-step with public opinion
| | |
---
| | **Friend: You're one of 1,000 Democrats from your area who have been chosen to participate in our Supreme Court Approval Poll.**
---
The conservative majority on the Supreme Court has caused immense damage to our country — including overturning Roe v. Wade, weakening the Environmental Protection Agency’s power to fight pollution and ending affirmative action in higher education.
---
As the Court makes decisions that are totally out-of-step with public opinion, Americans are turning on them. That's why we're conducting a live approval poll to find out what Americans _really_ think of the Supreme Court.
---
We're still missing 421 responses from your state — including yours — so we need to hear from you by midnight to ensure we have accurate data. Please, take a second to speak out against the Supreme Court by locking in your response:
---
**Do you approve of the Supreme Court?**
---

Listen, reproductive rights are under attack nationwide.
States like Florida are passing extreme abortion bans, leaving millions of Americans hundreds of miles away from the nearest abortion providers. And now, they're passing even more laws to strip away reproductive rights, criminalize doctors, and push their extreme agenda.
But that's just the beginning.
Almost all of the GOP candidates running for president support passing a national abortion ban and appointing even more anti-choice extremists to the Supreme Court. **Meanwhile, GOP senators like Rick Scott are likely to retake control of the Senate, giving them free rein to pass a far-right national ban!**
**With the 2024 elections heating up, we need to know where Americans stand — and you have been chosen to represent 34223 in our live survey. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight tell us what you believe:**
**Do you support abortion rights?**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Santos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| George Santos’ dirty tactics and lies were an extreme case, but all too emblematic of a morally bankrupt MAGA movement.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4651%2E5257348%2EFQu1Y-)
Derek, I just voted to expel George Santos from the House of Representatives.
And in a decisive 311-114 vote, he was finally removed from office.
Expulsion is a rare event in the House, and for good reason. Someone elected by their constituents should not be easily or lightly removed, even by the necessary two-thirds vote in the House. But in the case of George Santos, expulsion was exactly the right remedy.
After stealing hundreds of thousands of dollars from his campaign and donors, a 23-count indictment, a House Ethics Committee investigation, and two former campaign aides pleading guilty to fraud, _he needed to go._
**And the dirty tactics that George Santos used to get elected could soon be on display in our Senate race — where Santos’ former campaign treasurer has created a dark money Super PAC called, get this: STOP ADAM PAC.**
**[Our election is less than 100 days away, and early voting starts even sooner. Derek, rush a donation of $3 or more to our campaign to help us build a grassroots campaign to not only win this Senate race, but also win the critical battleground congressional races across California that will decide the next House majority.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4651%2E5257348%2EFQu1Y-)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=4651%2E5257348%2EFQu1Y-)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=6&akid=4651%2E5257348%2EFQu1Y-)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=7&akid=4651%2E5257348%2EFQu1Y-)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=8&akid=4651%2E5257348%2EFQu1Y-)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=9&akid=4651%2E5257348%2EFQu1Y-)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4651%2E5257348%2EFQu1Y-)
---
George Santos’ dirty tactics and lies were an extreme case, but all too emblematic of a morally bankrupt MAGA movement.
They bully, intimidate, and punish politically anyone who dares go against them. They’ve targeted me repeatedly — including for expulsion and censure — and will do so again.
While Santos was expelled, that doesn’t lessen our need to defeat the MAGA grip on today’s Republican party and finally get work done for the American people.
**Our bipartisan expulsion of George Santos was a step forward for our democracy. But there are other MAGA Republicans who are more skilled and no less brazen in their lies.**
**[So if you can afford it, chip in any amount to our Senate campaign today. I’m proud to have cast my vote on the right side of history — and our work to win this election has become even more urgent.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=4651%2E5257348%2EFQu1Y-)**
Thank you,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231201_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=12&akid=4651%2E5257348%2EFQu1Y-)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Binkley?=
subject: Ryan's Momentum Grows
body:
| |
---
| | |
# Campaign News and Views
---
|
---
### More Progress in the Ballots
This week, Ryan completed the paperwork for several more ballots across the country. He continues to meet with people in Iowa and New Hampshire and even gained an unexpected tout from the Trump Campaign.
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=69a279ee87&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Binkley Talks Budget
Ryan joins with political analyst Jake Novak in discussing the federal government's runaway spending. They offer different solutions to the problem and debate the issues involved. [_Read here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=e0b6d94340&e=c1403f41d3)
---
| |
---
### Trump Speaks The Truth
On November 27th, the Trump Campaign released a statement clarifying Ryan was the first candidate to visit all 99 counties.
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=f59eea38ed&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### The Next Generation
In an emotional video, Ryan talks about how we aren't preparing the next generation to contribute to society. He discusses the importance of trades and work tracks, which can provide young people with valuable skills if they don't want to or cannot go to college. _[Watch here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=c183e0a20f&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
|
####
**Coming Up**

---
| |
---
### Events with the YR
Ryan will appear at two upcoming Young Republican events. First, he will speak at the after-party for the Tennessee YR Governor Winfield Dunn Dinner on December 1st. _[RSVP here.](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=543d25cfd2&e=c1403f41d3)_ Then he'll travel to DC to speak at the YR First Christmas Party of the Season, on December 2nd. _[RSVP here.](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=e0baab1a0d&e=c1403f41d3)_
---
| | [ ](http://)
---
### Greene Meet and Greet
Ryan will host a meet and greet at Dutch Oven Bakery, where he'll talk with the people of Iowa about how to restore our economy. The event starts at 3:30 pm on December 6th, at 605 Story St, Boone, IA.
---
| | [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=6ef247b942&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Iowa State
Townhall Forum
Ryan will converse with students at an Iowa State forum on December 6th at 6:00 pm. The event will be held at 2623 Memorial Union.
[_Details here_](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=9e2e9f7a52&e=c1403f41d3)
---
|
####
**How Can I Help?**
---
| [ ](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=504c9ba33e&e=c1403f41d3)
---
### Campaign Zoom Update
You're invited to a campaign update with Ryan and the campaign team on Monday, December 4 at 8pm CT / 9pm ET on Zoom. The presidential primaries begin in January. Learn how you can be involved and help us make history in 2024!
| [Register](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=a4ae1cd83f&e=c1403f41d3 "Register")
---
| • _**LIKE AND COMMENT**_ on all social media posts • A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way!
• Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow
• Lastly, _**DONATE & SHARE**_ the link with everyone you know!
---
|
---
| [Contribute Today!](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=b886504f54&e=c1403f41d3 "Contribute Today!")
---
|
---
|
---
| _Coming up: Click[here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=08ceb8e005&e=c1403f41d3) to stay up to date with events._

He continues to meet with people in Iowa and New Hampshire and even gained an unexpected tout from the Trump Campaign. | | Binkley Talks Budget Ryan joins with political analyst Jake Novak in discussing the federal government's runaway spending. They offer different solutions to the problem and debate the issues involved. | | Trump Speaks The Truth On November 27th, the Trump Campaign released a statement clarifying Ryan was the first candidate to visit all 99 counties. | | The Next Generation In an emotional video, Ryan talks about how we aren't preparing the next generation to contribute to society. He discusses the importance of trades and work tracks, which can provide young people with valuable skills if they don't want to or cannot go to college. | Coming Up | | Events with the YR Ryan will appear at two upcoming Young Republican events. First, he will speak at the after-party for the Tennessee YR Governor Winfield Dunn Dinner on December 1st. Then he'll travel to DC to speak at the YR First Christmas Party of the Season, on December 2nd. | | http:// Greene Meet and Greet Ryan will host a meet and greet at Dutch Oven Bakery, where he'll talk with the people of Iowa about how to restore our economy. The event starts at 3:30 pm on December 6th, at 605 Story St, Boone, IA. | | Iowa State Townhall Forum Ryan will converse with students at an Iowa State forum on December 6th at 6:00 pm. The event will be held at 2623 Memorial Union. | How Can I Help? | Campaign Zoom Update You're invited to a campaign update with Ryan and the campaign team on Monday, December 4 at 8pm CT / 9pm ET on Zoom. The presidential primaries begin in January. Learn how you can be involved and help us make history in 2024! | "Register" | • LIKE AND COMMENT on all social media posts • A simple "I support Ryan Binkley for President" goes a long way! • Ignore any argumentative comments that may follow • Lastly, DONATE & SHARE the link with everyone you know! | | "Contribute Today!" | | | Coming up: Click to stay up to date with events. | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Binkley for President 2024, All rights reserved.

name: John Padora
subject: December can be tough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
First of all, I wanted to thank each and every one of you for supporting my campaign this past month. Now that we’re less than a year from election day, I can promise you time is going to move even quicker than before.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=00879f9f573b4ce597ab3b8197ab1104&_e=lrHQRIgialS_JPCniQUFY2tAinjx-GDavD7ZWe57K4MJhwKyGR90qYQwGuukRDldsMzb4vL8mnvJ2dPSq1T6gSuZfaJonsb9hXU0vtmbI1hMbYcFBPtMQD2feCSpX5He_VgXsxuFnhdAtzkzLJ7BO1bVcFHwwXZNDpixbopDivY0QumMG1yhNrfdgIw9I3fQjGdtQl9fsZ2ZlskPD8JPLgi46Z0XN1-Ki2XdIpmgPQyGkCCr_H9V7chHA0lXPh5UIYy2Ss8CWFt69Z6_dhdhfbICkaS3YkvEVdhKiAWtuybilzU3M2MlEgLC6-bw1CNE6YXl1uDGOaESOq_Cf6fc-ZI833k88y98R6Uzn0yzW-LcitH8uj9-opL3BRRXixcNg_Hg-O2gR9aZzH7sbg7RTQ%3D%3D) Folks, First of all, I wanted to thank each and every one of you for supporting my campaign this past month. Now that we’re less than a year from election day, I can promise you time is going to move even quicker than before. **We stand at an important moment for our campaign.** Ken Buck has officially announced he will be retiring after this term, and multiple extremist candidates have jumped into the GOP primary to replace him. We need every advantage we can get over that radical field. But I also know that this month is a tough time for fundraising. With the holidays, a lot of folks prioritize their spending away from political campaigns. So we need to do everything we can to hit our goals before that holiday lull kicks in. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

Fellow American - I have a lot of competing priorities that come across my desk each and every day.

**But at the forefront of my responsibilities, I am a public servant.**

I work for you, _I serve your interests,_ not the interests of the establishment, lobbyists, or anyone else.

**_I work for the American people._**

This is why it is _**so important**_ that I am constantly hearing from you about what your top priorities are.

Today, I’m looking for your opinion – [**would you take a moment to launch my _**Official Team Johnson Speaker’s Survey?**_**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6282293ac4284190bdff2d7258ccfc3d&_e=BuNITCFOKmm33MmnLvx_82nJVouLW_CYKWk7KgIkIaKUQ7T7-xK4TAE-cKmYqgPYEscWu35Psq4oHiIXIyWDtrxKqs8zrFwEyzPz1q0MOLmW0laEIgZpvuTIzwshewELw_wZMfKwD0Vd2t9Pd9srn7l1oEZi3KKQsKJ2RU19hL44867SqeFQY0vSr_4wAaTgPc9K-HKjYeRX7Qbo0XK8Pi1hF3WLFMwTMIE2Tjp0XAMQDbt6VEqdTIMrKqfYbgWacvdtsGpMEfPth3xaqTNU6naV_gpEwmFbSIOth3cAih8iQVA_U1Z33aoFSKXa-sy864fskKbfz6BAgqxwvMQ1n1Akd87xeHMe9flOgI2LHTNl7ON8z6lsZj0ZofPraIrCBkNVHn6Zll-psAw-thS8QZmE0-BwwEtG5UKRuKmJOCAsgiXeo0iN_UMZd8HyQu8C5skQn4zLpf1f57zFu9mrwQ%3D%3D)

Your input is absolutely critical to ensuring that I move the ball forward for America.

Together, I know we will advance a comprehensive conservative policy agenda, combat the harmful policies of the Biden administration, and support our allies abroad – and we will restore sanity to a government desperately in need of it.

[**Please, let me hear from you today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6282293ac4284190bdff2d7258ccfc3d&_e=BuNITCFOKmm33MmnLvx_82nJVouLW_CYKWk7KgIkIaKUQ7T7-xK4TAE-cKmYqgPYEscWu35Psq4oHiIXIyWDtrxKqs8zrFwEyzPz1q0MOLmW0laEIgZpvuTIzwshewELw_wZMfKwD0Vd2t9Pd9srn7l1oEZi3KKQsKJ2RU19hL44867SqeFQY0vSr_4wAaTgPc9K-HKjYeRX7Qbo0XK8Pi1hF3WLFMwTMIE2Tjp0XAMQDbt6VEqdTIMrKqfYbgWacvdtsGpMEfPth3xaqTNU6naV_gpEwmFbSIOth3cAih-Mv02RdJJsGtkQ5Nv8GQSieB0eCMF3EisYkiQ0BqjdOit1NR0iJ4hozIzpKDJQ5qbPm05uZlHDPcBHbBQITRG_VW8Tm0kNksCWL98NqaUvv57gSKV314pWw__hb1F5dcUiwm0EnA64MXVYv4ENchreMA7-XSq2YW5NkM0Auig4Lg%3D%3D)

body:
Begin the Christmas Season with Mike Cargile | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=656a8a2300b50e66b3931a9b&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cargileforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65556984b71fc30a9f88ea0d%26ss_email_id%3D656a8a2300b50e66b3931a9b%26ss_campaign_name%3DChristmas%2Bwith%2BCargile%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-12-02T01%253A36%253A49Z&w=5e0a32326458545293c3f231&c=b_65556984b71fc30a9f88ea0d&l=en-US&s=ho3hS4sZP2epNKbPsCyy3Cjt8g4%3D) Merry Christmas from the Cargiles!
---
| |
---
JUST A REMINDER, while many of you have signed up, there is _still room in the Sycamore Inn_ for our celebration so please reserve your spots now. Our final headcount must be in by Dec 6th. Nan and I would love to see you all as we enjoy **great food** and **great fellowship** (in an **AMAZING setting**) as we **sing Christmas carols** and **seek God’s guidance** for our nation and our campaign. May God bless you and yours in the days ahead and may He continue to bless America! [Mike Cargile](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=656a8a2300b50e66b3931a9b&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cargileforcongress.com%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65556984b71fc30a9f88ea0d%26ss_email_id%3D656a8a2300b50e66b3931a9b%26ss_campaign_name%3DChristmas%2Bwith%2BCargile%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-12-02T01%253A36%253A49Z&w=5e0a32326458545293c3f231&c=b_65556984b71fc30a9f88ea0d&l=en-US&s=_X7TXTqf4DJWhUPo818pI9IHU1M%3D), “The Family Man”

subject: 31 days of $34 - Become a Change-Maker!
body:
For the month of December, we're launching the "31 days of $34" campaign! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/31-days-of-34-become-a-change-maker?e=fee98d637f)
---
| |
---
| |

| Dear Friend,

As we enter into the last month of the year and sprint toward our Q4 fundraising deadline, I'm excited to announce a special initiative that will shape the future we know is possible..

For the month of December, we're launching the "31 days of $34" campaign! A sustaining fundraising campaign that seeks your vital support. We’re looking for 10 new supporters EACH DAY who will commit to a monthly donation of just $34.

Why $34? This amount symbolizes more than a contribution for CA-34; it represents a commitment to change, an investment in our shared values, and a step towards a future we can all be proud of. Your donation will directly fund our efforts in engaging CA-34 constituents and voters. Being a grassroots campaign that only accepts clean-money contributions means we rely on people like YOU to power our campaign. As we sprint toward the March primary, we need your investment to ensure we can reach as many people as possible to let them know David is the real leader our district needs.

Becoming a $34/month donor is more than a monetary contribution. It's a statement that you stand for progress, community, and hope. It's a testament to believing in the power of collective action and the impact of sustained support.

Here's how you can join:

1\. Visit davidkimforca.com/donate.
2\. Choose the monthly donation option and set the amount to $34.
3\. Complete the donation process and join our community of change-makers.

Remember, each day of December counts. We're not just asking for donations; we're inviting you to be part of a movement. A movement driven by people like you, who believe that together, we can make a difference.

Let's end this year on a high note and step into the new year with strength and solidarity. Your support is a beacon of hope for a better tomorrow.

Thank you for considering this invitation to make a real difference. Together, we are unstoppable!

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

This is, without a doubt, the most brutal attack we have faced since launching our Senate campaign, My campaign team told me we only have 7 HOURS to raise as much as we possibly can to battle all these lies. Thank you for standing with us, Gov. Jim Justice Republican for U.S. Senate | | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate

****NEW NPI POLLING DATA:**
**REPUBLICAN DAVE REICHERT - 46%**
**DEMOCRAT BOB FERGUSON - 44%****

**[Chip in to Help Dave Keep Up the Momentum](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=37bcf045ca2147b99320b5df8d96b73a&_e=uYKalCc2nbfQ2bvhGCpRdkZHrQmURYR3FIYIxcvD51TvukL00K1bxK23otQSLKMWZigxHTmCYoM5uXp9FkOnf0w-rBpruy85wAkIGGssTBwXpre6dTgjxGBMmY2lTGA2uvFIL1EpZEfD0BIbvWgpzF_JBBqMChH8_DkzoDB3Cba13adXNsIr29j6FX3y7Q3nYvU3k-NUFVc2rz0BI4tjaNXJBEEiUBLRAQVAuzYiJ6psP1Zn65EbJtjTsXSZSBl2_AdllByQ46eLiVWjfnIqq538Y-oiqiypZ9enSXoHZWTOJst9y9ZVDl8gR9HVyOhAtw_4_HFYcqcMDVkkKfAaEudLhY8zLdCfxMvslQNjc2twW6JXqZASH-Gu2OU3Jko0U4mbGSeS1cZVXa8UhZsopQ%3D%3D)**

Northwest Progressive Institute reports that **" Republican Dave Reichert has established a two percentage point lead over Democratic Attorney General Bob Ferguson** in Washington State's 2024 gubernatorial contest with a little less than a year to go... **46% of 700 likely 2024 Washington State voters surveyed on Tuesday and Wednesday of this week by Public Policy Polling said they would vote for Reichert** if the election for Governor were being held today and the candidates were just Reichert and Ferguson. **_44% said they would vote for Ferguson,_** who NPI's previous polling has found to be the Democratic frontrunner."

We asked, and you answered - thank you for sticking with our team on the campaign trail. Support from Washingtonians like you allows us to get ahead of the Democrats and move closer to victory in 2024!

**_Again, thank you_** for all you've done to support our team so far. The race is only getting started, and we're grateful to have you on our side as Dave works to change what's wrong, fix what's broken, and do what's right.

_Thank you, Team Reichert_

**__**___**Dave Reichert is Running to Change what's wrong, Fix what's broken, and Do what's right.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

body:
The Wisconsin Supreme Court has started hearing oral arguments in a case that could put every seat in the legislature on the ballot next year. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Wisconsin has some of the worst gerrymandering in the county.** And _right now_ we have a chance to finally get rid of the GOP’s rigged maps and loosen Republicans' tight grip on Wisconsin. The Wisconsin Supreme Court has started hearing oral arguments in **a case that could order new maps and put _every seat_ in the legislature on the ballot next year. ** The path to righting this Republican wrong is clear: **to make progress on redistricting, secure fair election administration, and expand voting rights, we must come together to ensure Democrats in states like Wisconsin have what they need to win.** In this key battleground, we need to hit the ground running – that means our mobilization, fundraising, and organizing efforts start _now_ , and they start with _you_. clean_body: The Wisconsin Supreme Court has started hearing oral arguments in a case that could put every seat in the legislature on the ballot next year. | | | | | ---|--- Wisconsin has some of the worst gerrymandering in the county. And right now we have a chance to finally get rid of the GOP’s rigged maps and loosen Republicans' tight grip on Wisconsin. The Wisconsin Supreme Court has started hearing oral arguments in a case that could order new maps and put every seat in the legislature on the ballot next year. The path to righting this Republican wrong is clear: to make progress on redistricting, secure fair election administration, and expand voting rights, we must come together to ensure Democrats in states like Wisconsin have what they need to win. In this key battleground, we need to hit the ground running – that means our mobilization, fundraising, and organizing efforts start now , and they start with you. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We are already hard at work building the campaigns that will break Republicans’ supermajority in the Senate and build power for Democrats next fall. The time for fair representation in Wisconsin is long overdue – but with your support, Democrats can be one step closer to overcoming the GOP’s decades-long advantage. The fight will be tough, Republicans will do everything in their power to defend their rigged maps, keep Wisconsin red, and implement their extreme agenda – even if it means subverting our democracy. We must come together and fight for voting rights, abortion access, and our progressive movement. Help make history in Wisconsin and beyond. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: Real quick - Biden's track-us-and-tax-us plan exposed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Cox for Congress, Inc
body:
Today, Maryland officials discussed whether to implement Biden's "track & tax" us plan. I will fight this in Congress to shield us from such outrage. | | | |
---
| | |
# Stop the "Track & Tax" Plan.
---
|
---
---
|
---
| Friend,
If you are like me, working and living in our beautiful Maryland means a lot of time in traffic and on the road.

Today, a newspaper in the Sixth District, the Cumberland Times, [published an alarming story](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=45eea4fb9a&e=5bb5efcda7) that Maryland is actively looking at tracking our vehicles and travel to consider switching to a "mileage tax". To do this, the government will track your vehicle's every movement and send you the bill.

Biden put this plan into action back in his ["Infrastructure" bill](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=469dbd33b6&e=5bb5efcda7) as a pilot program. And now, unless we have leadership that fights with backbone against such an outrageous violation of our liberty and privacy, this could become law in Maryland. Combine this with AI technology, digital money, and social credit scores, and we have a superstate mirroring communist China.

I will fight this in Congress but I need your help to reach our goal. We have only 30 days in the final quarter. I need your maximum contribution tonight.

Be aware, my Democrat opponents in this race would just as soon vote for zero-cars policies including the electric-only plan. Some of the radical left in this race already hail from "zero-car communities," where residents must walk to bus stops for their commute because their housing has zero accommodation for vehicles.

I need to raise an immediate war chest to defend our liberty. [$25 pays for a ](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=2b46f9fd89&e=5bb5efcda7)[roll of stamps](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=b77247972d&e=5bb5efcda7) for direct mail. [$100 pays for an e-mail to voters](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=af6e45abd6&e=5bb5efcda7) to get the word out. [$500 pays for five radio ads](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=a2ddff5def&e=5bb5efcda7). [$2500 pays for our get-out-the-vote work](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=8ccf6f336d&e=5bb5efcda7) to counter the Democrat mail-in ballot flood. We have a plan. [Please help me with your contribution rushed right now.](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=507bae579e&e=5bb5efcda7)

Democrats are out-raising Republicans nationally 2 to 1. [Help me prove](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=7c832c5456&e=5bb5efcda7) that Maryland's families and freedom loving patriots won't sit idly by and let the left ruin our country.

For Freedom,

---
|
---
|
---
| [YES DAN & VALERIE! HERE IS MY CONTRIBUTION TONIGHT.](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=c28767a54d&e=5bb5efcda7 "YES DAN & VALERIE! HERE IS MY CONTRIBUTION TONIGHT.")

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Smoking Gun Biden Email
body:
DC Spends $270k to Repaint ‘Black Lives Matter’ Sign

[INSIDE JW]

Joe Biden Email Shows Hunter Was Copied on Ukraine President
Information

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30787&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2JpZGVucy1zZWNyZXQtZW1haWwtdW5jb3ZlcmVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=2957defedd0e2793d5a45c7e47f85e63ce858470cb29c946d09f9e2656a0b448]

We received five pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30784&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbmFyYS1lbWFpbC0wMTQzMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=ee4e6c02f6bcfe6595be586699e2629e134ab6839406c19b53df337452905453]
of
records from the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA)
that show then-Vice President Joe Biden and his son Hunter received a
May 26, 2016, email detailing a scheduled “8:45 am prep for a 9 am
phone call with Pres Poroshenko,” who was the president of Ukraine.

This is another smoking gun. It blows out of the water the notion that
there was any distance between Joe and Hunter Biden on the Burisma
influence-peddling scandal.

In this email Joe Biden’s address is the alias
robert.l.peters@pci.gov and Hunter Biden’s email account is
disclosed as hbiden@rosemontseneca.com. (Hunter was on the board of
the controversial Ukrainian firm Burisma at the time.)

The email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30784&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbmFyYS1lbWFpbC0wMTQzMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=ee4e6c02f6bcfe6595be586699e2629e134ab6839406c19b53df337452905453]
has
the subject line “Friday Schedule Cards” and was sent by John S.
Flynn, who was Joe Biden’s assistant:

> Boss--8:45am prep for 9am phone call with Pres Poroshenko. Then
> we're off to Rhode Island for infrastructure event and then
> Wilmington for UDel commencement. Nate will have your draft remarks
> delivered later tonight or with your press clips in the morning.
>
> Respectfully,
> John
The email also contains information on U.S. military troops under the
heading “Daily US Troops Update:”

> # US Troops Died in Iraq/Afghanistan: 6,745
>
> # US Troops Wounded in Iraq/Afghanistan: 52,392
>
> US Troop Levels:
> Afghanistan (Security Assistance, Advisory and CT): 10,000
> Iraq (Security Assistance): 4,000
The email was obtained as a result of our lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=29593&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tZmFtaWx5LWJ1c2luZXNzLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6f4c28c98451c1f693bfb095bb580659d3b9ecca97b3b14ff16115e66a68d0a5]
against
the National Archives for Biden family records and communications
regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as communications
between the Bidens and several known business associates (_Judicial
Watch, Inc. v. National Archives_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=29587&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbmF0aW9uYWwtYXJjaGl2ZXMtYmlkZW4tZmFtaWx5LWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTQzMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=804670007417aaa30f3a612bee5601c40e5041b71fe0feb0d88fefe7d6eb8ad6]
(No. 1:23-cv-01432).

In August 2023, James Comer (R-KY), chairman of the House Oversight
Committee called on
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30785&F=T&&hash=0816398bfcc718672016f9b9a9ee041f5cd5177bff8290620f99465cc31f5726]
the National Archives to provide then-Vice President Joe Biden’s
records regarding his duties that overlapped with his son’s
activities in Ukraine. Chairman Comer is pursuing communications in
which Joe Biden used a pseudonym, as well as those in which Hunter
Biden, Eric Schwerin, or Devon Archer are copied.

We have nearly a dozen FOIA lawsuits regarding records concerning
Biden corruption issues, including:

In March 2023, the Archives had released
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=29424&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXAtcmFpZC1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b131a564a6877ba91dca7ee32a7372a1d57660c526b1255751e90136aa064e45]
only 1,276 pages
of over 8,000
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=29401&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbmFyYS1jcm9zc2ZpcmUtaHVycmljYW5lLWpzci0wMjUzNS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=1bed74d8f18fa88336ef0c84a385bc7461bf76d80991377b6b8f104f8cbf53f1]
records about the unprecedented document dispute and raid on the home
of former President Trump.

In October 2022, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=29408&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLWNvbW11bmljYXRpb25zLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=c26a99f87b98127304e1cf60d8db7a5c4398788ef356d3afbe9c6a45fab82cac]

Homeland Security (DHS) for all communications between the Secret

warrant which precipitated the raid on former President Donald

Also in October, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=28422&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1vYmFtYS1saWJyYXJ5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=bbcbae8c72a26db6e8809bb265cce3397d6d0c36490f54d6b294c3535f49ecdb]

DC SPENDS $270,000 TO REPAINT ‘BLACK LIVES MATTER’ ON STREET NEAR
WHITE HOUSE

Crime in Washington, DC, is out of control but local leaders are
spending $270,000 in tax money to promote the Black Lives Matter
movement that is racist, anti-police, anti-American, and often violent
– and doing so in the heart of our nation’s capital.

We received 25 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30744&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2JsbS1wbGF6YS1yZXBhaW50aW5nLWNvc3RzLWRjLWRvdC1yZXNwb25zaXZlLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=5d6277ed7c55146b8429ce37c8c06e6af4656c8a2ea5d928610865b11e4da915]
of records in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request from the
Washington, DC, Department of Transportation that show the cost to
taxpayers to repaint the Black Lives Matter slogan on a street in the
nation’s capital was over $270,000.

The repainting seems to have taken place shortly before Black Lives
Matter groups began defending Hamas terrorist murders of Jews in
Israel.

On June 5, 2020, after days of protests and riots in DC led by the
Black Lives Matter movement, a team of artists, residents, District
employees, and demonstrators painted “Black Lives Matter” in
50-foot-tall yellow capital letters and the District’s crest, which
resembles three stars above an “equals” sign, on 16th Street NW
near the White House. The following day demonstrators painted
“Defund the Police,” a key demand of the Black Lives Matter
movement, alongside the “Black Lives Matter” message.

The total price tag of $271,231 for the repainting includes $53,551
for paint and supplies, and $217,680 for labor.

In a purchase order
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30745&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2JsbS1wbGF6YS1yZXBhaW50aW5nLWNvc3RzLWRjLWRvdC1yZXNwb25zaXZlLXJlY29yZHMtcGctMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=408133d55145c5be4d727653f7bb6434f7e119377b92acdcfbf61949f122e114]
dated September 15, 2023, with the description “Black Lives Matter
Plaza Redo,” a vendor charged DC-based Equus Striping a total of
$53,551.20 for supplies for “BLMRedo2023.” These supplies included
“StreetBond 250 Yellow-BLM (MMA),” “StreetBond 250 Catalyst,”
and “StreetBond Primer,” plus shipping.

The labor
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30746&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2JsbS1wbGF6YS1yZXBhaW50aW5nLWNvc3RzLWRjLWRvdC1yZXNwb25zaXZlLXJlY29yZHMtcGctMTEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6da0ee2a44f20829c947a3690751c84895047d2952cd6609d30c125b74475cca]
for the repainting was provided by a subcontractor called Dewberry and
totaled $217,680.

A memorandum
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30747&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2JsbS1wbGF6YS1yZXBhaW50aW5nLWNvc3RzLWRjLWRvdC1yZXNwb25zaXZlLXJlY29yZHMtcGctMTkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f78ddb80cba4b5f98976c4426d1d4b4c5330d76506f6d1832d0e47d042dc5d74]
of negotiations for the project dated April 13, 2023 indicates that
the project required a foreman, operator, laborer, carpenter, and
mason. Equipment included a backhoe/loader, portable air compressor,
Bobcat, dump truck, pick-up truck, and service truck.

The memorandum also indicates that the hourly rates submitted by the
contractor on March 9, 2023, were rejected. After negotiation, the
contractor submitted lower hourly rates and were accepted on April 13,
2023. The negotiated pricing was signed off on by DC Department of
Transportation officials Dr. Eloka Kingsley Achebe (deputy program
manager), Jaswant Matharu (project manager-local paving), and Gaiyath
Naanou (resident engineer-local paving).

We obtained the records in a November 6, 2023, FOIA request for:

* All budget records, invoices, work orders, authorizations,
agreements and contracts involved in repainting the Black Lives Matter
logo on Black Lives Matter Plaza in November 2023.

* All emails sent to and from the following DC Department of
Transportation officials: Interim Director Sharon Kershbaum, General
Counsel Frank Seales Jr, Chief of Staff Matthew Marcou, Chief of
External Affairs Olivia Dedner, Chief Project Delivery Officer Sandra
Marks, Interim Chief Operating Officer Neelima Ghanta, Chief
Information Officer Khaled Falah, Chief Performance Officer John
Thomas and Chief Equity and Inclusion Officer Nana Bailey-Thomas
identified using the following search queries:

* BLM+Hamas
* BLM+terrorism
* BLM+Palestinian
* BLM+Palestinians

* All emails sent between any of the officials identified in Bullet
2 and any representative and/or employee of Black Lives Grassroots
organization and/or with an email account ending in the domain
@blmgrassroots.org.

Here is the history of this story.

On July 1, 2020, we filed a civil rights lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=19523&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvc3Vlcy1kYy1wYWludC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=29cdbac269ded837b8ed7a3f3e92cf4ed74cf42cb81e641f9c49e011d70a6736]
against
Mayor Bowser and other officials for First Amendment violations over
their refusal to allow us to paint the message “Because No One Is
Above the Law!” on a DC street.

In August 2020, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=20064&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmxtLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=9e8c7511bb115b746e6e466331d818ff8eb27d6435f65bc1aa406dd98200b3c1]
against
Bowser, the District of Columbia Department of Transportation and the
District of Columbia Department of Public Works for records about the
painting of “Black Lives Matter” and “Defund the Police” on a
DC street in front of the White House.

In September 2020, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30748&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG90LWJsbS1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=1ecac4509d46406765ce90a217899a0c8b62d98dbcc3fe1a0f91c7ebc5ebb51d]
against the U.S.
Department of Transportation for records of communication between the
Federal Highway Administration and the District of Columbia’s
Department of Transportation about the painting Black Lives Matter on
16th Street NW near the White House.

> Was part of the plan also to pay Joe Biden? In an email
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30299&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjAvMTAvMTUvZW1haWxzLXJldmVhbC1ob3ctaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLXRyaWVkLXRvLWNhc2gtaW4tYmlnLXdpdGgtY2hpbmVzZS1maXJtLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=849b1f7d2da6dc35e49b0f0749d611eef9c06a5e20520d753b92b2c969a16f33]
> sent to Hunter Biden and others about percentages of profit-sharing
> from the CEFC deal, a key Biden business associate asks, in what
> appears to be a reference to a ten percent share for Joe Biden:
> “10 held by H for the big guy?”
>
> An IRS agent who worked on the Hunter Biden case was pressed about
> that email in July testimony before Congress. He told the House
> Oversight Committee that “all I can do is speak to the evidence
> there” and “that email, ‘ten held by H for the big guy’ and
> from what I understand that to be is his dad, President Biden.”
>
> With Comer focusing on possible crimes, over in the Senate, Chuck
> Grassley is pursuing evidence of the cover-up. In his latest letter
> to Attorney General Merrick Garland and FBI Director Christopher
> Wray, Grassley writes that “years of investigation...indicate
> there is—and has been—an effort among certain Justice Department
> and FBI officials to improperly delay and stop full and complete
> investigative activity into the Biden family.”
>
> Grassley added: “I’ve been made aware that at one point in time
> the FBI maintained over 40 Confidential Human Sources that provided
> criminal information related to Joe Biden, James Biden, and Hunter
> Biden. An essential question that must be answered is this: did the
> FBI investigate the information or shut it down?”
>
> One key figure on Grassley’s radar is Ukrainian oligarch Mykola
> Zlochevsky, head of the controversial energy company, Burisma.
> Zlochevsky is also a focus of the House impeachment inquiry. But
> while Comer is following the money, Grassley wants to know what the
> FBI did about stunning allegations from the embattled oligarch.
>
> Hunter Biden joined the board of Burisma in May 2014 at a salary of
> $1 million per year. By the end of the year, according to a detailed
> Comer Committee timeline
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30306&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vdmVyc2lnaHQuaG91c2UuZ292L3RoZS1iaWRlbnMtaW5mbHVlbmNlLXBlZGRsaW5nLXRpbWVsaW5lLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=191ca88531038c6ce53c70dd3a4a3f14b6779014974d1d1930ae1127da07cd2c],
> Zlochevsky was complaining about U.S. “government pressure” and
> urged Biden to contact his father, the vice president. According to
> an interview
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30770&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vdmVyc2lnaHQuaG91c2UuZ292L3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDIzLzA4L0Rldm9uLUFyY2hlci1UcmFuc2NyaXB0LnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=ca30d70c10d29464dab4dbaba6e1b0bf48b21080be88e2d4a7e9f7a9a335c7fa]
> with a Biden business partner released by the committee, Hunter
> Biden did “call DC” after being pressured by Zlochevsky and his
> associates.
>
> Earlier this year, Grassley released a bombshell FBI informant
> report
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30298&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9ueXBvc3QuY29tLzIwMjMvMDcvMjAvYmlkZW4tYnJpYmUtZmlsZS1yZWxlYXNlZC1idXJpc21hLWNoaWVmLXNhaWQtYm90aC1qb2UtYW5kLWh1bnRlci1pbnZvbHZlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8cde206ee149dd00989364163353ed2de005c656eea4486852a9a9687f63a797]
> of a 2016 meeting with Zlochevsky. In the report, Zlochevsky claimed
> he had been coerced into paying a $10 million bribe to Hunter and
> Joe Biden. It “cost 5 [million] to pay one Biden, and 5 [million]
> to another Biden,” the FBI informant reported Zlochevsky saying.
>
> Grassley now wants to know if the FBI buried that report and related
> documents. In his new letter, Grassley notes that in December 2019
> the FBI’s Washington field office “closed” a case into
> “Mykola Zlochevsky, owner of Burisma, which was opened in January
> 2016 by a Foreign Corrupt Practices Act [FBI] squad.”
>
> How serious is the Grassley probe? “Based on the information
> provided to my office over a period of years by multiple credible
> whistleblowers,” the senator writes to Garland and Wray, “there
> appears to be an effort within the Justice Department and FBI to
> shut down investigative activity relating to the Biden family. Such
> decisions point to significant political bias infecting the
> decision-making of not only the Attorney General and FBI Director,
> but also line agents and prosecutors. Our Republic cannot survive
> such a political infection and you have an obligation to this
> country to clear the air.”

SOCIAL SECURITY OVERPAYS BILLIONS UNDER LEADERSHIP OF RACIAL EQUITY
ACTIVIST

Your Social Security Administration is doling out your tax dollars
like they are free money and it’s overpaying people billions of
dollars. Our _Corruption Chronicles _blog has the details
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30776&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc29jaWFsLXNlY3VyaXR5LW92ZXJwYXlzLWJpbGxpb25zLXVuZGVyLWxlYWRlcnNoaXAtb2YtcmFjaWFsLWVxdWl0eS1hY3RpdmlzdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=5fa755c5e245e33ea89247f53307805e4fa656824ac4b56dbfe4b480efe4cd3e].

> Under the leadership of a noted racial equity activist the Social
> Security Administration (SSA) has mistakenly overpaid beneficiaries
> tens of billions of dollars, including a 65% spike in overpayments
> in one year. In 2023 the agency with a stated mission of ensuring
> equity and accessibility by addressing systemic barriers to
> participation and a commitment to providing services to underserved
> communities made a whopping $23 billion in overpayments, according
> to its latest Agency Financial Report
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30789&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3NhLmdvdi9maW5hbmNlLzIwMjMvRnVsbCBGWSAyMDIzIEFGUi5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=4bedc98dcb8fa04fbc6fdc3d8c78c6418e63c2a7f3621c5034100ad94c322e81].
The
> figure is a marked increase over the already stunning $11.1 billion
> in overpayments that SSA erroneously made in 2022.
>
> SSA’s dreadful habit of overpaying billions in benefits goes back
> years as American taxpayers get stuck with the hefty price because
> most of the money is never recovered. In the last few years, the
> agency has doled out between $6 billion and $7 billion in new
> overpayments annually, the new report reveals. It shows that most of
> the 2022 overpayments, around $6.5 billion, occurred within the
> Old-Age Survivors and Disability Insurance (OASDI) programs which
> provide monthly benefits to qualified retired and disabled workers
> and their dependents and to survivors of insured workers.
> Eligibility and benefit amounts are determined by the worker’s
> contributions to Social Security. In prior years the problem was
> mainly in the Supplemental Security Income (SSI) program which helps
> low-income elderly and disabled adults as well as children. In 2022
> SSI distributed north of $4.6 billion in overpayments.
>
> At a congressional hearing earlier this year SSA Commissioner Kilolo
> Kijakazi told federal lawmakers that her agency is trying to recover
> the money by sending out millions of “overpayment notices
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30790&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9rZmZoZWFsdGhuZXdzLm9yZy9uZXdzL2FydGljbGUvc29jaWFsLXNlY3VyaXR5LWFkbWluaXN0cmF0aW9uLWhvdXNlLWhlYXJpbmctY29tbWlzaW9uZXIvXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=7304b20cb0f9e1bf2d96785cb0745e49758233c3a266c192e67959031de7bb92
> to those who erroneously got extra cash. Kijakazi said 1,028,389
> people got the notices in 2022 and 986,912 in fiscal 2023, which
> ended in September. Kijakazi is a renowned racial equity proponent
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30791&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc3NhLmdvdi9hZ2VuY3kvY29tbWlzc2lvbmVyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=478d762531ef55469f28f08ce6ad4815110efb480c1993d705fae4b7d36dbc82]
with a storied career of
> researching—and tackling—structural racism and the racial wealth
> gap in both government and high-profile nonprofits. She has served
> as co-chair of the National Advisory Council on Eliminating the
> Black-White Wealth Gap at the leftist Center for American Progress
> and on the Washington, D.C. Equitable Recovery Advisory Group. In
> mid-2021 President Joe Biden named Kijakazi acting SSA Commissioner
> after previously appointing her to a lower-level position of deputy
> commissioner for retirement and disability policy.
>
> In the new agency financial report Kijakazi reveals that in 2023 she
> began to rebuild the SSA workforce by adding nearly 4,000 employees,
> yet problems persist. “We made progress toward eliminating our
> hearings backlog,” the commissioner writes in the report’s
> opening message, adding that “we ended FY 2023 with 321,819 cases
> pending, the lowest level since 2000.” The commissioner proceeds
> to highlight all the great things her agency has accomplished,
> including working to eliminate a backlog, reducing wait times for
> claims and improving organizational efficiency. “As good stewards
> of our programs, we strive to reduce improper payments and combat
> waste, fraud and abuse through our quality reviews, cost-effective
> program integrity work, and payment accuracy efforts.” Kijakazi
> ends her opening message by writing that there are “no material
> weaknesses in our internal controls.”
>
> Nevertheless, buried deep in the exhaustive 216-page report the
> agency discloses the billions it has overpaid in the last few years
> despite establishing a special Improper Payment Prevention Team in
> 2019 tasked with developing strategies to determine the underlying
> cause of payment errors and developing corrective action plans. SSA
> issues over $1 trillion in benefit payments annually and preventing
> overpayments can be as simple as providing employees with a
> “comprehensive tool” when calculating benefits manually. In
> fact, SSA found that it could have avoided approximately 73,000
> overpayments totaling more than $368 million in 2022 if it had
> furnished a “comprehensive tool” for employees to do their job
> correctly. “Preventing improper payments is more advantageous than
> recovering them after they are made because SSA does not have to
> expend additional resources to recover the overpayments ...” the
> report states.

SOROS-TIED FACEBOOK CENSORS CONSIDER SUPPRESSING ANTI-IMMIGRATION
SPEECH

You may enjoy chatting with friends and looking at pictures of the
grandkids on Facebook without realizing that the “news” you see is
being controlled by left-leaning censors. Our _Corruption Chronicles_
blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30792&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc29yb3MtdGllZC1mYWNlYm9vay1jZW5zb3JzaGlwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=1bf331ed1ad333fb5a5a7869fb65e536b1406ce6f1fc85c047d148143883dabe].

> A few years after Facebook (now Meta) launched a censorship board to
> decide which posts get blocked an update on the panel, which is
> currently inviting public opinion
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30793&F=T&&hash=e810fe99665c7ad5146f46d7b0a83ce6f454d7496acb8bd063fdb325b4811e3f]
> on whether to suppress anti-immigration speech, is in order. The
> original board—as well as new members—is stacked with leftists,
> including a close friend of leftwing billionaire George Soros who
> served on the board of directors of his Open Society Foundations
> (OSF). This is important because the oversight board
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66035&L=30794&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cub3ZlcnNpZ2h0Ym9hcmQuY29tL21lZXQtdGhlLWJvYXJkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=d008db281f61261dc4db64f7e079b08fb5b82961852184604c1ffa31660521f3],
as it is
> officially known, determines which posts get blocked from the
> world’s most popular social networking website which has an
> estimated 3 billion users.
>
> In a recent example, the Meta censorship board is considering
> whether ant-immigration posts fall under its hate speech policy
> which removes what the tech giant describes as direct attacks
> against people on the basis of protected characteristics such as
> race, ethnicity, national origin and religious affiliation.
> Refugees, migrants, immigrants and asylum seekers are protected
> against “the most severe attacks,” according to the oversight
> board, though “commentary and criticism of immigration policies”
> are reportedly allowed. Now the panel wants public comments
> involving how Meta should distinguish commentary and criticism of
> immigration policies from direct attacks on people based on
> protected characteristics, especially during elections. Board
> members will deliberate the case over the next few weeks, according
> to a statement posted on the Meta oversight website.
>
> Judicial Watch has gathered some important background on the
> characters who will ultimately issue the ruling. For starters the
> group of 22 is overwhelmingly leftist and likely to restrict
> conservative views. Nearly half of the members have ties to Soros,
> the wealthy philanthropist who dedicates huge sums to spreading a
> radical left agenda that includes targeting conservative
> politicians, erasing national borders and identities, financing
> civil unrest and orchestrating refugee crises for political gain.
> Some on the oversight board have made political contributions to top
> Democrats such as Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama and Elizabeth Warren
> and others have publicly expressed their disdain for former
> President Donald Trump. Among the panel’s standouts is András
> Sajó, the founding Dean of Legal Studies at Soros’ Central
> European University. Sajó was a judge at the European Court of
> Human Rights (ECHR) for nearly a decade. He also served on the board
> of directors of OSF’s Justice Initiative.
>
> Many on the board are connected to leftist groups tied to Soros that
> have benefitted from his generous donations, according to Judicial
> Watch’s research. Alan Rusbridger, a former British newspaper
> editor and principal at Oxford University, serves on the board of
> directors of the Committee to Protect Journalists, which has
> received at least $750,000 from OSF. Rusbridger also served as a
> governor at a global think tank, Ditchley Foundation, that co-hosted
> a conference with OSF on change in the Middle East and North Africa
> and understanding political Islam. Afia Asantewaa Sariyev, a human
> rights attorney, is the program manager at Soros’ Open Society
> Initiative for West Africa. Sudhir Krishnaswamy, an Indian lawyer
> and civil society activist, runs a nonprofit called Centre for Law
> and Policy Research that focuses on transgender rights, gender
> equality and public health. The group is a grantee of a justice
> foundation that pocketed $1.4 million from OSF.
>
> The list of Meta judges connected to Soros and the organized left
> continues. Julie Owono is the executive director of a Paris-based
> nonprofit that advocates for privacy and freedom of expression
> online. The group is part of the Global Network Initiative, an
> internet oversight and policy consortium handsomely funded by Soros.
> Nighat Dad is a Pakistani attorney and the founder of the Digital
> Rights Foundation, a nonprofit based in Pakistan that has received
> $114,000 in grants from OSF. Civil rights activist Tawakkol Karman
> sits on the advisory board of Transparency International, which gets
> significant OSF funding. Helle Thorning-Schmidt, Denmark’s former
> prime minister, is on the board of the European Council of Foreign
> Relations, which has received millions from OSF. She is also a
> trustee at the International Crisis Group which has collected over
> $8.2 million from OSF and includes George and Alexander Soros on its
> board. Catalina Botero-Marino is the dean of a Colombian law school
> called Universidad de Los Andes that got over $1.3 million from OSF.
> Kenji Yoshino, a law professor at New York University, serves on the
> board of directors of the Brennan Center for Justice, which took in
> hundreds of thousands of dollars from OSF in 2021. Suzanne Nossel,
> an Obama administration official, is on the advisory board of the
> leftwing think tank Foreign Policy for America, which has received
> over $1.5 million from Soros in the last few years. Khaled Mansour,
> an Egyptian academic, is a director at the nonprofit Crisis Action,
> which has accepted $2.4 million from OSF since 2017.

Until next week,
