name: Pro Life Update
subject: The Future of Hearing Aids
body:
This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market

| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhp8efj7kik8ho2v12hk88tc6d92k71slk6402pg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34clh66o35c3h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlemdmu52p3e95ff02gm8hkl6lmfb3vqqctib8l0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34clh66o35c3h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7lt3f2kbbbgfjj0m8kihgij1euve0onp7pfj3d8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34clh66o35c3h2bs)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrt6emt48hl58qq8dbtnt6v5l2ogdjanlc302cn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34clh66o35c3h2bs)
What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8pjjt11k5jeibnofr4iug4rkr64245qrgre2g50_rp22sh2s8i6eo34clh66o35c3h2bs)

subject: Big News Coming Soon
body:

____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qJIrMLAcj1LSSrim-rb_0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTZrsP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1BRlItMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWry_GplahQNA1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qJIrMLAcj1LSSrim-rb_0w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTZrsP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1BRlItMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWry_GplahQNA1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress

name: American Action News
subject: The Future of Hearing Aids
body:
This powerful secret weapon against hearing loss is crushing the market

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcbrunsfii3l6nhnfvp2kcuvf53tdh7kr5cau3v0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34clh69oj6c9h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7vfqgfbrlq0rmdv1o86qtg95kekto4si46ulilo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34clh69oj6c9h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh7sdc4i7sp5b4su46ouehnt86896stpvitehoag_rp22sh2s8i6eo34clh69oj6c9h2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z571kfbfabmu2fhaqcgeor8j03b4av9q41c2o2q0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34clh69oj6c9h2bs)
What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0nu6fv1k6ksk228cdn8gku95eh9urae0tk6svkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34clh69oj6c9h2bs)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: This is what it'll take to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f7f41e8467c40c0e35f61fc69baf8c5a329a6e9053b28ebcd27ad58422a8c758aea0a65daf6bc0af3e518949de534b59650ba1522196ad133acb33708ba18a3fa4d98b64f27d3a8bbcd1f678b5a10d4c

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=705647e1f81c8825a39a141a8f64069f345f753d43b02e601a90408d84b9879cd987add9f3928f23e177dfb4990f9546c9faa9bbe4955ced1c945bed89d47744

Hey friend, it's Ron DeSantis.

As you know, I'm running for President, and there are less than 12 months left in this race.

What we do with this time is up to us, but the biggest difference you could make is sending in a donation of any amount to my campaign. And if you're willing to step up and help me do what it takes to win today, I am going to send you this bumper sticker as a small token of my appreciation:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=705647e1f81c8825a39a141a8f64069f345f753d43b02e601a90408d84b9879cd987add9f3928f23e177dfb4990f9546c9faa9bbe4955ced1c945bed89d47744

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=705647e1f81c8825a39a141a8f64069f345f753d43b02e601a90408d84b9879cd987add9f3928f23e177dfb4990f9546c9faa9bbe4955ced1c945bed89d47744
Send in just $5 today!

No matter the amount—whether it's $5 or $50—we use the budget our grassroots team sets us on track for to stay on pace. We get to plan our events, get our ads on air, invest in campaign materials to spread the word, and match the momentum of our growing team.

We know the sacrifice it's going to take to win next November, but we also know what we're facing if we don't give what we can today to save our country.

And when you decide to donate today, you join the special group of people who receive special offers, weekly investor reports about what's new in our campaign, and so much more to come.

I need your support, and I know I wouldn't be here today without it.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=705647e1f81c8825a39a141a8f64069f345f753d43b02e601a90408d84b9879cd987add9f3928f23e177dfb4990f9546c9faa9bbe4955ced1c945bed89d47744
Sign up to donate today

We have to recognize that we've got a long road ahead. The Iowa Caucus is right around the corner and it will only intensify from there on out.

I am counting on my team to come together now. Letting the Left continue to run laps around our party is not something I'm willing to stand by for. This is the fight of our lives, and it's worth every small investment.

Yours in Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=705647e1f81c8825a39a141a8f64069f345f753d43b02e601a90408d84b9879cd987add9f3928f23e177dfb4990f9546c9faa9bbe4955ced1c945bed89d47744

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=705647e1f81c8825a39a141a8f64069f345f753d43b02e601a90408d84b9879cd987add9f3928f23e177dfb4990f9546c9faa9bbe4955ced1c945bed89d47744

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=705647e1f81c88257cff43e03db310de63587fc28cd7040564b637041c1df12b34ca4d24ca2a56435f5917ae19ccd7eb3a0185ba32282b805cf3961df02a6728
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=705647e1f81c8825a39a141a8f64069f345f753d43b02e601a90408d84b9879cd987add9f3928f23e177dfb4990f9546c9faa9bbe4955ced1c945bed89d47744

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=705647e1f81c8825a39a141a8f64069f345f753d43b02e601a90408d84b9879cd987add9f3928f23e177dfb4990f9546c9faa9bbe4955ced1c945bed89d47744

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

As you know, I'm running for President, and there are less than 12 months left in this race. What we do with this time is up to us, but the biggest difference you could make is sending in a donation of any amount to my campaign. And if you're willing to step up and help me do what it takes to win today, I am going to send you this bumper sticker as a small token of my appreciation: Send in just $5 today! No matter the amount—whether it's $5 or $50—we use the budget our grassroots team sets us on track for to stay on pace. We get to plan our events, get our ads on air, invest in campaign materials to spread the word, and match the momentum of our growing team. We know the sacrifice it's going to take to win next November, but we also know what we're facing if we don't give what we can today to save our country. And when you decide to donate today, you join the special group of people who receive special offers, weekly investor reports about what's new in our campaign, and so much more to come. I need your support, and I know I wouldn't be here today without it. Sign up to donate today We have to recognize that we've got a long road ahead. The Iowa Caucus is right around the corner and it will only intensify from there on out. I am counting on my team to come together now. Letting the Left continue to run laps around our party is not something I'm willing to stand by for. This is the fight of our lives, and it's worth every small investment. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Greedy corporation could destroy Arctic habitats
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop ConocoPhillips from DESTROYING the Arctic for the Willow Project! >> [_Take action now!_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2169695?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Picture this: a snowy paradise. Glaciers drift on sparkling blue waters. A polar bear and her cub wander the icy terrain in search of a safe den to rest. A caribou herd seeks refuge for the winter. Just a few months from now – **swarms of heavy “thumper” trucks** will roll in. Airstrips and roads will **replace bear and caribou habitat.** Hundreds of millions of gallons of **water will be pumped out of glacial lakes.** In total, more than _272 thousand acres_ of the Arctic will be impacted – **unless you help us stop this disastrous proposal! ** ConocoPhillips is beginning the process of seismic testing for its Willow Project – the largest oil and gas development on U.S. lands. Many Indigenous people, like the Iñupiaq Peoples, depend on these lands for their way of life and are leading the fight against this disastrous project. **Will you support their demands?** [_**Tell the Department of Interior to STOP seismic testing for the Willow Project and PROTECT the Arctic before this urgent comment period closes! Sign the petition now!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2169696?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2169697?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**The Arctic is warming at FOUR TIMES the rate of other regions!** This is a region particularly vulnerable to climate change, which would only be accelerated by the Willow Project. Melting habitats for caribou means _**less food**_ and a _**vanishing way of life**_ for the Indigenous people who reside here.
The Willow Project is only the beginning, and ConocoPhillips has admitted as much to investors. This seismic testing proposal shows the company is eyeing BILLIONS of barrels of oil in Alaska’s Arctic. The Department of Interior could stop it. Instead, it’s prioritizing the short-term profits of ConocoPhillips over this fragile ecosystem and the entire planet![ _**Please, Friend, we need 1,382 more signatures from your area – will you help save the Arctic from this greedy company?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2169698?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2169697?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior Fossil Fuel and Lands Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth **
|

# Saturday, December 2nd, 2023
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend!** On this date in 1942, the first self-sustained controlled nuclear reaction took place at the University of Chicago's football stadium under the direction of Enrico Fermi. ([See Drawing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFvhCAUwPFPA5sGHqIwMHRxu64dDQeP8zUoBvGu_fZNmnTr_k_--X3clpunTPvj3W_oWiqLD42euEjooAO1DDy6hAioODo5CalBWzHx1UWJ1sQ4TSNYE1F6HGTUJhibZEij5uRAgJIgQApt1dgbvN_R4oBBJW0EskFgpFZq_1lobyum_F2eWPtQNp7d2tpxMvXGYGYw7_g6-yusFPyj9BgvBjN-HdnTjpXBnKierduvkNHXrqIPrdTur4i8uni8KGc6x4kN4rF5yr-j9i_7JwAA__-fv1tQ)) If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can take care of that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQANCvgS0W3GFsBoZKkae6a0eLmMO-FpvIoan691XVMdnf9N7HaQyceV_ewka-pjKFufKdJg0nOAFORkafiIBQkted0i20TnVy9W2K2MdkbXBITiUyNnUU504HZy1qyR4UoAYFWrUObdPT5UKODM2Y2l6RMIoi13I0H4X3ulLKP-VORzOXTWa_1nq9CXwRMAgYHomAYQwLz6-8f_4ZHEjgOV6_OWe-2U4YtWyB87-1X3UTeDZKHv65kfVpwG8AAAD__4cjW9I). Don't miss today's sponsor, [NativePath](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kT-PmDAMxT9N2IISm78DQyWEuly7VOqITOJAqkAQhGvv21c5ndSltyW_92w92z9f5hfywR_rN9p5SC7OZJJ_5VmDBAk4V4UdHDMwFjzoVuka6l61xTaAs1RjxUtH2rGyROyM67HirjKL0oUfQAFqUKBV3WNTdrws3HPFBl3dKRaVYutTvMpf0R9pYxfe4itfpYl7EYYtpfMW-EXAJGDamELayoNyvJPSll2Z07H6Y5ULh_AmHSUZmOwtU5QLWbmEGK28n5UuyX-SwGk7jbcCRw0dCmjOZxE4QqXqNn83nwSOdVuj7hBAQGN01j8mkT8m5687yV6prIHA8es0fc9vFDgKaJ60z3d8LsOf12XPztY_u8DRnOYDGdpP8uvxr-k7jUfiI8cqrsGev30I_m5aUal1Jx_et5X-e7u_AQAA___FkZQ7).
|
---
## Israel-Gaza Ceasefire Ends
Fighting has resumed in the Israel-Hamas war after a seven-day ceasefire. As dawn broke in southern Gaza yesterday, shells [began to fall again](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2unDAQxfGnMd0ge_guKNLQ3bQp0QAHcGTwyswu2Tx9tKlve07z0__X1_glPvhz-ykHel3jKLP6F0bHxMTFWGZLvwKMIkPvGusqrjrbZHs_M2qHtYBz9WS7ltvGtTNqkabq3NRmvmfLhWPLzlZdUectpgkdSszFWrUWprRYvMaU_47-1B1reMcXUj7HIwv9rvq4TPHD8GB4uO87T3gq0vX5P0tMYTE8HH5ZAghyqeFhk79CJ7aoXjSmizS9aYOSv5Ig0C6HXCRbAgh_FOdCmp4zSDbxJ33I5JisMzxkqV8etw_BX3VjSrsd4sN_nX7b6l8AAAD__9Jua7s). The new explosions and smoke marked the end of a break in the fighting that allowed for humanitarian efforts and prisoner/hostage exchanges. Negotiations between Israel and Hamas broke down over the release of further prisoners, and [each side blames the other](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAQQL_GbKDzGYIZPHTxlq4d0cWc4SonRtgKbb--SufOT3pP7-M6X0mSPNZ3urOrMc8Uqjx51thii2bum8VFZmTTsNMj6AGHCcZmczia2xIN9AHIhgsEHUZrJ4sGI4cwNeIQ0GgE1DBM5tJZvt144p6DiYMFVj3wIjUf3WeWR904pu_85KML-d4kt9W6F2XeFHqF_jzPjr4klxdV6F9uhV6jQg9aoV_ph9rAVDjKwW3IKdFeuJVyEKd2y6XSyqU53LKfkpKUy6h6WO8k6a9Y__3_DQAA__-V0lt4) for the failure to continue the ceasefire. Israel claims Hamas refused to release 20 women eligible for exchange, while Hamas says it made multiple unaccepted release offers.
## Sandra Day O'Connor Dies
The first female justice to sit on the Supreme Court [died yesterday at 93](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu3CAURL8Gd1hwsQ0uKNLQbdqUFguXXSIMFrBr-e8jp37dFEdnRvPnsT1sTDG_ftsddQ9ls67HL24cKFAQ2zR4HRABxYCaS8ZnmFcmh7eW0gu-8MD8GpS0Uj0XZE4tylklQIohamAgODDgbF7FMip8PnHFCZ0Is2JIJoY-9lLHvyXm_saQrvLFOrqyD0m_ez8aEb8IGALmPM_x02wv3l43QMC0XupFwGQ8GwFzlBR7dHe8iwkYDgQM4zdqs6-WenvR4krOpdIQa-v0LLvNtGH9Im2fo-KO1JVP7dRHvFVylZNSnLHbNVTtjzOmFNsiycReu43p_9z-43n_AgAA___kDm8k). O'Connor was appointed to the court by Ronald Reagan in 1981 (his first nominee), and she sat on the court until her retirement in 2006. Her career spanned the tenure of three Chief Justices. Known for her independent, middle-of-the-road voice, O'Connor often made [the determining vote](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O8yAQAJ8Gd2vhxT-4oPgad_naK601XsecMERAgvL2p1x93UjTjObrtt7IeRfu_-liU464ki3uxWuHgIBq7ZvdHMzIqmHTTbIbcJjl1JxmsxOO24CzniY1drLXmkhq22s1EB2ycQYlqg4ldnKY1dhq3jaeuWerjkFLFr3k3ZWY2u_oQjn58O_44tTaeDXenKU8slD_BC4Cl1pra7ccuOaPF7h8UOCSKeyJYKc3RBtDiAkOl3KBGi8KEAOUkyE_H4kvBhufqcDuOAMVmJXApUlmf1TnvcvjJHp5v8j534by55GfAAAA___o32M-) in high profile cases, and she sided with the majority in the pivotal ruling in 2000 that confirmed George W. Bush as the winner of the presidential election. She died in Phoenix, AZ, from complications with advanced dementia.
## George Santos Expelled from Congress
Members of the House of Representatives [voted to oust](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LturDAURuGnMZ2RvW0PQ-HiNHRz2pSIy29wZNgIO8Pk7aNJnforlrQ-Hv1jiCnuy_9hgy-B-2Eq8YlekyRJprfV7ANAMBW8bpR25FrVVKtXwdrJmpGcbXCfWnOD0wpmdDNpp1QVPSkymhRp5Vpzq-8YR7SwmExwdwVhFeZY-Kw_Oe5lRUjf_MRZT7xVya-lHFmYf4I6Qd11XXXg144rv11Qd3CKJU5ZUIdtHEpJmOXChzxxyAV8LpB52AtnideB9OZw8iZX_sqoTj8fV0wp5lsjrFq2Iabfcvnzw08AAAD__01cYOc) New York Republican George Santos over a 23-count federal indictment. About a third of House Republicans voted against the expulsion, and some raised concerns that removing a congressman before a conviction sets a dangerous precedent. Santos has been indicted for a range of federal crimes, [including lying under oath](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFytCAUBeCnwe46cNFFC4q_sdu_TekgXJQEZQdwTd4-s1unOcU5zTfn4z7fTYjhWP-bnXT1aTa2hifNAgEB5dw1TnsiJNmQFoqLHvuRq2bTIyo7LGrxC5LhqrOKKynsMtCgzM34JmjkKAVyFLwf5a0daFlopI6s9P3AiXWcXKgpt58pHHUjH3_Sk3Jr095EvdX6KEz-YzgxnK7rajOdlXJ57a8m5egYTmd5B0Rz7eaLMqyU8kpQzFFTgXC4YCs58NmcDuxm8koFvLFUYEtnIaDvxxlLSAc8UyV4sUEgcMFwarJ2jyvEGMpNsY6vuwnxLax__vUbAAD__0GzbjY) and credit card fraud in connection with donor money.

clean_body: Fighting has resumed in the Israel-Hamas war after a seven-day ceasefire. | | | | . | | Saturday, December 2nd, 2023 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this date in 1942, the first self-sustained controlled nuclear reaction took place at the University of Chicago's football stadium under the direction of Enrico Fermi. () If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . Don't miss today's sponsor, . | Israel-Gaza Ceasefire Ends Fighting has resumed in the Israel-Hamas war after a seven-day ceasefire. As dawn broke in southern Gaza yesterday, shells . The new explosions and smoke marked the end of a break in the fighting that allowed for humanitarian efforts and prisoner/hostage exchanges. Negotiations between Israel and Hamas broke down over the release of further prisoners, and for the failure to continue the ceasefire. Israel claims Hamas refused to release 20 women eligible for exchange, while Hamas says it made multiple unaccepted release offers. Sandra Day O'Connor Dies The first female justice to sit on the Supreme Court . O'Connor was appointed to the court by Ronald Reagan in 1981 (his first nominee), and she sat on the court until her retirement in 2006. Her career spanned the tenure of three Chief Justices. Known for her independent, middle-of-the-road voice, O'Connor often made - in high profile cases, and she sided with the majority in the pivotal ruling in 2000 that confirmed George W. Bush as the winner of the presidential election. She died in Phoenix, AZ, from complications with advanced dementia. George Santos Expelled from Congress Members of the House of Representatives New York Republican George Santos over a 23-count federal indictment. About a third of House Republicans voted against the expulsion, and some raised concerns that removing a congressman before a conviction sets a dangerous precedent. Santos has been indicted for a range of federal crimes, and credit card fraud in connection with donor money. body:
The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public showing an entirely different story to the lies they told.

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi lied about January 6.

Liz Chaney lied about January 6.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here's how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

---
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d23094c72cb64f52b6a91806dbc6c61e&_e=u8Zezjz0jUYNjJa9EDDF2H8-DLgllo1Mq79sUF_wON7RheOlPIjqMm4aSVRVHYVYUokuqrzYzzFzv9t4JNDwh2_14cb2OVjcgAVFGTCA2jyCRxCiDWV76A1O_zoQowkjU0gBDoQPcqcIRJjHSyMeVke290MlB0PWi78uGwX5ypTLcQY_vkeMmZPSn5dnJzLm1qF4Xjqn9Q4oqWGa8hLSmyWnZDAd1Ev2ij7IqxcLF7NuW2o5FTJxVqN-NdmFBWVonstXU-NH6HTz9YVDCLmZ4JLzox2oFgfQIP0rY1yIwIr8ZT8MAKYkCAPUY3lKGD3evBWkn0_RAX00ayS5QneFvpSO__fY8XgZHZAs5B77z9JPMi_6Im3kMUOju9vhC2qa5d3e-dTJG0pADjv4Gnc6DLe4ZHVFF5MmI4N713IoeYwwORbZFR8Gsv1nO5dP2jQ0XsItu9QqqfjC2y3pcAqnCPGBPiDkq70GXUkY1bKwIL0%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d23094c72cb64f52b6a91806dbc6c61e&_e=u8Zezjz0jUYNjJa9EDDF2H8-DLgllo1Mq79sUF_wON7RheOlPIjqMm4aSVRVHYVYUokuqrzYzzFzv9t4JNDwh2_14cb2OVjcgAVFGTCA2jyCRxCiDWV76A1O_zoQowkjU0gBDoQPcqcIRJjHSyMeVke290MlB0PWi78uGwX5ypTLcQY_vkeMmZPSn5dnJzLm1qF4Xjqn9Q4oqWGa8hLSmyWnZDAd1Ev2ij7IqxcLF7NuW2o5FTJxVqN-NdmFBWVonstXU-NH6HTz9YVDCLmZ4JLzox2oFgfQIP0rY1yIwIr8ZT8MAKYkCAPUY3lKGD3evBWkn0_RAX00ayS5QneFvq-Wb3oENRTaT80bY3Xa-Cyj267-odmBqkuTN31_tUz04aS183B9-wl4RkZeCmVCS47spQqeZW0FEb-mKKC5uQHkToOY0pDreegH9_KuJlhIchjMJEZZIbrLv7zdJlUMpU7BVQq3GUaR8o-a4SdpYS4%3D)
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d23094c72cb64f52b6a91806dbc6c61e&_e=u8Zezjz0jUYNjJa9EDDF2H8-DLgllo1Mq79sUF_wON7RheOlPIjqMm4aSVRVHYVYUokuqrzYzzFzv9t4JNDwh2_14cb2OVjcgAVFGTCA2jyCRxCiDWV76A1O_zoQowkjU0gBDoQPcqcIRJjHSyMeVke290MlB0PWi78uGwX5ypTLcQY_vkeMmZPSn5dnJzLm1qF4Xjqn9Q4oqWGa8hLSmyWnZDAd1Ev2ij7IqxcLF7NuW2o5FTJxVqN-NdmFBWVonstXU-NH6HTz9YVDCLmZ4JLzox2oFgfQIP0rY1yIwIr8ZT8MAKYkCAPUY3lKGD3evBWkn0_RAX00ayS5QneFvqKgv0p1G9OV8_q-CfH-gXqIWcqYPvjqbxvX914F2158Um6PsAmuu0J0QKVk-sWOlOHhz9cUdBFdX_i85y4gBIdMP3xvilNj19KgQUNrzXZnyQ7hvXrO13yjptKb-em8WKjQqB296_JYW3kdTMuWd4A%3D)
What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d23094c72cb64f52b6a91806dbc6c61e&_e=u8Zezjz0jUYNjJa9EDDF2H8-DLgllo1Mq79sUF_wON7RheOlPIjqMm4aSVRVHYVYUokuqrzYzzFzv9t4JNDwh2_14cb2OVjcgAVFGTCA2jyCRxCiDWV76A1O_zoQowkjU0gBDoQPcqcIRJjHSyMeVke290MlB0PWi78uGwX5ypTLcQY_vkeMmZPSn5dnJzLm1qF4Xjqn9Q4oqWGa8hLSmyWnZDAd1Ev2ij7IqxcLF7NuW2o5FTJxVqN-NdmFBWVonstXU-NH6HTz9YVDCLmZ4JLzox2oFgfQIP0rY1yIwIr8ZT8MAKYkCAPUY3lKGD3evBWkn0_RAX00ayS5QneFvlmE_wmAju2EI_gkWE19X7zwvJN4CvUUuqBv_JbivQMxMRDNLxjeFCCKTyw0qoW31G8XhwPvVRIdrYSZsh4gKhkWA5XsUZjbYLygAUhlIKBEjxvvcZHsiGo7jNQK2AJDCdIxWy0u4P5tEJQEHYAt_20%3D)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d59f739a0a874339aa20119d3ab11355&_e=RRWMssebbwfwqrF-CpO6CIQVXoUWwagMHrLcWkjMDampaeMKqC1vmKMe7sAVTCRx65A7Tj2u5RMtrl2R9ks_pT5_iFlCq10jz4Gk9QvQXSYmIT_5HV5Tju4V1cnjAnVbFvQNFmtYFoIpT6_5csfi8GhxBsZulbitrL7nUdCTpPB0EMUhZICqaoMkCMsTJwRe714E_R4ENUNmQ5-f4zTpMdK0scEMAVx6693PrFa611VOBba-AbJiTlB-vwrnOG1w7sMxhvHa_PtJcTQx3GX7AFoJ0YGI_u_FjlxIa-NBJgZkRu-pSrwxuT5J6oefUq43FoTGNVYNdjLKbccNM8L9h_sZtOA8YBpHbnJUAuTox6NaPxKqgcF258I2QMlRVRcTF0S5824t8j4vkC1nM3b9_AfFIEzkjJP4xNyp6Zvjpf4%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d59f739a0a874339aa20119d3ab11355&_e=RRWMssebbwfwqrF-CpO6CIQVXoUWwagMHrLcWkjMDampaeMKqC1vmKMe7sAVTCRx65A7Tj2u5RMtrl2R9ks_pT5_iFlCq10jz4Gk9QvQXSYmIT_5HV5Tju4V1cnjAnVbFvQNFmtYFoIpT6_5csfi8GhxBsZulbitrL7nUdCTpPB0EMUhZICqaoMkCMsTJwRe714E_R4ENUNmQ5-f4zTpMdK0scEMAVx6693PrFa611VOBba-AbJiTlB-vwrnOG1wf7fcF6aGBYK6BJSWUJwvnfXJvMDYw9HyRE1vgAvpJ7NkLGUli6IorliE8cpXKfvU_fF2c2hCBk8Q8pqNfeFzFqirnZEipum2IPZkIP4TrkmmOzKGiPNGm3lBz3LeurQl6rSyd2yN3_6ueN694_Rw3GEh3whv1KGlv_HZTwlrUNo%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d59f739a0a874339aa20119d3ab11355&_e=RRWMssebbwfwqrF-CpO6CIQVXoUWwagMHrLcWkjMDampaeMKqC1vmKMe7sAVTCRx65A7Tj2u5RMtrl2R9ks_pT5_iFlCq10jz4Gk9QvQXSYmIT_5HV5Tju4V1cnjAnVbFvQNFmtYFoIpT6_5csfi8GhxBsZulbitrL7nUdCTpPB0EMUhZICqaoMkCMsTJwRe714E_R4ENUNmQ5-f4zTpMdK0scEMAVx6693PrFa611VOBba-AbJiTlB-vwrnOG1wFKFUCRdGgNXGCTBX1O9cwqRCuhRRkgv_er35WiicK-cRljmHXtVVMfhZjxgr_8S1TQxI778WcdQweGS0yyZ1yEnCN-QYWued0THHYRvSLBKK2TE5Jd_BwyfhSY4VI0U_NLuPKP_2ZyqTDrFUA9V047gS1vOkmuuo1vDw5c9ncLk%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=39b075ec39dd4f04a0c78015c6089130&_e=kOrpjJ56QjS7GZRXOVgLc6akgnuvfVcAhOP_mz8E_zFplI9tNSKxaZgzQzKwwWnUcGEkO6fTz41zn5nVqWHyP8tA75LZC_9DugT0usoNhkGHVu4cmsEiWQ1C3kgEOkHSCuDfpCQPXLlDTYr0d1JeYFp37cAxFBA1QtvkditlZapSKD6OlABbK6IKCibRJE2JYSyqoxS8hWibGnpFKLq3VUuGEkwweNA9DAovzVgcOnPi-H1ZMLtnJPRpK_Dqe9_sUkBV4vEYjFCEgzsx5vaucOihW7Wv1kCE0LMmbFlFKsBCZL5PZnB5tvRAcO7br9RgL9Nd6YWM3psp6_gHZQ87LylIV_WveHt2pSi722rTt3DTBpUh1-aU5Pa1f4LcXTlc0H4idL1L6Ug9QKtpLakca9N7qynBAIhAKUnlfk2QmkM%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=39b075ec39dd4f04a0c78015c6089130&_e=kOrpjJ56QjS7GZRXOVgLc6akgnuvfVcAhOP_mz8E_zFplI9tNSKxaZgzQzKwwWnUcGEkO6fTz41zn5nVqWHyP8tA75LZC_9DugT0usoNhkGHVu4cmsEiWQ1C3kgEOkHSCuDfpCQPXLlDTYr0d1JeYFp37cAxFBA1QtvkditlZapSKD6OlABbK6IKCibRJE2JYSyqoxS8hWibGnpFKLq3VUuGEkwweNA9DAovzVgcOnPi-H1ZMLtnJPRpK_Dqe9_sy2FY3M6Iqfv2PPQzMtL19NzfvfhlW2XqP7ZH3BGYDsjvwEQBS9_5wzTC2l1Ff3r8WIBfmE7JI8aBjhwULzq2wk39RPn6ePLp5oMCr9BMuif1VxDH3HIDH35N1n1aJKTgx0VmEr-9I36zcJmcoauL1sNH2SvrLtaav5qwJAXnneU%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=39b075ec39dd4f04a0c78015c6089130&_e=kOrpjJ56QjS7GZRXOVgLc6akgnuvfVcAhOP_mz8E_zFplI9tNSKxaZgzQzKwwWnUcGEkO6fTz41zn5nVqWHyP8tA75LZC_9DugT0usoNhkGHVu4cmsEiWQ1C3kgEOkHSCuDfpCQPXLlDTYr0d1JeYFp37cAxFBA1QtvkditlZapSKD6OlABbK6IKCibRJE2JYSyqoxS8hWibGnpFKLq3VUuGEkwweNA9DAovzVgcOnPi-H1ZMLtnJPRpK_Dqe9_sMH3O5R-BDxhk_s6bu8URkvvrpvn3g9GtoFzpfEpL_mbrBKZ7bwurAT2kBgVhkM7g1jiVDhtydY-IZXp-5tECPYpC13hngOZ2TZ_jJEa_JWFnb5WRYtN-j8AGkeIgnvp3P_U-CsNSb8aTEpBAmJiz9Arxy8DwqL1oSjKyfkCa5q4%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_oYkvV4JbX7Dj6nlw1XGPQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTbcqP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1VQ04tMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWohGWtlPAeHHVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_oYkvV4JbX7Dj6nlw1XGPQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTbcqP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1VQ04tMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWohGWtlPAeHHVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_oYkvV4JbX7Dj6nlw1XGPQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTbcqP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1VQ04tMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWohGWtlPAeHHVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

US Conservative Network
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/f9HxdWCRssWcJhk1URniHw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTbcqP0RfaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQudXNjb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVuZXR3b3JrLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1EYWlseS1BbGVydHMmZT1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTI1NDBnbWFpbC5jb21XA3NwY0IKZWohGWtlPAeHHVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4Cn3cTw6fUXG8pUUQUOypQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTbcqP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly91c2NvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZW5ldHdvcmsuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplaiEZa2U8B4cdUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Majority Whip Tom Emmer
subject: Just checking in!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I want to know who...
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
|
---
| | |
Hi Friend!

It's Majority Whip Tom Emmer here. I just got off the phone with House Republicans HQ.

**The good news is** \- House Republicans just released the 2024 Voter Canvass to find out who our voters really are!

**The bad news is** \- we don't have your response yet!

---
| | | [COMPLETE MY 2024 VOTER CANVASS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/C6Us1x2UVyAOFoIpytFtPQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTcRoP0TUaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3QudGhlbnJjYy5vcmcvdm90ZXItY2FudmFzcy1lbW1lci8_YW1vdW50PTM1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEzMF9XRy1ST04yLjExMjI0Ml90MTQxODkzNy01NzMmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMxMTMwX1dHLVJPTjIuMTEyMjQyX3QxNDE4OTM3LTU3MyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD10di1yb24tMjAyMzEyMDImeHVudj10di1yb24tMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWpoGWtlT6OsvlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "Generic Button")
---

I'm reaching and asking you to **[take just 60 seconds to respond to the Official 2024 House GOP Voter Canvass.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/C6Us1x2UVyAOFoIpytFtPQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTcRoP0TUaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3QudGhlbnJjYy5vcmcvdm90ZXItY2FudmFzcy1lbW1lci8_YW1vdW50PTM1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEzMF9XRy1ST04yLjExMjI0Ml90MTQxODkzNy01NzMmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMxMTMwX1dHLVJPTjIuMTEyMjQyX3QxNDE4OTM3LTU3MyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD10di1yb24tMjAyMzEyMDImeHVudj10di1yb24tMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWpoGWtlT6OsvlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "take just 60 seconds to respond to the Official 2024 House GOP Voter Canvass. ")**

We deeply value hearing from our strongest supporters such as yourself. That's why I was shocked to learn you hadn't completed it yet!

It's a short, four question form that gives us at House Republicans HQ an opportunity to understand just a little more about all of our voters.

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/C6Us1x2UVyAOFoIpytFtPQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTcRoP0TUaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3QudGhlbnJjYy5vcmcvdm90ZXItY2FudmFzcy1lbW1lci8_YW1vdW50PTM1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEzMF9XRy1ST04yLjExMjI0Ml90MTQxODkzNy01NzMmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMxMTMwX1dHLVJPTjIuMTEyMjQyX3QxNDE4OTM3LTU3MyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD10di1yb24tMjAyMzEyMDImeHVudj10di1yb24tMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWpoGWtlT6OsvlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---

2024 is a big year for Republicans around the country so your response will be extremely important to our success.

---
| | | [COMPLETE MY VOTER CANVASS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/C6Us1x2UVyAOFoIpytFtPQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTcRoP0TUaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3QudGhlbnJjYy5vcmcvdm90ZXItY2FudmFzcy1lbW1lci8_YW1vdW50PTM1JnJlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEzMF9XRy1ST04yLjExMjI0Ml90MTQxODkzNy01NzMmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMxMTMwX1dHLVJPTjIuMTEyMjQyX3QxNDE4OTM3LTU3MyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD10di1yb24tMjAyMzEyMDImeHVudj10di1yb24tMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWpoGWtlT6OsvlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "Generic Button")
---

Thank you so much for prioritizing this quick survey. I look forward to seeing your response!

Tom Emmer

**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they think they are still big and ugly. However, Marco and Paul wanted to change this perception with a **revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens.**

But now, a **game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry** , and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's called **Horizon by hear.com.**

And it's the perfect solution at the perfect time--when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It's no wonder **Horizon has taken the U.S. by storm since its release in early 2023** , offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f880f3bfa4f242f984751d145fc61506&_e=0NAssgpKLK-D7VRODIgMMkXv21qWJipgkJfv8bxTpkx7qLn-ZC555YNdIxWfLuwL7wiOE4j0lDY8cKfO3vSC0BTnsHzD2xvvTLNpGr3iJGCJfzT_9BzEEAYzOJ7qvEV0N2g-m3xP3G2ftuSg7m4J2fZ-m5f3ThKthbjmCCAyAO-jxB3kaLSYK20oKuxGQXiW49YgFzCgvOFBsfhmUQk_gPZbGDD83Rh7ImdK9oJr4HiYxstSLScKVunYjRZjdAf2q6vf3D7Z-ThkCDoMehEGuLZOIR0qATbmtLjepFcosLYUwse-ASlPOCilMFr45DOaSCB4ymwkerHDfOQYDiRpkXyxThpm7ONR_m6a4-hqQ_s5QPOz3IxaDrixyms1JHHlBqAnJZfcFt9sFWcNj6gGWR-Afqq8XwEzvgQ1kiY7G9RUg5-1FMXoGnTfrdPvMNk1G8IOx0kfob7MG6kbjkd56VGViWN4cq8Nk_N7PZoOME4%3D)
[ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f880f3bfa4f242f984751d145fc61506&_e=0NAssgpKLK-D7VRODIgMMkXv21qWJipgkJfv8bxTpkx7qLn-ZC555YNdIxWfLuwL7wiOE4j0lDY8cKfO3vSC0BTnsHzD2xvvTLNpGr3iJGCJfzT_9BzEEAYzOJ7qvEV0N2g-m3xP3G2ftuSg7m4J2fZ-m5f3ThKthbjmCCAyAO-jxB3kaLSYK20oKuxGQXiW49YgFzCgvOFBsfhmUQk_gPZbGDD83Rh7ImdK9oJr4HiYxstSLScKVunYjRZjdAf2q6vf3D7Z-ThkCDoMehEGuLZOIR0qATbmtLjepFcosLYUwse-ASlPOCilMFr45DOaSCB4ymwkerHDfOQYDiRpkVjxWz3FY0pEkrfim9y7bi1HOV6LjHWj7cn0igwc0112Do50UOdOT6TGkYd481ZtFliB042YBke3QvW-rrwC2LZ0oc_ieNsXkUxLLP02KjnThsScYDmdAOZ14t43vcm-QAYOmRuf49k8yruaIMU4y_A%3D)
What makes Horizon so special?

It's one of **the world 's first hearing aids with dual processing.**

With Horizon, they can. **Imagine effortless hearing in every situation** --restaurants, weddings, block parties, and beyond. Imagine being able to **understand every word clearly** with a device so small and comfortable, you'll completely forget you're wearing it.

This means that Horizon offers all of the usual benefits of a modern hearing aid--from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming--with the added bonus of something completely new: it can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

"It's not just about volume," explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. "It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what Horizon is designed to optimize."

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity --and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don't wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f880f3bfa4f242f984751d145fc61506&_e=0NAssgpKLK-D7VRODIgMMkXv21qWJipgkJfv8bxTpkx7qLn-ZC555YNdIxWfLuwL7wiOE4j0lDY8cKfO3vSC0BTnsHzD2xvvTLNpGr3iJGCJfzT_9BzEEAYzOJ7qvEV0N2g-m3xP3G2ftuSg7m4J2fZ-m5f3ThKthbjmCCAyAO-jxB3kaLSYK20oKuxGQXiW49YgFzCgvOFBsfhmUQk_gPZbGDD83Rh7ImdK9oJr4HiYxstSLScKVunYjRZjdAf2q6vf3D7Z-ThkCDoMehEGuLZOIR0qATbmtLjepFcosLYUwse-ASlPOCilMFr45DOaSCB4ymwkerHDfOQYDiRpkU20M4mMn6_id5EH1IP320pzssl2VssLGXkPpqTsqRy-49mdQAOP2RQxWFEey5xFz9yt4qpNHZc4UFiioMv0yT_j6rImDvOg9rGfj6HPVEq97VZANir1fA8BbwsM8Q9FA7jWM3yQtA7O3_t99Jnh_rY%3D)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce51edaec7d64a91a19a6b91b98bb715&_e=a1xZXaZEN5OEY6UcL4wihnbG07r4PDSkUCWIgW5UuM-6q__6F-ChLRSRjmOUibEuWN2116vZ-YE4IS74G3-J1Xlhmte5_wEmiXqgb84Mlzv12ElKXLDhL7nm4_s2l3Ja1Kx88FdDiS6plBnMW-ORIbsO3j1KY_KLyLoPrliEnE0oT0VAKRNqx8To04g-HRxqlZLMHnioOpTyYmxkD_RJwoj1WWlRLsjbmFe2PNpDioeNZthv6er0UvyGlxrld9qtdGwF6zcoTU4Ew5oq128gvDG3DIGgpCAfPGwTadjK7LBgSwTXk9I8hMeR8HtgRfSD) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce51edaec7d64a91a19a6b91b98bb715&_e=a1xZXaZEN5OEY6UcL4wihnbG07r4PDSkUCWIgW5UuM-6q__6F-ChLRSRjmOUibEuWN2116vZ-YE4IS74G3-J1Xlhmte5_wEmiXqgb84Mlzv12ElKXLDhL7nm4_s2l3Ja1Kx88FdDiS6plBnMW-ORIWfl1WZcVdWmTOPJ7QTK5gwMzaP3k3NeV5iKA8m-0VDzJhuTZ0HAh_E_R0a563Grgg_XSUwVw3d7sWCNcd8REGyw2_NQPuMD2ZatPf7v_TF6yGmqirUA7pco1GbYmVYsveSRJuQL1CG4W_IEsHt6bLbJpasmkHdt1IajQ3uZphJG) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce51edaec7d64a91a19a6b91b98bb715&_e=a1xZXaZEN5OEY6UcL4wihnbG07r4PDSkUCWIgW5UuM-6q__6F-ChLRSRjmOUibEuWN2116vZ-YE4IS74G3-J1Xlhmte5_wEmiXqgb84Mlzv12ElKXLDhL7nm4_s2l3Ja1Kx88FdDiS6plBnMW-ORIa0W8W-cCkvX_9HoyKwcCe0BZ8vEsE98_sUu3Ldwkea-oTs1Z_Rdx2o3ZDeg7EtoZ_9Re88T9RexPSqHqbHlUZagkDt1thABXt3FlnqMli6SqSoS84Sp4zmgCeEEtWisBxvhwltvsa43C2015s_abUEB-1D6l7c_erBcW8eGPUiN). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce51edaec7d64a91a19a6b91b98bb715&_e=a1xZXaZEN5OEY6UcL4wihnbG07r4PDSkUCWIgW5UuM-6q__6F-ChLRSRjmOUibEuWN2116vZ-YE4IS74G3-J1Xlhmte5_wEmiXqgb84Mlzv12ElKXLDhL7nm4_s2l3Ja1Kx88FdDiS6plBnMW-ORISOvI0P4SHD8rTgKqJTPV-_7fpkTd80i2VVryOEqtLYDHIQStAv2xjMUfvufqa_Tk-VM-9FdtoRblF23-d8mNmTXJ-bteiBiXwvyQTaiCSXMpMuN1M-v4VmmMp5deTqpHy7cbUvCJQ2tl_4vqI2STWtDiBs2J78WMnKQFyzA-Yk8)

clean_body: Solar generators are a smart choice FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here's what we're up against.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41a9275e9b2345c0b2276dc74a299ed9&_e=z8ECtfpL0t5Ig3Amv_zt54E47nDc4F5OOkvAVgJ6TGCbi4StdxVuASkb-gVcoRiEKQuc9o-npKilVOewb9l3NVHq7Rh_u9yVfmfc8RCFP61cLmJGK8RXbWbfSm9xZ99oISQiHluEyJrW2UYzzkhrgXhSsqvDyVKRxBGTDS5pec-IRm57AL3gXHEMI7AAD69B3P8NWOo333DeGfZrGnRB-lC3dKrUt9wDY1UA8xZVI8D5EGD_PApawr15MmWWzjew "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41a9275e9b2345c0b2276dc74a299ed9&_e=z8ECtfpL0t5Ig3Amv_zt54E47nDc4F5OOkvAVgJ6TGCbi4StdxVuASkb-gVcoRiEKQuc9o-npKilVOewb9l3NVHq7Rh_u9yVfmfc8RCFP637ikYsIeg97EWR9oPd9K0SY5E4HzQST57gNVUrzfMtR8fLFyNK-VbL3N_Uoyb7XmUYS_3lQzC03rszzVJ-wZvZjyY0JyQJhrkA6H1XpmZe13YuL9Jcu4en-Wb4n3uPUoQrQwfJ9o7S9Brh2fyoopxB)[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41a9275e9b2345c0b2276dc74a299ed9&_e=z8ECtfpL0t5Ig3Amv_zt54E47nDc4F5OOkvAVgJ6TGCbi4StdxVuASkb-gVcoRiEKQuc9o-npKilVOewb9l3NVHq7Rh_u9yVfmfc8RCFP622z3v9pSNrqdUGfarri5PBqGVulq6Mlz4-bKaV5MC5-hbbu_D1Kbt76ZvwqMLby_T3GRYmb_WNlRcFbjGIRVAwdGtDCV0JcFHhwRsMhmws72blxLVFJJdigMELwhdkGsrW9DRyDWKIenX5-queO5mc)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41a9275e9b2345c0b2276dc74a299ed9&_e=z8ECtfpL0t5Ig3Amv_zt54E47nDc4F5OOkvAVgJ6TGCbi4StdxVuASkb-gVcoRiEKQuc9o-npKilVOewb9l3NVHq7Rh_u9yVfmfc8RCFP61e21uqqq8ZhBTdCgIm3F6Wk9AmLZ5SN0YLPGK9RBVh4b33QzdOTg9etduXuHMgbmjO0UGxK-XnLZdveE-KDsdKnQJ-a8iwCathMrPK31AeztwEV3qRIwzWRR_knOJsA3wWcmg-74Qma4UBPKiQ9px6)

[Donate](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41a9275e9b2345c0b2276dc74a299ed9&_e=z8ECtfpL0t5Ig3Amv_zt54E47nDc4F5OOkvAVgJ6TGCbi4StdxVuASkb-gVcoRiEKQuc9o-npKilVOewb9l3NVHq7Rh_u9yVfmfc8RCFP632NNh8KzKOuiIVjHPlRO9_VnPZ8_caSHV40cScVSARQibyW_YDf3PZqzRH1NKwDHIwAWcXHlaDMbaDg4m5fwIQRIxD4cpRtjRAl1p6ILM6d3rkoCkZL3IXWAisUuJlST8heXAs5enHzgfReFMUUplj)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, have you seen the news? When I launched my campaign for president, I was seen as an underdog. I was underestimated time and time again - but now, the tide is turning. Our momentum has never been higher. I surged to be tied for SECOND in Iowa. I rose to SECOND in New Hampshire. I rose to SECOND in South Carolina. I am CRUSHING Joe Biden in the national polls. And, I was declared the WINNER of the third presidential debate! We areRISING to the top, and it's all thanks to people like you who have stepped up and supported my campaign. While this is all great news, we've got to continue to keep our heads down, work hard, and earn every vote in order to win. That's why I need your help today. "Will you chip in $20.24 right now to help me fund my campaign and spread my message far and wide?" | | The bottom line is: The polls and the momentum coming off of the last debate are a great reflection of the progress our campaign is making AND how YOUR support can make a major difference in this race. But, we CANNOT let this get in the way of us continuing to outwork everyone around us so we can get our message out and win! "That’s why I’m asking you to step up with a generous donation of $20.24 or more today to keep the momentum surging and take one step closer to VICTORY." Every moment and every dollar counts. Everything we do gets us one step closer to victory. With first votes taking place in less than 2 months, we can't lose sight of what's left to accomplish. "Will you pitch in today to help me get my message out to every American and win the fight for our country’s future?" My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf.
