name: Kash Patel
subject: Truth about January 6
body:
The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public showing an entirely different story to the lies they told.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e87b695631843ebbc09fa4e1c86e34c&_e=R2cFgE7KdsbvORrxcJGAMLYfpkf4HlKtFHpSl1bDoirzMYeozVrxk-XhAaeIsdivVbFXuWDn2om3dtjqhihzNxyMsk4mf7D5nXS9ByH51J7RiPEDtNPhMoiB50n6dmnM5MvgDEInkYczQmX7zY4iw3g1KkDt6InUmOdNFf5i8laA1gZk46yd6Af4rix8m3mYJ1GoLV35axQsRXkXlWZEWLqvXIrzzULoTyCRl1bKdIJ6BkoeoTAoZTH0xtiodmZ7 "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi lied about January 6.

Liz Chaney lied about January 6.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public showing an entirely different story to the lies they told.

Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here's how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e87b695631843ebbc09fa4e1c86e34c&_e=R2cFgE7KdsbvORrxcJGAMLYfpkf4HlKtFHpSl1bDoirzMYeozVrxk-XhAaeIsdivVbFXuWDn2om3dtjqhihzNxyMsk4mf7D5nXS9ByH51J4viIqFjmVjUjxKfX-_XBB5lnJshsGL7b6H-MZoX8RfHgBclHPyBNue_mRydo-5WPclpG2Q-pKyyzJf1c7-stmpSNGe3tCATNw4vNeTF4t63TANw7jTpyPZxwlsQgsE-pMu9Kra9LNGFzOzxfauG-gu "Donate")

Here's why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e87b695631843ebbc09fa4e1c86e34c&_e=R2cFgE7KdsbvORrxcJGAMLYfpkf4HlKtFHpSl1bDoirzMYeozVrxk-XhAaeIsdivVbFXuWDn2om3dtjqhihzNxyMsk4mf7D5nXS9ByH51J7mpyn73sKER8aSiQcqc6_pubHQxmFJT_850DyJzHXeiWbFcE6tXIun1uwyKbtdPBOYYBRVKntm0fvbn0CzCNXLkODEWKTPmy3P_eXP31l5OwaTlBWX58XhNy1FP1KaeIVJ9ETDNbmAPJ-6edsZwJS2)

[Donate >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e87b695631843ebbc09fa4e1c86e34c&_e=R2cFgE7KdsbvORrxcJGAMLYfpkf4HlKtFHpSl1bDoirzMYeozVrxk-XhAaeIsdivVbFXuWDn2om3dtjqhihzNxyMsk4mf7D5nXS9ByH51J4IMMvz4-D4JCvYXoJta9rI88KUXVqVTQCIOS2Xpba-P_uibJADkPLz2jhWvj8OXHmiAsBaIviVieWxlWlbo6-u5l9uldx73B-IjqoBEb0Jek4OVb-peRVB8iYuaI2YU-VgCxicYoiB2CMXixsh0CyZ)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It's time to fight back.

**Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. **

[Donate $10 >>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e87b695631843ebbc09fa4e1c86e34c&_e=R2cFgE7KdsbvORrxcJGAMLYfpkf4HlKtFHpSl1bDoirzMYeozVrxk-XhAaeIsdivVbFXuWDn2om3dtjqhihzN0gTGuFYIUahGog57dVFuGEOKiFgd0W9qY-pcSus4Zj6D04ehaHY8lUBMXOfpphheV8rbAYPhANqF0GwA_5s6xiDB3CU0V3OTxTraPP1QqXx4qaNbSR7J-lHMUC7FvY5C7DnCOONqzpRhY-RGLiqegqxgMwB_uwPr4ZP-4F5erlvB6L-N2wJ5-tOBOtY5HFWdw%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Why school choice is constitutional
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571403?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**A recent article in Mississippi Today claimed that the Mississippi Constitution precluded the possibility of school choice in our state.** Others have made similar claims.

**Watch Aaron Rice of the Mississippi Justice Institute explain why this is not the case.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ab4a9b54c4&e=5703353baa)
---
| During Covid, the Mississippi legislature authorized a state agency to distribute about $10 million of federal Covid relief funds to private schools for infrastructure improvements. The decision has been challenges by an activist group who argue that Section 208 made such payments unconstitutional.

Even if our state Supreme Court rules that the provision of $10 million in federal relief funds to private schools was unconstitutional, that decision would not prevent Mississippi from enacting school choice programs, including those available to families using non-public schools.

**The Mississippi Constitution only prohibits the appropriation of state education dollars for _institutional_ aid to non-public schools. It does not prevent the state from providing _individual_ aid to students who choose to use those funds for tuition at non-public schools.** Indeed, to avoid future confusion on that point, our legal division, the Mississippi Justice Institute, asked the Court to explicitly say so in its ruling.

**Citing the constitution must not be an excuse not to do school choice. It certainly is not a credible reason.**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2b20cabc94&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=078ee43024) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=078ee43024).

name: American Update
subject: Over 90% Of Gender Studies Majors At Ivy League University Received As
body:
And US To Hand Billions To United Nations’ ‘Green Climate Fund’ For Poor Countries

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685332%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QTdwwAS%2bPw8pMdUAJIsiXQ&sysid=1 Over 90% Of Gender Studies Majors At Ivy League University Received As

An Ivy League report revealed that over 90% of women and gender studies majors receive A grades, according to Yale Daily News. The proportion of students receiving As at Yale University rose from 67% in the 2010-2011 school year to 79% in the 2022-2023 school year, according to Yale Daily News.

See It Here https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685332%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QTdwwAS%2bPw8pMdUAJIsiXQ&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685333%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yyRdLcczrW8TAZVlf3aU3w&sysid=1 US To Hand Billions To United Nations’ ‘Green Climate Fund’ For Poor Countries

President Joe Biden’s administration is committing an additional $3 billion to help developing countries fight climate change, the White House announced Saturday. The allotment will go toward the United Nations’ Green Climate Fund and will be pledged by Vice President Kamala Harris at the COP28 summit in Dubai, according to the White House.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685333%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yyRdLcczrW8TAZVlf3aU3w&sysid=1

body:
Solar generators are a smart choice

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a55a19f2abb44cdbe04573e5a0d72eb&_e=zVwjMmd0z790KVQ96Nq2d8NMbI0uFDptjnJbS627kvlvGHLBVpAh9vyVljVsi0zwg0Ae-QdZ0aKl1KGNGOgTjunX0O4NF-zXqI4R4zKlDX-GPO2J7edZtBVeWXbGPhzT5BNWfVAVknc-k41H_vIdwrEEVwylv6jEqd_TpEP3YPRlE9H_bDjnXqHimI6E096bWVT7O0-XF-IXr-BsyG18vDua33jP8CdC6AZSCgNfqJxMugO0XFRtC1zEmQoWYDfYI-EBcCMyXbObjf3WsoisdOERaWgRIJ74gGZMm0TM6f0NZ-2uGTXLwKUbHokmRFAg) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a55a19f2abb44cdbe04573e5a0d72eb&_e=zVwjMmd0z790KVQ96Nq2d8NMbI0uFDptjnJbS627kvlvGHLBVpAh9vyVljVsi0zwg0Ae-QdZ0aKl1KGNGOgTjunX0O4NF-zXqI4R4zKlDX-GPO2J7edZtBVeWXbGPhzT5BNWfVAVknc-k41H_vIdwiiE3gekxjUhlI-w0sByOJnfQxCQIBM9DdeA6IuNzB_Aos9QICazn4LWnuutjMBUIHmQKy4uruz9gXYbfdp9VdaMXfm2BYLvVokwWS5MsucEev3bxMzEBeY9A9UxuYeE-10f4mKM4Lfj9pVfM1T-3bdQzctOtIny3ByuVqFDMCE8) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a55a19f2abb44cdbe04573e5a0d72eb&_e=zVwjMmd0z790KVQ96Nq2d8NMbI0uFDptjnJbS627kvlvGHLBVpAh9vyVljVsi0zwg0Ae-QdZ0aKl1KGNGOgTjunX0O4NF-zXqI4R4zKlDX-GPO2J7edZtBVeWXbGPhzT5BNWfVAVknc-k41H_vIdwr8yhzaxBpp3LmMArrGV2qvs22qHNoim1uCa0Nw7k6Sh0uZ0INo4o7FrZsPtpmzSO758V2W4FWGfW-g6ODMslv77QgvfjuirwWHqb8LITJ8SrxGo2ciMBfEmSWXwqrWjarEwjLsV9CRvEn0nz3R4xo2HWaJhzhAIKAXWjpM68psT). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1a55a19f2abb44cdbe04573e5a0d72eb&_e=zVwjMmd0z790KVQ96Nq2d8NMbI0uFDptjnJbS627kvlvGHLBVpAh9vyVljVsi0zwg0Ae-QdZ0aKl1KGNGOgTjunX0O4NF-zXqI4R4zKlDX-GPO2J7edZtBVeWXbGPhzT5BNWfVAVknc-k41H_vIdwgpQP031JWI73C3WgGm78f6d4NowqCui13qezZFXqMNymya75Dc7RKu1YWlIpoXFVcgfA4rYoALp_tdbsvuh7LDqzat0_zkEEMFpqtD86Qe1Ml0oMTw2jghb1Lom8bEYPO8CvZlPtnL9FhZnIhXcznC4MUyqO4WqPWbvs0Gj9eab)

FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. body:
In the Biden Family
|

---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b7a3ae67f9754b8b9a20b9f2aa8cb095&_e=HsrpmW85KNDalMEnSWa4vSrlF8gv-TweRc5qNzinejofaEj6TLUVTiysEDWnYxoEb9ZuwdMQ9CxYPbnBVDhepWfqpEIbpbsjGlOZsTpu0S3SRuCOtj9qPjK5aqVNwoBM7QCkvnXW0-DY9Id00IWtIhlnIA06jYJWh2k49CSOz2WPUzI8eg3biJbMckiUEd8w_6QwRQvrJJUeLfOejU9ZSCirlpPUW5BChj8K_RyWaAEmreQrVJkBIPdRDx-YaNrsC-kpZc5V_g4XCo-WrKH8G6KOYMY1aQSdEgbveawF6_77cxsVDAR5jSn8LrY3HDfVpLB1Qr_lwtJkMlrC0c-PjvqUEWmGCokHFsLZ-teE4NNCYfNJcR47BAzE-_HdHZrt)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b7a3ae67f9754b8b9a20b9f2aa8cb095&_e=HsrpmW85KNDalMEnSWa4vSrlF8gv-TweRc5qNzinejofaEj6TLUVTiysEDWnYxoEb9ZuwdMQ9CxYPbnBVDhepWfqpEIbpbsjGlOZsTpu0S3SRuCOtj9qPjK5aqVNwoBM7QCkvnXW0-DY9Id00IWtIhlnIA06jYJWh2k49CSOz2WPUzI8eg3biJbMckiUEd8w_6QwRQvrJJUeLfOejU9ZSCirlpPUW5BChj8K_RyWaAEhOm27CG_w3AyUYY4txKPclWCGTZlpnAFv_NOw2KcphoUIu6ksuoiKs6yaOZzZp9agDBQ6qIaK1HHxa0DoTGf_yRMx9KUHerosvoepXdk4E1F7KKcpeg174u8CUFvnUg6G0WY2FVTTiqy1CIJGngN3)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=b7a3ae67f9754b8b9a20b9f2aa8cb095&_e=HsrpmW85KNDalMEnSWa4vSrlF8gv-TweRc5qNzinejofaEj6TLUVTiysEDWnYxoEb9ZuwdMQ9CxYPbnBVDhepWfqpEIbpbsjGlOZsTpu0S3SRuCOtj9qPjK5aqVNwoBM7QCkvnXW0-DY9Id00IWtIhlnIA06jYJWh2k49CSOz2WPUzI8eg3biJbMckiUEd8w_6QwRQvrJJUeLfOejU9ZSCirlpPUW5BChj8K_RyWaAHSBnuM9OwEr-LSYxnYyWRA0Y1mCkFSPiayyUcxzEcFBISxvbk_ZDQe2Rr7E1-RCbbuzsruNkGGg5-MOi6fsgLPLe0whF9BfjXrA8fFyimYAk4zaHpc_WRG7HvFmYd31jlj4_sRxkOvKLcntpcK1xcv)

I hate to reach out on the weekend, but this couldn’t wait.
| | |

Hey folks,
I hate to reach out on the weekend, but this couldn’t wait.
Republicans are already attacking me on TV — a full six months earlier than in the last election. **That means we need even more resources at this moment to respond.**
We’re proudly funded by tens of thousands of grassroots supporters chipping in a few bucks when they can. We immediately put these dollars to work mobilizing supporters, registering Montanans to vote, and fighting back against Mitch McConnell’s misleading attacks. If we want to keep pace in this ultra-competitive race, we have to catch up now.
**Asking for money is my least favorite part of****the job — just ask my team. But I know it’s essential to winning this race and continuing to work on the issues that really matter. So I hope you’ll bear with me when I ask:**
**[Can you chip in any amount that feels right to you today to help us hit our goal? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell. body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8cthNdt5TyraAJNUm3hs32sYUQwWz2Mzf0rVXGQergq2KGKMJZGI-3ewaw54CABvX5-T_qfIytGY2wAgaWrY7CswHgEMfO1zEV16LpgIUd7nv58gW4uISBMVG4IDUamaq4s7nuXG6p_5RqUvHy3-ee2JAhfjSEgrLwBOAoyCT4QHqF7QZoQyk5eCUG6mjnZzsTTfXPsEEwfE8BYE3Rbh78NdMHgvzdZI7sXw8NLCqd8srG3TjSuhSzMYsHzA-xMBK8zvbmXkYT9CiEEx0DxOauwG70TQJSpKtHYsnfb5gVUfka57qeWKqxa5dIKA49NlLf--F9MugPivwBnhhBeJ3EgkFwqNaMrcPGt0sgbXLS7X/41s/6DILJSnvRoOKC2Bz85X8fw/h0/nALQMHJtt8ejzV13gf9MP0EVLLnXSfvarIqYoi7P9gI)
| | Peter,

Here’s the rundown: John Whitmire and TCP-endorsed Sheila Jackson Lee ran for mayor of Houston earlier this month. Neither candidate received enough votes to take home the seat, so now there’s a runoff election on December 9th to determine Houston’s next mayor.

**We _need_ that runoff to give us a progressive mayor whose priority is the well-being of all Houstonians. _And Sheila Jackson Lee is the person for the job_ — **[Peter, will you help us elect Sheila Jackson Lee to office by chipping in $10 today?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRct0wTpiBV2DY6Oz846aOQs-lIfMwx8B1QQg8OiXp8g97f8ENGwpsg26JEFmVF05VAkRpgZEVgkdaK_3GU-nBMzUtBu6ehig0AVPqE0NkuZcdTuoZ5WzGJO9esxhgdnBb8ONP9Ofkm-gk3vbVAdfr68saRup16zB1IHb77HoMsoBDEdPqLhujlvFoggUc6LZDHoXJQlWsHtsNb7DLC7dnIKPkzLuuPqCf3tpeHmBA6xOyLs9QMnG0IBDNyHsTC587XTRovJ0Byr9ug8_w4kiNUgwfDsXgmsJ9bOzstOs1iYvf5uNnw_upd8VnC_PFmhCtvZ0cEZ08-_5_buumORggbs5HatdSKHqLLx-lTAfzXOjraMQkZGr71m_Nz3yyFRSikWdwfiZjVt4YaknMzLl_-A/41s/6DILJSnvRoOKC2Bz85X8fw/h1/2uyzd_8mHh3bPpOJGhklCr9rUcabLmutINqK5BQ-2sk) | | [LET'S DO IT!](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRo1_VQFLGg3Go52Wf05MtdGv8d_YW39BLFVaxyRaZVixu_McIcVIEUeEol6lhLWHIsIcZpX-aJ4DB0WTQFyvRK7IElvvCSwYYXTEkB9ZCJal7OyfWCbFKUZsAs8j2TTRLgyiyqHhJ0ShMP2P7ab7XNo9NGi0qLLGbQqeeIecBFpm_yILUQpSxP-yFeEk9_VbjodcG-HkA4G8xZp0E-U73YvK7o5H9UFQfufArcKbvmUl3AyXtTqAbuFHMGEhgxHoyYmejRZEKJY-LC51B33Idxw9YZavRQqfUlmmpt73qGmtjx0XAbjW1atcQXO1pkXvv2914NsBlfKLiMTtH-0b8ci2PrmofmwJi1f6osSQc4fYcH9BT-gSQV66Fdz7kPz9iu_2f-gsfTU-AuTy5hhX3CQXyEoc3Eb_T7VVXs4nK_W8/41s/6DILJSnvRoOKC2Bz85X8fw/h2/FjCPlcGxeyW_A5F4YIYd9rp80AUDxM6fwsLSYemTX9Q)
---
In a country where the number of Black residents far exceeds the number of Black leaders who represent them, we must elect more Black leaders like Sheila Jackson Lee into office. [And on December 9th, we have a chance to help make that happen.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRct0wTpiBV2DY6Oz846aOQs-lIfMwx8B1QQg8OiXp8g97f8ENGwpsg26JEFmVF05VAkRpgZEVgkdaK_3GU-nBMzUtBu6ehig0AVPqE0NkuZcdTuoZ5WzGJO9esxhgdnBbQVNsBGq_NNYTx8Eie4464SY4PfiynARR4THplZWq1HOWaBSdx82JikQySRgf3hRQI2-GYbWlvYon1zJruVdxFnNt8qPLbAaxQl-XOZgVm5V_BEr0lp5MY8jqZFMMJO_FBNrZJWNeKcuPRZrgOsEJn72X7pXdfhpK8O_dYV8IJb3KNv1WmkIbFvSgiYKV8g6lbKgN5QdJUs31ppTIVlMOnZ9IOWoYIZZ0C93bvWoUTz82_3G8LH9yjuemC6HoR4TFBTH7JArP82V3_-byNidbQw/41s/6DILJSnvRoOKC2Bz85X8fw/h3/9vcRwuFPEDYc2fmYv4LjLXPZFdDbirAEjNJDswNn1a4)

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRct0wTpiBV2DY6Oz846aOQs-lIfMwx8B1QQg8OiXp8g97f8ENGwpsg26JEFmVF05VAkRpgZEVgkdaK_3GU-nBMzUtBu6ehig0AVPqE0NkuZcdTuoZ5WzGJO9esxhgdnBbb2dILlmH-2KLN0qju3b8xJ99cBzTYENApqtWLuUmXQAc2KTXDWmsReXTz8OnBbFNoF-YUHFrAswyqborhK14vR0ExUunbUsyNxARxEHrgeZT-sydNM7SCTCEZxtLRb9Sku_tw8yviIdky2bkY2WniAKeh9PUTePY5fzpsAhhbagBYiStvx4w2WjKAWnzR2DrnhZx2Y5I8b2zWIVBchWC6MVrz5RCYRpTNNjn-bPJ_Rrf14E7WoHQPjX3qwQ8AJPwZNbBZNkxSKgM4qtUiqVVtg/41s/6DILJSnvRoOKC2Bz85X8fw/h4/MJEnte2Mcn15fm5MekX1GqGhyD5jJidddTbsvX7cB-I)
Not only is Sheila Jackson Lee what Houston needs, but **her opponent, John Whitmire, is what Houston does _not_ need.**

Whitmire claims to be a Democrat, but he’s had his fair share of Republican stances: in May of this year, he voted in favor of implementing tax cuts for fossil fuel companies while _excluding_ renewable energy companies from these same benefits.

He has also expressed wanting more police and harsher sentences in an attempt to curb crime in Houston. **But as research has shown, senselessly punitive law enforcement is _not_ what stops crime. Rather, criminal justice reform is the key to creating a safer Houston for our families and communities.**

Sheila Jackson Lee knows that enabling climate change and supporting a more severe and expensive criminal justice system — along with many of Whitmire’s other questionable policy choices — are not what’s best for the people of Houston.

[So, Peter, will you contribute $10 today so we can get Sheila Jackson Lee into office and prevent a quasi-Republican from leading Houston?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRct0wTpiBV2DY6Oz846aOQs-lIfMwx8B1QQg8OiXp8g97f8ENGwpsg26JEFmVF05VAkRpgZEVgkdaK_3GU-nBMzUtBu6ehig0AVPqE0NkuZcdTuoZ5WzGJO9esxhgdnBbb2x5C6YBw3F6_UltMlcYJpDV4nQNhmIy5fhAP4-BHfX_2bUBr-w8VNSpqEW1Id2MyeJA9GMzUrkijMowjSpfTQItS9BUySyhWhUKICESvn82qj8uWismGzFmYrPX69FwnVbTxi2XZCCxUTyYJJAA6QhReOCCJiZ0G11PKv7xpaVZ3FnB3fuUQc-c77uqIlNYjcGjcIVmB3d4cV9bx4Phnm6kfJ3kneAxI5nHD7PUzJNQHv23nPCkjM9ETYDYZVysqaVuKbDfdHDVSV2A93d3cA/41s/6DILJSnvRoOKC2Bz85X8fw/h5/wTd294Xh-HMkLdZlZikawFV_Kq3kjLbR5jr0cEuITo8)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, Here’s the rundown: John Whitmire and TCP-endorsed Sheila Jackson Lee ran for mayor of Houston earlier this month. Neither candidate received enough votes to take home the seat, so now there’s a runoff election on December 9th to determine Houston’s next mayor. We need that runoff to give us a progressive mayor whose priority is the well-being of all Houstonians. And Sheila Jackson Lee is the person for the job — | | In a country where the number of Black residents far exceeds the number of Black leaders who represent them, we must elect more Black leaders like Sheila Jackson Lee into office. Not only is Sheila Jackson Lee what Houston needs, but her opponent, John Whitmire, is what Houston does not need. Whitmire claims to be a Democrat, but he’s had his fair share of Republican stances: in May of this year, he voted in favor of implementing tax cuts for fossil fuel companies while excluding renewable energy companies from these same benefits. He has also expressed wanting more police and harsher sentences in an attempt to curb crime in Houston. But as research has shown, senselessly punitive law enforcement is not what stops crime. Rather, criminal justice reform is the key to creating a safer Houston for our families and communities. Sheila Jackson Lee knows that enabling climate change and supporting a more severe and expensive criminal justice system — along with many of Whitmire’s other questionable policy choices — are not what’s best for the people of Houston. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: Hill Harper
subject: I spoke out on MSNBC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231202-1&t=1&akid=652%2E62735%2EnH_4CE)
Peter, did you catch me on ReidOut with MSNBC’s Joy Reid?
I was on to discuss the recent news that a major donor offered me $20 million dollars (!!!) to drop out of the Senate race and primary the only Palestinian member of Congress, Representative Rashida Tlaib, because she’s called for a ceasefire in Gaza.
**I turned it down.** I’ve been clear since Day 1 that I’m running to empower people, not lobbyists. That means uncorrupting our system where calls like this even happen.
Here’s the thing — not many candidates speak out against special interest groups like I have, because the truth is, it puts a target on your back.
**[I will not be bossed, bullied, or bought. But I need grassroots supporters to have my back on this. Will you show your support after watching this clip?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-1?refcode=em20231202-1-652&refcode2=652_62735_nH_4CE&akid=652%2E62735%2EnH_4CE)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-1?refcode=em20231202-1-652&refcode2=652_62735_nH_4CE&akid=652%2E62735%2EnH_4CE)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231202-1-652&refcode2=652_62735_nH_4CE&akid=652%2E62735%2EnH_4CE)**
Right now, my team is pushing to **[raise another $10,000 by midnight](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-1?refcode=em20231202-1-652&refcode2=652_62735_nH_4CE&akid=652%2E62735%2EnH_4CE)** to prepare for attacks from angry special interests.
Honestly, I’m excited, Peter. We have a real chance to show the wealthy donor class that not only can we be stronger enough to take them on, we’re serious about ending their corrupt influence.
**[If you’re with me in this fight, please pitch in anything you can.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-1?refcode=em20231202-1-652&refcode2=652_62735_nH_4CE&akid=652%2E62735%2EnH_4CE)**
Keep strong,
Hill
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231202-1&t=2&refcode2=652_62735_nH_4CE&akid=652%2E62735%2EnH_4CE)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=652%2E62735%2EnH_4CE)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=652%2E62735%2EnH_4CE)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Expensive Thanksgiving? Thank Bidenomics!
body:
| | |
---
---
America is on the wrong track today. The Biden-Democrats aren’t fooling most of us.

There’s very good reason Joe Biden’s approval numbers just hit a new all-time low...

We’re leading the charge to **TAKE BACK OUR COUNTRY** and **DEFEND AMERICAN LIBERTY** – we can’t let up for a moment as we rapidly head toward 2024!

**Will you pitch in before midnight to help us reach our 2023 grassroots goal?**
---
[**TAKE A STAND FOR FREEDOM**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Thanksgiving this year was the most expensive in U.S. history thanks to Bidenomics. It’s been a punishing tax and ALL Americans, at every income level, have felt the effects.

At the same time, we have open borders and chaos on the world stage – how many people have already forgotten that we’ve had U.S. hostages taken by Hamas?!

**And we have a biased left-leaning mainstream media that downplays how our federal government has been WEAPONIZED to target conservatives and silence free speech.**

**[It’s time to stand up and stand strong for our conservative principles >>>](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**

Your involvement is so important to our work to hold our leaders accountable and safeguard our freedom and prosperity.

Thank you for any contribution you can send to help us reach our 2023 goal!

In liberty, Jenny Beth

P.S. Time is running out fast – it's vital that we have the resources we’ll need to fund our December plans and roll into the New Year strong. **[**Every bit of support is a huge help.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Wg51iK4qg5CT_g)**

At the same time, we have open borders and chaos on the world stage – how many people have already forgotten that we’ve had U.S. hostages taken by Hamas?! name: Adam Schiff
subject: Humbled
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| With the holiday season coming up, the New Year will be here before we know it, and we’ll need to be firing on all cylinders as 22 million Californians get ready to vote.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4644%2E5257348%2E2i7SK-)
Derek — After a busy week, I need to say _thank you_.
I am humbled by this team’s support.
With each deadline, you answer.
With every attack from Trump and his MAGA allies, you respond.
With every obstacle in our path, you help us overcome the challenges facing us.
**Thank you.**
We are rapidly approaching the March Senate primary on Super Tuesday. With the holiday season coming up, the New Year will be here before we know it, and we’ll need to be firing on all cylinders as 22 million Californians get ready to vote.
But with you by my side, I know we can take this movement to the United States Senate. To protect our climate. To build an economy that works for everyone. To defend our democracy and our Constitution from dangerous politicians who would dismantle our government to cling to power.
I’m inspired by this team and excited for what’s to come.
Derek, I’ll be relying on your support again in the critical months still to come — but for now, thank you.
All my best,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_20231202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4644%2E5257348%2E2i7SK-)

subject: Join the Movement for Responsible Governance
body:
Michigan's 4th Congressional District | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
### **Dear Friend,

As we navigate the turbulent waters of contemporary politics, it has become evident that the MAGA GOP is barely governing themselves, and the need for responsible leadership has never been more crucial. Our opponent, Bill Huizenga, seems to be supporting extremism and is unwilling to cut ties with individuals like George Santos. In these challenging times, the road to proper governance lies within Michigan's 4th Congressional District, and we believe that with your support, we can bring about the change our community deserves.**
---
|
---
| **Our campaign stands as the only formidable force that Bill Huizenga fears. While others may talk about change, we are actively working towards it. We are not just another candidate; we are the only candidate that has fought for our country and championed workers' rights. The values we uphold reflect the principles of a responsible and accountable government.

To make a real impact, we need your support. By donating what you can, volunteering your time, and activating your neighbors, you contribute to the collective effort that will reshape the future of our district. Click the links below to donate, sign up for volunteering opportunities and join our movement for responsible governance:**
---
| [Donate Now](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=ce9857b674&e=16d812e81c "Donate Now")
---
| [Join the Movement](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=72e3000c2e&e=16d812e81c "Join the Movement")
---
|
---
| **Your involvement is pivotal to our success. Together, we can build a stronger and more transparent government that puts the interests of the people first. Join us in this journey towards a brighter future for Michigan's 4th Congressional District.
Thank you for your commitment to positive change.

Sincerely,

Joseph Alfonso, Democratic Veteran for Congress **
---
|

|

subject: They will never give up
body:
| | | My friend, In 2011, I proudly supported legislation here in Wisconsin that guaranteed protections for teachers and other public employees. We **stopped** unions from automatically withdrawing union dues and **secured** the long-term viability of public employee benefits. Moreover, we balanced a $3,000,000,000 budget deficit without raising taxes. Unfortunately, _**(but not surprisingly)**_ the far-left radicals are still trying to overturn it.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=06f89ba8db624edbbe0a9d3b38c5b948&_e=Ri2see0fk075yt5_wzyRzElyyhUHW6o26iiBcdb97txbCmBK0xiun65_NnniA35fTawT7SMWAvUaoomZbbaS668C18zthwneSYaWBGJddJSd-xM33LoEpLFgwYgT4sfeySs7sLnyimfJIcOczN30QDFAiPIJu1NOq09uT_upZnouUorVW2ndykxZ-vHc5pFW3Sp78a3s4rfRX-rQSm0dVJY_GAuTC6WBrR2GrW3k3aQ%3D)

clean_body: | | | My friend, In 2011, I proudly supported legislation here in Wisconsin that guaranteed protections for teachers and other public employees. We stopped unions from automatically withdrawing union dues and secured the long-term viability of public employee benefits. Moreover, we balanced a $3,000,000,000 budget deficit without raising taxes. Unfortunately, (but not surprisingly) the far-left radicals are still trying to overturn it. These is just the beginning. The radical liberals are going to try to take power away from taxpayers and put it in the hands of special interests. If we are going to stop further attacks by the far left on common-sense, conservative reforms, we MUST defeat the Democrats. Thank you, Glenn Grothman | | | | Follow Glenn Grothman on Social Media! | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman.

# Roca for Congress Merch Drop! 🎉
# Show Your Support in Style!
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=ff420fe190&e=0a12281e0e)
Exciting news! We've just launched an exclusive lineup of merch to help you rock your support for Roca for Congress in style. Whether you're a long-time supporter or just joining the movement, these fun and patriotic items are perfect for showcasing your enthusiasm for positive change and progress.
Here's a sneak peek at what's in store:
1. **"I Stand for the National Anthem" T-Shirts:** This t-shirt design has been widely requested! These tees embody our commitment to unity, patriotism, and the values that bring us together as a nation.
2. **"Mariela Roca for Congress" T-Shirts:** Wear your support proudly with these comfortable and stylish tees featuring vibrant designs that reflect our commitment to a brighter future.
3. **Hats:** Stay cool and support the cause with our exclusive hats, designed to complement any outfit while advocating for progress.
4. **Plus much more!** 🎉

Join us in rallying behind Mariela’s vision for a better future here in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District AND our our country by sporting and supporting these fantastic items.
Every purchase directly contributes to our campaign efforts, helping us reach more people and make a real difference.
Visit our online store [**here**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=94d3711d2a&e=0a12281e0e) to explore the full range of merchandise and grab your favorites before they're gone!
| [VISIT THE ROCA STORE HERE! ](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=5476c5bc62&e=0a12281e0e)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: My book "Unwoke" - Chapter Two inside ==>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, Do you have your copy of _Unwoke_ yet?

My new book came out earlier this month. As we head into 2024, with America’s future on the line, it is a MUST-READ for every conservative determined to defeat the left and save our country from their increasingly unhinged lunacy.

**[You can order a copy of _Unwoke_ HERE >>>](http://trk.tedcruz.)** If you saw my last email, then you know how the book starts. In Chapter One, I take a deep dive into how our nation’s colleges and universities have been nearly completely overtaken by the radical left, as an early part of a deliberate “slow march through the institutions” by cultural Marxists bent on indoctrinating young people.

**In Chapter Two, “‘Malleable Clay’: K-12 Education”, I explore their next target – our nation’s children – and how they’ve infiltrated public school systems across America.**

Here’s a key excerpt from this chapter:
---
“Clearly, the mission that Cultural Marxists set for themselves in the late 1960s – to infiltrate the knowledge-making institutions of this country with left-wing ideas and change the culture in a major way – is far along the road to succeeding. Even today, when parents and politicians are more aware than ever that these ideas exist in our school systems, the cultural revolutionaries manage to smuggle these ideas through anyway. Even in the face of legislation that makes Critical Race Theory illegal, and an all-out assault on the worst books and ideas by parents and independent media, these vicious ideas still dominate American education.

“Anyone wondering how is obviously not familiar with the back-handed tactics of the modern Left. Proponents of Critical Race Theory, gender theory, and other neo-Marxist ideas will lie, obfuscate, and knowingly manipulate people to slip their ideas into our institutions. They are comfortable doing this because they believe they are on the side of the angels – though most of them don’t believe in God or angels – and that their mission is righteous.”
---
[**GET YOUR COPY**](http://trk.tedcruz._z3KKHJDQ1AIlWHA)
---
If you already have a copy of _Unwoke_ , thank you so much for your support.

**[Please consider ordering another copy or two to give as holiday gifts](http://trk.tedcruz._W-KMtKjjI7rELnzg)** , or **[please consider pitching in a special contribution to fuel our fight](http://trk.tedcruz.)** to Keep Texas Red and SAVE AMERICA from woke left lunacy.

For Liberty,
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Ted Cruz
---
[**GET YOUR COPY**](http://trk.tedcruz.-zilETqwE9KPQ_Yy3A)

I know that electing Democrats across the country won’t be easy, but it’s more important than ever that each of us does our part. Our rights and values are on the line — as is our democracy itself. The most important thing you can do to ensure Democratic candidates at every level of government prevail is to _vote._ **[We’re less than a year away from the 2024 elections, Peter. name: United Rural Democrats
subject: What’s on the line in 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
| |
---
Good morning Peter, 2024 is shaping up to be one of the most consequential years in our nation’s history. Here’s why. Many rural communities across the nation are facing economic challenges, **from job opportunities to access to quality healthcare and education**. The 2024 election provides us with a critical chance to advocate for policies that invest in and revitalize rural America, ensuring that every citizen, regardless of zip code, can lead a prosperous life. The 2024 election is crucial for **defending the very principles of democracy that bind our nation together**. By actively participating and supporting United Rural Democrats, you contribute to the fight against voter suppression, gerrymandering, and other threats to the democratic process, securing a fair and equitable political landscape for all. **[With so much at stake, we need every supporter of rural Democrats, nationwide, to chip in (whatever they can) to help us lay the foundation for a successful 2024 election cycle. Can we count on your support?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74440743/441624401/1646350971?refcode=urd-em-231202-2024&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2EyNTQ2YWUtMjg5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TQXJSk9TG4UGuyi3LBTHSqjSa7f2_yLB57biEq5l2T8=)** **If you look at the facts ...**

_We are almost $34 trillion dollars in debt.

60% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck. 50% of American families can't afford diapers, and 1 in 6 American families can't pay their utility bills.

Parents are worrying about what their children are being taught in the classrooms.

We have antisemitism all over college campuses and students feel unsafe.

We've got an open border where terrorists can come through, and there are dangers all around us._

**That 's not us. That's not America. **

We've got to stop focusing on the past and start focusing on what's going to make America **STRONG** and **PROUD** , which is exactly what I'm doing.

**[It's time we elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track. _**As president, we will restore our economy.** If 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards!_

Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America, let's go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist.

We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels.

**We will put transparency back in our classrooms.** As a mom, I know what that means. Parents should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what's happening!

_**We will secure our border,**_ and _**we will get crime down**_ because families should feel safe wherever they go.

It's simple: Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals.

And as the wife of a combat veteran, **we will make sure the military knows we have their back.**

We have the solutions. But I need your help to win and make America strong and proud again!

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, During my last debate, I reminded voters across America why I'm in this race and why I am the BEST candidate for the job. Will you take a look at the message I had to share? "After you finish reading this, please consider giving a donation of $20.24 to help me WIN the fight for our future." | If you look at the facts ... We are almost $34 trillion dollars in debt. 60% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck. 50% of American families can't afford diapers, and 1 in 6 American families can't pay their utility bills. Parents are worrying about what their children are being taught in the classrooms. We have antisemitism all over college campuses and students feel unsafe. We've got an open border where terrorists can come through, and there are dangers all around us. That 's not us. That's not America. We've got to stop focusing on the past and start focusing on what's going to make America STRONG and PROUD , which is exactly what I'm doing. "It’s time we elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track. Will you join me?" | | As president, we will restore our economy. If 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards! Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America, let's go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist. We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels. We will put transparency back in our classrooms. As a mom, I know what that means. Parents should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what's happening! We will secure our border, and we will get crime down because families should feel safe wherever they go. It's simple: Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals. And as the wife of a combat veteran, we will make sure the military knows we have their back. We have the solutions. But I need your help to win and make America strong and proud again! "If you’d like to join me in the fight to save our country, please consider chipping in a contribution to my campaign today. " Let's win this! | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. body:
Now, it’s time to hold them accountable. Here’s how:
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NouRZTSiNWB7WApfCR1vYQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTe9qP0RCaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGEtZG9uYXRlPy91dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMjAyVwNzcGNCCmVqTlFrZUVwPxJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi lied about January 6.

Liz Cheney lied about January 6.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public showing an entirely different story to the lies they told.

Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here's how you can help:

Here's why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NouRZTSiNWB7WApfCR1vYQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTe9qP0RCaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGEtZG9uYXRlPy91dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMjAyVwNzcGNCCmVqTlFrZUVwPxJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

[Donate >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NouRZTSiNWB7WApfCR1vYQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTe9qP0RCaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGEtZG9uYXRlPy91dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMjAyVwNzcGNCCmVqTlFrZUVwPxJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It's time to fight back.

**Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. **

[Donate $10 >>>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1pFxoFA62KFiAMPSAP7sOA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTe9qP0RMaHR0cHM6Ly90aGUta2FzaC1mb3VuZGF0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGEtZG9uYXRlPy91dG1fdGM9QUZSLTIwMjMxMjAyJmFtb3VudD0xMFcDc3BjQgplak5Ra2VFcD8SUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Our nation's capital, a city with a population of 712,000, has no voting members in the House of Representatives or the Senate.

**_Yet, residents still share the responsibilities of being U.S. citizens, including paying federal income taxes._**

But if Washington, DC became an official state, they would be granted full representation in Congress and finally be given a say in legislation and policy decisions.

[Activists have been fighting for DC statehood for decades, and now that a bill has been introduced in the Senate, we are asking our supporters...](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74441670/441627912/143700255?refcode=DR_EM_EN_60DC+14DO_231202_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNkOTg0NGJlLTI5OTEtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KBqz2HslMpfuEaWVzypzf6rWivBWDq-CXOyHN1q-r1Y=)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PIGFGCIeM2nvbbKjE_82cQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTfyoP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04tMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWqLUWtleE0re1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PIGFGCIeM2nvbbKjE_82cQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTfyoP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04tMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWqLUWtleE0re1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/PIGFGCIeM2nvbbKjE_82cQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTfyoP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04tMjAyMzEyMDJXA3NwY0IKZWqLUWtleE0re1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/55XeWzhrrZVoZ56BqliIwQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTfyoP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmVqi1FrZXhNK3tSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HXTdiNaYEHTlwvogR1lywA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTfyoP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplaotRa2V4TSt7UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Taylor, Team Casey
subject: Every goal we set is backed by real benchmarks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1275%2E552475%2EZ8ske7)
Peter – it’s Taylor, Bob’s Finance Director.
Last night, we _just_ missed our end-of-month fundraising goal.
I’m not going to say the sky is falling, because that’s not how we’re running this campaign. But these numbers aren’t arbitrary. Every goal we set is real, backed by real math and real benchmarks.
**In a battleground like Pennsylvania, our team’s ability to defend this seat and protect our slim Senate majority depends on meeting every single fundraising goal.**
**[So I have to ask: Can Bob count on your support? Whatever you can donate today will help us get back on track and keep our campaign strong.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?refcode=em20231201-2&refcode2=1275_552475_Z8ske7&akid=1275%2E552475%2EZ8ske7)**
[Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?amount=250&refcode=em20231201-2-el&refcode2=1275_552475_Z8ske7&akid=1275%2E552475%2EZ8ske7) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?amount=100&refcode=em20231201-2-el&refcode2=1275_552475_Z8ske7&akid=1275%2E552475%2EZ8ske7) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?amount=50&refcode=em20231201-2-el&refcode2=1275_552475_Z8ske7&akid=1275%2E552475%2EZ8ske7) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?amount=25&refcode=em20231201-2-el&refcode2=1275_552475_Z8ske7&akid=1275%2E552475%2EZ8ske7) [Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?amount=15&refcode=em20231201-2-el&refcode2=1275_552475_Z8ske7&akid=1275%2E552475%2EZ8ske7) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?refcode=em20231201-2&refcode2=1275_552475_Z8ske7&akid=1275%2E552475%2EZ8ske7)
---
Thank you in advance for stepping up.
Taylor
Finance Director, Bob Casey for Senate

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Can you believe the energy in our community lately?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter, can you believe the energy in our community lately? It's fantastic to see these yard signs sprouting up around the neighborhood. I’m counting on your response because when I made history and became New York’s attorney general, I vowed to _always_ let the people’s voice guide my work. As someone who grew up without a platform to speak out against the things that directly affected my neighborhood, I knew that I _never_ wanted to let another New Yorker feel as powerless as I once did.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. As one of my top supporters, you’re someone I can trust to speak honestly and openly about which fights to prioritize next year – **but it looks like you still haven’t accepted my invitation to participate in my focus group.**** **
| | **FOCUS GROUP RECORD**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here's what we're up against.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4408c489a1c446e48b8387d971fd54e3&_e=IbNW7dU5JKSpHPODMfsX66mZnqU1gwSo3wr1iF0Wsy6eJddWw7aYedXISBU-qRSsC8i1fvGoIm4HB69PodCJXEX06WaYEzq2eExCsQmwBiDoe2bMKo-FwsiWMP1XR40ymsh7-oWdiBMq7kcEtSmywyJOsqDaG4EHKCY4Nd8flcpqSPM1e2ZxAqGP_OdPEWD4p6TZ8gYP723dDUJ149uLFt-qMeZOMi_1zG_RZRgmWpuVebN_Je2J3sty24yBnh5_ "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4408c489a1c446e48b8387d971fd54e3&_e=IbNW7dU5JKSpHPODMfsX66mZnqU1gwSo3wr1iF0Wsy6eJddWw7aYedXISBU-qRSsC8i1fvGoIm4HB69PodCJXEX06WaYEzq2eExCsQmwBiBMO-e6SL_wj-VPthP5ZI50O2n7_9lG6hvAGrilOlSZjOu2fTAiRSgLEeInN-Kk-X__gA_PObrYd_vfu4Y2UbwZTPJdRRm9CWFuiRlo627CYgEYoZ5CBNHdqA_KGT5NfEAAOPac2xR7v-CoUP0Bz5J3)[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4408c489a1c446e48b8387d971fd54e3&_e=IbNW7dU5JKSpHPODMfsX66mZnqU1gwSo3wr1iF0Wsy6eJddWw7aYedXISBU-qRSsC8i1fvGoIm4HB69PodCJXEX06WaYEzq2eExCsQmwBiAVUhUhhnkGtHP8kMGal18pBGJ9kisLYWmneVYx2bg5pGxZi8v6Sjzz9lczQDf8wFimSU_aUFdKW2pK7lZreviGUFoEFVVp10tIp3c2pI8nQLxvB8-vOOyLEayhI6rPXBT1gEnjLxIpUTHGea66vfVU)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4408c489a1c446e48b8387d971fd54e3&_e=IbNW7dU5JKSpHPODMfsX66mZnqU1gwSo3wr1iF0Wsy6eJddWw7aYedXISBU-qRSsC8i1fvGoIm4HB69PodCJXEX06WaYEzq2eExCsQmwBiDol4U9dyyQKR3GYX-4h9P64qrRCiAFpGibnn6eKtj8pSy0UqxW4pIJEsh9Rw7-JWyM9gDAixb4o_eP-s9sonjk1Iq0VqKH5qDThhdkl_PlZPKoC2v9JqxicyeagEFnEQb3sOgnfItYxFHHCsTf3Gae)

[Donate](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4408c489a1c446e48b8387d971fd54e3&_e=IbNW7dU5JKSpHPODMfsX66mZnqU1gwSo3wr1iF0Wsy6eJddWw7aYedXISBU-qRSsC8i1fvGoIm4HB69PodCJXEX06WaYEzq2eExCsQmwBiBBg4IUULqltFzObTWrshIu4P6JNBDwjoqfijeSFQ38CCqhPv7H5nqC1x0ywOnv_ppqEewRdRa4fTz_91xzwi794hcRSSLTmu4_sCVRuutpyUNfKkFsnHpGsyU0pvAWHXhO0sw3Rz-O0FuI86U_t7Ns)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

clean_body: Here's what we're up against. "SkyTree Book Fairs" Friend, SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries. Here's what we're up against. These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material): Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda. Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children. Here is the solution: SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda. Here's how you can help. SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic. And it's working! SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA! No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character. SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!! We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country. Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination. It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with. Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic! God bless, Kirk Cameron P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation. I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic. A reminder of what we're up against: It's time to fight back. | | Patriot,

---
I am writing to you from Trump Force One, on my way to the great state of Iowa!
---
**There are now only 44 DAYS LEFT until the FIRST VOTE of 2024 is cast in the Iowa Caucus.**
---
The most recent poll shows that we are _LEADING _BY_ 59 POINTS_ nationwide! Every single _“challenger”_ is all the way down in the single digits.
---
But I trust you know that I’m not leaving anything to chance.
---
Disloyal Republicans (or “RINOs”) may be weak, cowardly, and useless. But the one thing they’re great at is stabbing me (_and voters like_ __you__) in the back!
---
**In fact, at the final hour, shadowy RINO megadonors just hatched a**** _NEW_****plot behind closed doors to spend****TENS OF MILLIONS**** _MORE_****to stop us!**
---
These cowards would rather spend _$400 MILLION in total_ to attack _OUR_ movement than go after the single most corrupt and incompetent president in our nation’s history – Crooked Joe Biden.
---
_It’s an absolute disgrace!_
---
But don’t you worry – just as you'd expect, I have a plan to FIGHT BACK against these RINOs every step of the way.
---
**I’m flying to Iowa right now to take our lead to such an unbelievable high that we can prevail against any attack the RINOs – or Crooked Joe’s minions – throw at us.**
---
_But now I have a task for YOU as well._
---
_You are 1 of the 100,000 patriots I’ve requested to make a contribution of any amount to our Primary Victory Fund before Trump Force One touches down in Iowa._
---
With your support at this pivotal moment, we will WRAP UP the primary right out of the gate so that we can shift ALL our attention to the __REAL__ mission: **firing Crooked Joe and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
---
**[So please, make a contribution to our Primary Victory Fund before Trump Force One lands. clean_body: | | | | | Patriot, I am writing to you from Trump Force One, on my way to the great state of Iowa! There are now only 44 DAYS LEFT until the FIRST VOTE of 2024 is cast in the Iowa Caucus. The most recent poll shows that we are LEADING BY 59 POINTS nationwide! Every single “challenger” is all the way down in the single digits. But I trust you know that I’m not leaving anything to chance. Disloyal Republicans (or “RINOs”) may be weak, cowardly, and useless. But the one thing they’re great at is stabbing me (and voters like you) in the back! In fact, at the final hour, shadowy RINO megadonors just hatched a NEWplot behind closed doors to spendTENS OF MILLIONS MOREto stop us! These cowards would rather spend $400 MILLION in total to attack OUR movement than go after the single most corrupt and incompetent president in our nation’s history – Crooked Joe Biden. It’s an absolute disgrace! But don’t you worry – just as you'd expect, I have a plan to FIGHT BACK against these RINOs every step of the way. I’m flying to Iowa right now to take our lead to such an unbelievable high that we can prevail against any attack the RINOs – or Crooked Joe’s minions – throw at us. But now I have a task for YOU as well. You are 1 of the 100,000 patriots I’ve requested to make a contribution of any amount to our Primary Victory Fund before Trump Force One touches down in Iowa. With your support at this pivotal moment, we will WRAP UP the primary right out of the gate so that we can shift ALL our attention to the REAL mission: firing Crooked Joe and MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, don’t even think about donating! Our country will come roaring back soon, don’t you worry about it. | | Thank you, Donald J.
