Right now, we’re seeing a rise in hate crimes against Muslims, Arabs, and Palestinians. Last week, three Palestinian students were shot in Vermont—one, Hisham Awartani, may never walk again.1 In a statement, Hisham said: “This hideous crime did not happen in a vacuum.”
Hisham is right. We must speak out against this hate and dehumanization of our communities, which we hear on cable news networks and in the halls of Congress. I will continue to push my colleagues in Congress to see Palestinians as human beings who deserve rights, freedom, and dignity just as much as Israelis do.
As the only Palestinian American in Congress, my voice is needed now more than ever. Arab Americans, Muslim Americans, and Palestinian Americans must be heard and recognized in our government.
The vast majority of Americans support a permanent ceasefire, but that’s not reflected in Congress. In a move that would undermine the democratic will of the American people, the right-wing group AIPAC plans to spend over $100 million to try to unseat me and several other progressive members of Congress who are leading the push for a ceasefire.

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Wed, Nov 29, 2023
Subject: $20 million to run against me, the only Palestinian American in Congress.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Multiple people running for U.S. Senate and other Congressional seats in Michigan have said they’ve been offered between $10 and $20 million to run against me.
As the only Palestinian American in Congress, I will not be bullied. This attempt to intimidate me will never silence me in saving as many lives as possible, no matter faith or ethnicity.
I keep thinking about the three Palestinian students in Vermont, whose mere existence was seen as a threat by someone who decided to open fire. Hisham, one of the survivors of the shooting, is right when he said: “This hideous crime did not happen in a vacuum.”
**Silencing the voices of Palestinians and all oppressed people is something that the political establishment has done for decades. We are saying enough.**
Amidst the painful dehumanizing of Palestinians and hate in the United States towards our communities (especially those speaking out for a ceasefire), we must be heard and represented in our government. I will not let extremists who believe in wiping out as many Palestinians as possible undermine the democratic will of the American people, the vast majority of whom support a permanent ceasefire.

clean_body: | | | Friend, Have you heard about the Michigan U.S. Senate and congressional candidates who’ve been offered between $10 and $20 million to run against me? All because I’ve been outspoken for a permanent ceasefire. | Right now, we’re seeing a rise in hate crimes against Muslims, Arabs, and Palestinians. Last week, three Palestinian students were shot in Vermont—one, Hisham Awartani, may never walk again.1 In a statement, Hisham said: “This hideous crime did not happen in a vacuum.” Hisham is right. We must speak out against this hate and dehumanization of our communities, which we hear on cable news networks and in the halls of Congress. I will continue to push my colleagues in Congress to see Palestinians as human beings who deserve rights, freedom, and dignity just as much as Israelis do. As the only Palestinian American in Congress, my voice is needed now more than ever. Arab Americans, Muslim Americans, and Palestinian Americans must be heard and recognized in our government. The vast majority of Americans support a permanent ceasefire, but that’s not reflected in Congress. In a move that would undermine the democratic will of the American people, the right-wing group AIPAC plans to spend over $100 million to try to unseat me and several other progressive members of Congress who are leading the push for a ceasefire. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you. In solidarity, Rashida 1 \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Wed, Nov 29, 2023 Subject: $20 million to run against me, the only Palestinian American in Congress. To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Multiple people running for U.S. Senate and other Congressional seats in Michigan have said they’ve been offered between $10 and $20 million to run against me. As the only Palestinian American in Congress, I will not be bullied. This attempt to intimidate me will never silence me in saving as many lives as possible, no matter faith or ethnicity. I keep thinking about the three Palestinian students in Vermont, whose mere existence was seen as a threat by someone who decided to open fire. Hisham, one of the survivors of the shooting, is right when he said: “This hideous crime did not happen in a vacuum.” Silencing the voices of Palestinians and all oppressed people is something that the political establishment has done for decades. We are saying enough. Amidst the painful dehumanizing of Palestinians and hate in the United States towards our communities (especially those speaking out for a ceasefire), we must be heard and represented in our government. I will not let extremists who believe in wiping out as many Palestinians as possible undermine the democratic will of the American people, the vast majority of whom support a permanent ceasefire. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Please know I will never back down in speaking truth to power even if my voice shakes. I refuse to take any money from corporate PACs, so our campaign is powered by grassroots donors like you. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: NEW: Morning Consult approval poll shows Josh Hawley remains most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
It has never been more critical to invest in Lucas Kunce’s grassroots campaign here in Missouri, Peter.
#
**NEW FROM _MORNING CONSULT:_ HAWLEY’S APPROVALS CONTINUE TO SINK AS HE REMAINS THE LEAST POPULAR GOP SENATOR RUNNING IN 2024**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39572?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B)
Now that we have even more confirmation that Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable — with lower approvals than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida — it’s never been more critical to invest in Lucas Kunce’s grassroots campaign here in Missouri.
**Multiple polls have already shown Lucas and Hawley in a margin-of-error race, so joining our movement by chipping in today could be your chance to make a real difference.[Can we count on you to rush a donation of any amount to help us defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39572?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39573?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39573?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39572?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B)
---

* * *

Peter,
On January 6th, 2021, Josh Hawley showed the world that he’s a fraud and a coward. Since then, he’s become the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election in 2024. **Here’s what happened:**
**FIRST:** Some of Hawley’s top supporters announced they’re refusing to support his re-election campaign this cycle — including his former mentor, three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth, who said supporting Hawley in 2018 was _“the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”_
**THEN:** 13-year Marine veteran Lucas Kunce launched his campaign to replace Hawley — exposing his corrupt record on abortion, creepy obsession with masculinity, and failure to stand up for working Missourians in the U.S. Senate. That message, and Hawley’s own actions, have been enough to put him in a _statistical tie_ with Lucas.
**AND NOW:** This latest approval poll from _Morning Consult_ confirms that Josh Hawley is becoming less popular among Missouri voters every day — and that we have a real chance to defeat him next November.
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39572?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B)**
DC insiders and corporate elites are already doing everything they can to prop up Josh Hawley amid all this news. They’ve set up new Super PACs, they’ve transferred millions to Hawley’s campaign, and they’ve thrown desperate attacks at Lucas since the day he got into this race. And they’re not going to stop there.
Over the coming months, these insiders are going to ramp up their attacks and spend EVEN MORE to keep their grip on this seat. **That means we need the resources to combat their attacks AND put Lucas’ positive vision in front of Missouri voters — and today, we’re urgently asking for your help to do it, Peter.**
**[Will you please rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford toward our grassroots movement to elect Lucas Kunce right now? Our campaign doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs, so your support is the only way we’ll be able to stay prepared and flip this seat next year.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39572?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B)**

[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39573?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=8&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39573?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=9&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39573?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=10&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39573?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=11&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39573?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=12&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39573?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=13&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39572?refcode=em20231202-4301&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=4301%2E614464%2Ex_X9_B)

Thanks for everything,
— Team Lucas Kunce

subject: Every day it got worse
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The day 13 Americans were vaporized at the entrance to the Kabul airport was the first time I’d ever considered serving in government again | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=6d4ab34fde964073aba72ec5409d17d4&_t=LNBRb2akmSpt-9mUUvB2_E8wq5dcU35G_aBZhh8ja-go3EqpR8v3jMhHjKnDfHQInWKz1GpbyX-3epo7fGlpqowUFiUoyOe6_ilx0xqO9pU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=6d4ab34fde964073aba72ec5409d17d4&_t=LNBRb2akmSpt-9mUUvB2_E8wq5dcU35G_aBZhh8ja-go3EqpR8v3jMhHjKnDfHQInWKz1GpbyX-3epo7fGlpqowUFiUoyOe6_ilx0xqO9pU%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6d4ab34fde964073aba72ec5409d17d4&_e=daV1tUVhpLZdmuapaBu6iz1u8b3ScZduhMFJnX0FW6iGx7hm7y5ThuqFHCbnbEM6TT0nHLWj2wr-KukAWT7Jt74vPOjZZXyAPRM_72reqeK5umhH7zN2PxhmJylpmzTPW5wlzzSRQdLLgj1E-8bqJIcJB2wONAou6_NvlCUPGB6SyQ3VzE3ncS46jAbhgQIDbGnqNdaJOenxfPF575__teidFgzx_d-0ed0rv7c2RV9YIcr_IcIbTLy9r0qOUDk9lLzvuip_q40-FN1GG8052CZy1lIi4jQQJrGHc7YLrbKwFa-5WhRDBH44PdDxPMoAzv2x71D_Wz_nMEpd9HPK9IFlN1jtSw5E5Q18lgEaQmoRRu0m-YtA_UOYw9pz54RZq3FAbjF0TwILKLpsoSyZDBP3OZVmcfl0RAeImTlS3zA%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6d4ab34fde964073aba72ec5409d17d4&_e=daV1tUVhpLZdmuapaBu6iz1u8b3ScZduhMFJnX0FW6iGx7hm7y5ThuqFHCbnbEM6TT0nHLWj2wr-KukAWT7Jt74vPOjZZXyAPRM_72reqeK5umhH7zN2PxhmJylpmzTPW5wlzzSRQdLLgj1E-8bqJIcJB2wONAou6_NvlCUPGB6SyQ3VzE3ncS46jAbhgQIDbGnqNdaJOenxfPF575__teidFgzx_d-0ed0rv7c2RV9YIcr_IcIbTLy9r0qOUDk9lLzvuip_q40-FN1GG8052Pe0AauMOvmx9VqTKQmxSDgrQ6H3SOnaqnCNFpHiIj1NFvEeqQNsJMBEhqPbcciZ8NO9zCKVq-lZfiyAH-3nYI2gI6vfVmHvqKmDim7OWqxN2Ha9lejerissH8Dgb5CdrHigxK4-t_IwX_XeWznQfFo%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6d4ab34fde964073aba72ec5409d17d4&_e=daV1tUVhpLZdmuapaBu6iz1u8b3ScZduhMFJnX0FW6iGx7hm7y5ThuqFHCbnbEM6TT0nHLWj2wr-KukAWT7Jt74vPOjZZXyAPRM_72reqeK5umhH7zN2PxhmJylpmzTPW5wlzzSRQdLLgj1E-8bqJIcJB2wONAou6_NvlCUPGB6SyQ3VzE3ncS46jAbhgQIDbGnqNdaJOenxfPF575__teidFgzx_d-0ed0rv7c2RV9YIcr_IcIbTLy9r0qOUDk9lLzvuip_q40-FN1GG8052Ob_pRixpcNPFaue55G0oYekCT2MYm2ZKoIEAuVX5MAlgW3zsfXIs16TITuUobKVqlQq-ePdOLBCN7mby3d0ZV0vk9CEl5lLOjdET0iAgNk1O3BKMMfoqSqvOBIQsLt08dB4ou22pElItodxplqgnVc%3D)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

**If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right.** If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, **[please do me a quick favor and confirm that I have the correct information on file for you](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6d4ab34fde964073aba72ec5409d17d4&_e=daV1tUVhpLZdmuapaBu6iz1u8b3ScZduhMFJnX0FW6iGx7hm7y5ThuqFHCbnbEM6JSI6UKgsy9bADolL10f3DYimyhCyoeXY4d-XZadmBfp80iX7f-2lfjE7FCJF2135wxvKy7j6569Nlt4MxFF0pqM4R1jGyx03RxWgYdPqLjpRtqLF9pPx67AaBDm9V9W3QDUhC9beeRzx4n26ub-sG2A4V5Nb_SPLcFX-iydl1KgSHwmNhjREM5MWToauuh19sZ6UJPCZovjKaWSWNF3K3GyUvMRLBMGOqbQ1cd7RMNASqfGQDmdmxSrmHQtl4DBVo5U-TYDPcZSlv1B8HYVoepYdAxDEF4V6mWA0LFSouCmay_RUVu6RliSaI-3ciV6FjSyv76PxTcgnK9wt6XMPjMSRAjaDwSCGynBVX18f1Q0%3D)** ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy.

[**JOIN OUR FIGHT
ENLIST WITH TIM TODAY->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6d4ab34fde964073aba72ec5409d17d4&_e=daV1tUVhpLZdmuapaBu6iz1u8b3ScZduhMFJnX0FW6iGx7hm7y5ThuqFHCbnbEM6TT0nHLWj2wr-KukAWT7Jt74vPOjZZXyAPRM_72reqeK5umhH7zN2PxhmJylpmzTPW5wlzzSRQdLLgj1E-8bqJIcJB2wONAou6_NvlCUPGB6SyQ3VzE3ncS46jAbhgQIDbGnqNdaJOenxfPF575__teidFgzx_d-0ed0rv7c2RV9YIcr_IcIbTLy9r0qOUDk9lLzvuip_q40-FN1GG8052NdLbIGDz4vJ2rjvfxz2_SFuw8sXK0w8iMt1YbNaw4NbpG4t4kUKH8PRmyakCL_3bOL1Ka1TyPGIJeNMRQZ4VvkZnWv43af4kkvogzEc5AMJP-1-Qss_0rhI4Qa6wYr3dTkSI3M5ke_THiBI6GTD5BU%3D)

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision; **but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. **

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6d4ab34fde964073aba72ec5409d17d4&_e=daV1tUVhpLZdmuapaBu6iz1u8b3ScZduhMFJnX0FW6iGx7hm7y5ThuqFHCbnbEM6TT0nHLWj2wr-KukAWT7Jt74vPOjZZXyAPRM_72reqeK5umhH7zN2PxhmJylpmzTPW5wlzzSRQdLLgj1E-8bqJIcJB2wONAou6_NvlCUPGB6SyQ3VzE3ncS46jAbhgQIDbGnqNdaJOenxfPF575__teidFgzx_d-0ed0rv7c2RV9YIcr_IcIbTLy9r0qOUDk9lLzvuip_q40-FN1GG8052IdI72VnqDvQfpIG9uLSA67REo8aID40VXdOld2lnVYW4DPo4yVLIuu1UuEurgGcIAEpSzVPx_3wYhcE1GlYLV7f4sleQSjRc8X14Iy1Dlr5VYsGfvEygUJTY7rfwALVVa20NZamPZa-93YDzWEkqI0%3D)
**Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.** I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. [**ENLIST WITH TIM
CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT TODAY->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6d4ab34fde964073aba72ec5409d17d4&_e=daV1tUVhpLZdmuapaBu6iz1u8b3ScZduhMFJnX0FW6iGx7hm7y5ThuqFHCbnbEM6TT0nHLWj2wr-KukAWT7Jt74vPOjZZXyAPRM_72reqeK5umhH7zN2PxhmJylpmzTPW5wlzzSRQdLLgj1E-8bqJIcJB2wONAou6_NvlCUPGB6SyQ3VzE3ncS46jAbhgQIDbGnqNdaJOenxfPF575__teidFgzx_d-0ed0rv7c2RV9YIcr_IcIbTLy9r0qOUDk9lLzvuip_q40-FN1GG8052KNlqsGC8S1oq5XupmMsHtkJrHNuuM0XwGwIoFg4Mu6nruquEE_rmpFIqBb0IykWlkceC2V1DS0Lv5O6AE0iIM27NqHjsrQxJd_Jw5BSJEAfYUpfGhf0eqU6CwkeSzxklBgOymsg6zW4wLeOkiJVp-8%3D)

I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, **[I’m going to need the help of every conservative donor who reads this letter.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6d4ab34fde964073aba72ec5409d17d4&_e=daV1tUVhpLZdmuapaBu6iz1u8b3ScZduhMFJnX0FW6iGx7hm7y5ThuqFHCbnbEM6TT0nHLWj2wr-KukAWT7Jt74vPOjZZXyAPRM_72reqeK5umhH7zN2PxhmJylpmzTPW5wlzzSRQdLLgj1E-8bqJIcJB2wONAou6_NvlCUPGB6SyQ3VzE3ncS46jAbhgQIDbGnqNdaJOenxfPF575__teidFgzx_d-0ed0rv7c2RV9YIcr_IcIbTLy9r0qOUDk9lLzvuip_q40-FN1GG8052OgKiOL8qjRXMrEct5kGvR4EA56oZRp9hs5dn6yJ23-6D8S4xqqcK9U4emQvQel4v30-ddurPYKQVljyu4YVI2eVMwXehAyeD0p3wOO78m69Ey9DtS5Cttom3135sj-vq2ACHJwk7Fy_VFIgVVQrQfI%3D) **

Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, _**I was there.**_ We fought in Afghanistan, _**I was there.**_

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to look at my children and tell them, _**“Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.”**_

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6d4ab34fde964073aba72ec5409d17d4&_e=daV1tUVhpLZdmuapaBu6iz1u8b3ScZduhMFJnX0FW6iGx7hm7y5ThuqFHCbnbEM6TT0nHLWj2wr-KukAWT7Jt74vPOjZZXyAPRM_72reqeK5umhH7zN2PxhmJylpmzTPW5wlzzSRQdLLgj1E-8bqJIcJB2wONAou6_NvlCUPGB6SyQ3VzE3ncS46jAbhgQIDbGnqNdaJOenxfPF575__teidFgzx_d-0ed0rv7c2RV9YIcr_IcIbTLy9r0qOUDk9lLzvuip_q40-FN1GG8052PrsTN7KYPVYaLa8X9XUD45nJ00q677KFuEwUgHUPZDNz-S25d_UzR3gV64fhnOTJwpmMQ8xGulwedwTzRtaFmBw40ujIKPqUsKppCbsRiWArsvocZJ3_Wkq7bRnvm6OXN1t2EWe5Cyq7z4TY24-orc%3D)
**But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.**

So, Fellow Conservative \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain.

clean_body: The day 13 Americans were vaporized at the entrance to the Kabul airport was the first time I’d ever considered serving in government again | | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, “I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’” Every day it got worse. Every day it was a disaster. The adult in the room never materialized. Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport. Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.” I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil. If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right. If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy. It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision; but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes. We fought in Iraq, I was there. We fought in Afghanistan, I was there. And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times. I want to look at my children and tell them, “Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.” But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it. So, Fellow Conservative \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. body:
Let’s change it.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74444979/441639963/-849459103?refcode=ea.5607fb0a-3091-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.5607fb0a-3091-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjA3ZmIwYS0zMDkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_BPAE4za-pLzOOqiWGOKNxKMxTud1kwmsav-dtKL51Q=&emci=5ec37178-7190-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=5607fb0a-3091-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=46764483)
---
**I’m fed up.** 👉 With politicians who care more about their donors than their constituents. 👉 With the gun lobby and the constant threat to our communities. 👉 With abortion bans and attacks on voting rights. **With all of it.** MAGA Republicans like Marsha Blackburn aren’t willing to set aside partisanship and represent the people’s interests. _That’s why she’s gotta go._ All Tennesseans deserve a _voice_ in the Senate — no matter who we are or where we come from. name: John Kennedy
subject: all due respect
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Hey folks -- John Kennedy here.

I respect you too much to beat around the bush.
You're busy. I'm busy. So I'll do you the courtesy of cutting to
the chase:

My Republican colleagues over there in the People's
House have a very, VERY big deadline coming down the pike, and
they sent me a note saying they're falling DANGEROUSLY behind
their big December goal.

They also made it abundantly clear to me that
they'd have a real mess on their hands if they came up short.

So with all due respect, I'm humbly asking you to
send in a small contribution before time is officially out. We've
only got a few days left for a last-minute surge before the big
deadline, so anything you can spare would be a HUGE help.

Do you think you could do that? For me?

Look, this deadline was important before…
but now I'm hearing Biden and the Democrat National Committee are
unloading 25 million bucks in the most competitive states in the
country -- yep, enough states for a DEMOCRAT SWEEP in the next
election.

And I'm afraid this much cash could be enough to
push Liberals over the top...

With an ARMY of Liberal donors whipping out their
credit cards every time they flip on CNN - and Conservatives
missing their goal - it could be all over for us. That's why I'm
pleading for your help right here and now:

Send In Ten
Bucks Now >>

Send In Thirty
Bucks (Most Folks Give This Much) >>

Send In Fifty
Bucks Now >>

Send In More
Now >>

I know Kevin McCarthy reached out...

I know James Comer reached out...

I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...

I know Jim Jordan reached out...

I know Steve Scalise reached out...

And I sure as heck know you're probably tired of
hearing from us, but we don't have time to stand around - not if
we want to win!!!

So in the short time we have left before the
deadline, I'm personally asking for your help to save our
Republican friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.

God bless you,

John N. Kennedy

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my MAJORITY LEADER
SURVEY at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to
have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind
before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the
Radical Democrats?

BEGIN YOUR SURVEY >>

Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee
authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE
TIGER PAC.

Team
Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority
and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for
being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com
because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative
grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee,
are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income
tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks,
labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and
federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law
requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the
name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each
individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

You can
donate via mail by sending a check to:
320 First
Street SE
2nd Floor

Washington, DC 20003

Privacy
Policy

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

State: Virginia

today@thefederalistwire.com

name: The team at VoteVets
subject: Steps away from a dictatorship
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
VoteVets is ringing the alarm.
#
We’re Veterans. A lot of the people reading this are Veterans, too. Many more of you are members of Military Families. And even if you’re not in either of those groups, you’re a part of this team.
When you join the Military you swear an oath to defend the Constitution of the United States. We took that oath seriously.
And that's why we’re writing to you today. To put it very simply, our Constitution and our democracy are under greater threat today than at any point in our lifetimes.
Trump is doing everything he can to march back into the White House. If he takes back the presidency, he has stated openly that he would use the Military and the Department of Justice to crack down on his political opponents. He will gut the federal government and fill it with MAGA fanatics and loyalists. And that’s just what he and his team have said publicly. There is no telling how far he will go to turn the United States into a dictatorship.
We are steps away.
But we are not powerless. VoteVets is ringing the alarm. And we are going to fight tooth and nail for the next 12 months to stop Trump.
If we’re going to be successful, we need a big team behind us. Thousands of patriotic Americans who are willing to do the work necessary to protect our democracy. Are you with us?
**[Endorse the VoteVets Mission and add your name to say that you will fight back alongside us. We need you.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/231202_vv_mission/?source=em231202-1-30?refcode2=19894.3013755.HtRShc&akid=19894%2E3013755%2EHtRShc)

Thank you.
The team at VoteVets

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: No $$ to Sanctuary Cities!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
We must secure the border. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0b11939fc5&e=1050d051da)
---
| Patriot,

It's Jake LaTurner here.

House Republicans aren't done delivering wins for the American people in 2023. This week we stopped liberals from using **OUR** tax dollars to fund sanctuary cities, uncovered more Biden family corruption, and continued to stand with Israel.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **PUSHING BACK ON THE LEFT'S OPEN-BORDER POLICIES**
---
|
---
| **Here's the truth: A country without borders is not a country at all.**
Joe Biden has let the Mexican cartels control our southern border. Terrorists, criminals, and drugs continue to come across the border in record numbers and wreak havoc on our communities.

To make matters worse, Biden's open border policies have cost Kansans over **$600 MILLION** this year.

It's unacceptable and Mayorkas must be impeached.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e7c2adee51&e=1050d051da)
---
| Radical Democrats in New York have joined forces with the woke Biden administration to start housing illegal immigrants on federal lands and in our national parks.

**This is a slap in the face to all Americans. Our national parks are for spending time outside and admiring America's God-given beauty. Not for housing migrants who broke the law.**

I proudly voted to prevent our hard-earned tax dollars from being used to bankroll the left's sanctuary city policies. We have to secure the border and **STOP** incentivizing even more illegal immigration.
---
|
---
| **CRACKING DOWN ON THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1a92a030d2&e=1050d051da)
---
| **NEW DEVELOPMENT: IN 2018, A BANK INVESTIGATOR FLAGGED SERIOUS CONCERNS ABOUT THE $40,000 OF CCP MONEY THAT WAS TRANSFERRED TO JOE BIDEN**
As one of the top GOP investigators in the House, I have been committed to uncovering the truth about the Biden family corruption. For months, we have presented thousands of pages of evidence showing Joe Biden **LIED** to the American people about his involvement in his family's shady foreign business dealings.

_**It turns out that a bank investigator had the EXACT SAME concerns that we have. Here's what we know:**_
* Joe Biden knew about, participated in, and benefited from Hunter's business dealings with Chinese-backed companies.
* Joe Biden showed up at Hunter's CEFC meetings (a CCP-backed energy company).
* $40,000 of laundered CCP money went to Joe Biden.

The American people deserve better from their Commander in Chief. I will never stop fighting for the truth and ensuring Joe Biden is held accountable.
---
|
---
| **STANDING FIRM WITH ISRAEL 🇺🇸🇮🇱**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=3ba17838e2&e=1050d051da)
---
| Israel is our strongest ally in the Middle East and a beacon of freedom across the world. As the far-left in Washington continue to call for a **ceasefire** and promote anti-Semitic rhetoric, House Republicans are standing strong with our ally and friend, Israel.

_**This week Republicans took action to stop Biden's weakness on the world stage:**_
✅ Calling on Hamas to immediately release hostages taken during the October 2023 attack.
✅ Reaffirming the State of Israel’s right to exist.
✅ Freezing Biden's **$6 BILLION** ransom payout to the terrorist-loving Iranian regime.

We should not send **ONE MORE PENNY** to Iran or any other nation that promotes terrorism. America will **ALWAYS** stand with Israel against ruthless, barbaric terrorists.
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Combat the fentanyl epidemic
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Stop Joe Biden's student loan bailout
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=22eb3a360a&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Kansans for LaTurner, All rights reserved._

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=98aafe7931) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=98aafe7931).
---
|

body:

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: The impact of your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-dec2023-fr-december?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-dec2023-fr-december?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Thanks to your support, we were able to crush our end-of-month fundraising goal for November. I’m so grateful for your tireless support and for standing by my side throughout this year to fight for our democracy.

Reaching these goals month over month isn’t an arbitrary achievement. Because of the incredible support from this community, we’re able to release videos like this one we premiered this week on MSNBC’s The Reid Out:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2023-FR-Video?&refcode=E5348-20231202-NovThanksVid-Image-Other&amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2023-FR-Video?&refcode=E5348-20231202-NovThanksVid-Image-Other&amount=15]WATCH HERE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Dec2023-FR-Video?&refcode=E5348-20231202-NovThanksVid-SB-Other&amount=15]

Team, let me be clear: We can not grow complacent. Abortion and contraception access, LGBTQ+ rights, and the foundations of our democracy are all on the line in 2024. And we will not back down.

I’ll be in touch over these last few weeks of 2023 as our campaign continues, but for now — thank you very much for your support in November!

Sincerely,

Eric Swalwell

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Donald Trump lacks the backbone to fight gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need four more years of a Biden-Harris Administration to keep moving forward in our fight to end gun violence
#

Team - Want to hear something shocking?
Even though Donald Trump pledged to “make America great again,” gun homicides spiked 34 percent during his term.
That doesn’t sound so great to us.
[**We need four more years of a Biden-Harris Administration to keep moving forward in our fight to end gun violence. Will you please contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us reelect President Joe Biden next year?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231202-1-30&t=1&akid=6981%2E3935704%2Em6565T)

Trump didn’t have the backbone to solve our nation’s gun violence crisis—even after promising to enact universal background checks. Instead, he spent his presidency cozying up to the gun lobby.
Joe Biden is the **only** presidential candidate who has both the track record and the guts to stand up to the gun lobby and protect Americans from gun crime. From signing the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act into law to establishing a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention, President Biden’s progress on gun safety speaks volumes.

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Solar generators are a smart choice
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vks_aFMGwpM73nU6fnDQqQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTgvGP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjMxMjAyVwNzcGNCCmVqam1rZWEHvzRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vks_aFMGwpM73nU6fnDQqQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTgvGP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjMxMjAyVwNzcGNCCmVqam1rZWEHvzRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vks_aFMGwpM73nU6fnDQqQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTgvGP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjMxMjAyVwNzcGNCCmVqam1rZWEHvzRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/vks_aFMGwpM73nU6fnDQqQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnTgvGP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUxMjAxMjNfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjMxMjAyVwNzcGNCCmVqam1rZWEHvzRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

body:

Experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying Texas may be Democrats’ BEST pick-up opportunity in 2024, and Ted Cruz is going on the offensive because he’s terrified that Colin has a real chance of winning this thing.
We know Republicans are hell-bent on flipping the Senate next year – but if we win in Texas, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend the Senate!
Look, Colin is running a grassroots campaign. He's not taking a dime from corporations or special interests because he believes lawmakers should only be beholden to the people they serve – not wealthy donors.
That's why your support is so important, friend.
We're building a people-powered movement from the ground up, and it's going to take a historic outpouring of grassroots support to compete with Cruz and his mega donors. So please, will you rush $20, or whatever you can spare today, split with Serve America, to help Colin stand up to the GOP's attacks, defeat Ted Cruz and protect our Senate majority? → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

Donate now → [] [] Experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying Texas may be Democrats’ BEST pick-up opportunity in 2024, and Ted Cruz is going on the offensive because he’s terrified that Colin has a real chance of winning this thing. We know Republicans are hell-bent on flipping the Senate next year – but if we win in Texas, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend the Senate! Look, Colin is running a grassroots campaign. He's not taking a dime from corporations or special interests because he believes lawmakers should only be beholden to the people they serve – not wealthy donors. That's why your support is so important, friend. We're building a people-powered movement from the ground up, and it's going to take a historic outpouring of grassroots support to compete with Cruz and his mega donors. So please, will you rush $20, or whatever you can spare today, split with Serve America, to help Colin stand up to the GOP's attacks, defeat Ted Cruz and protect our Senate majority? → [] Every single dollar counts in our fight to flip Texas blue. Thanks for giving what you can. Team Allred [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I hate sending emails like this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Can I be honest with you?
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1636%2E35263%2EV6GZv3)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-rosen.SC53au&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1636%2E35263%2EV6GZv3) Can I be honest with you, Peter? I hate sending emails like this. That's why I won't beg you to donate ahead of tonight's crucial midnight deadline, but I _will_ lay out the facts: **My potential GOP opponent – Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate – outraised me in the first week of his campaign launch. And shortly after, a shady billionaire poured $2 million into the race to help flip this seat red.** McConnell and his allies flooded Nevada's last Senate race with over a staggering $55 million (only to come up less than a percentage point short of winning). And with TIME reporting that Nevada could deliver everything from the Senate to the White House to Republicans in 2024, we need all the support we can get if we're going to fend off their attacks. But our midnight fundraising deadline is just hours away, and we're on track to fall short of our $20,000 goal. But first, let me explain exactly who we're up against here:
* Rick Scott wrote the plan to END Social Security and Medicare — a plan so extreme that even Mitch McConnell condemned it!

* He supports Florida's extreme abortion ban — and he's scheming to pass a nationwide ban on abortions.

* He's a fraud who made his fortune as the CEO of a company that admitted to the largest Medicare fraud in U.S. history.

* And he just became one of the first senators to ENDORSE Donald Trump — apparently, not even Florida’s own Ron DeSantis is extreme enough for him.

**Rick Scott is wrong for Florida, plain and simple.** That's why I'm running to defeat him. And the good news is that experts at _CNN, Roll Call_ , and _FiveThirtyEight_ agree that our campaign has a real shot at beating him.

Team, I want to take a moment to first say thank you. Thanks to everyday grassroots supporters like you—those who've chipped in $5 here or $25 there—throughout November, we've stayed afloat in this race and kicked off December on the right foot. That’s exactly how I want to build this campaign, with grassroots support. On the other hand, my opponent is attending a ritzy fundraiser tomorrow headlined by Speaker Mike Johnson (with tickets to attend going for as much as $100,000!!!). This campaign is all about rejecting the extreme MAGA agenda in Washington and giving New Yorkers a congressman they can count on – not another lackey to Speaker MAGA Mike Johnson. **So I want to show Anthony D’Esposito and Mike Johnson just how STRONG our resistance to their dangerous agenda is.** _**[So I have to ask: Do you approve of Speaker MAGA Mike Johnson?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74455848/441658458/-850681176?refcode=ea.6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkxMDQ5Yi0zYzkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyNs6814QXwcFGf98n7gjNi6rJZmqErJKRaGwxtRWFk=&emci=0080c481-cb8f-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=37077096)**_ | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74455850/441658459/-850681176?refcode=ea.6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkxMDQ5Yi0zYzkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyNs6814QXwcFGf98n7gjNi6rJZmqErJKRaGwxtRWFk=&emci=0080c481-cb8f-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=37077096) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74455852/441658460/-850681176?refcode=ea.6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkxMDQ5Yi0zYzkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyNs6814QXwcFGf98n7gjNi6rJZmqErJKRaGwxtRWFk=&emci=0080c481-cb8f-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=37077096)

Let’s be honest, there is WAY too much on the line to let Mike Johnson stay in control. He's not just an election denier who led the charge to overturn the 2020 election results. He's also an anti-choice extremist who wants to criminalize reproductive rights and ban same-sex marriage.
Another two years of Johnson as Speaker would be disastrous for our country, team. We have to work together to flip the House blue. **But I can't move forward without knowing I have you in my corner. So, I’ll ask again:**
**Do you approve of Speaker MAGA Mike Johnson?** [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74455855/441658461/-850681176?refcode=ea.6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkxMDQ5Yi0zYzkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyNs6814QXwcFGf98n7gjNi6rJZmqErJKRaGwxtRWFk=&emci=0080c481-cb8f-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=37077096) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74455857/441658462/-850681176?refcode=ea.6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkxMDQ5Yi0zYzkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyNs6814QXwcFGf98n7gjNi6rJZmqErJKRaGwxtRWFk=&emci=0080c481-cb8f-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=6591049b-3c91-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=37077096)

Friend,

We did it. The support of my grassroots team drove me all the way to the finish line of my Full Grassley, 99-county tour through Iowa—and we're so excited.

There's nothing quite like seeing PASSION for America's comeback light up across an entire state.

Help me out by donating just $15!

This is what it takes to win in Iowa. No one in this race seems to understand that. In fact, Donald Trump feels so entitled to this nomination that he doesn't even bother to show up at all. That's not how you prove to the American people that they're worth fighting for. That's not how you lead.

If we continue at this pace, I'll be able to shake your hand, I'll be able to answer your questions, I'll be able to show up for YOU. But I need your support to keep this up.

Ron DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e3e18a8ca59fcbcb9069f313e45a1855e6c1fd22046b171ae42f8aaab32c5370dedc06d874f659c32cb46999385731bacce067708f44478d713145f05c12bce2
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e3e18a8ca59fcbcba594698698c84fcf0608bd7e51a5c1004a0c43a52ac7caeeceec7b1ecd85298dbfaf117e1aa8f5f434331b9e0306501365111fbc96b04047

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=e3e18a8ca59fcbcba594698698c84fcf0608bd7e51a5c1004a0c43a52ac7caeeceec7b1ecd85298dbfaf117e1aa8f5f434331b9e0306501365111fbc96b04047

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, We did it. The support of my grassroots team drove me all the way to the finish line of my Full Grassley, 99-county tour through Iowa—and we're so excited. There's nothing quite like seeing PASSION for America's comeback light up across an entire state. SEE BEHIND THE SCENES Help me out by donating just $15! This is what it takes to win in Iowa. No one in this race seems to understand that. In fact, Donald Trump feels so entitled to this nomination that he doesn't even bother to show up at all. That's not how you prove to the American people that they're worth fighting for. That's not how you lead. If we continue at this pace, I'll be able to shake your hand, I'll be able to answer your questions, I'll be able to show up for YOU. But I need your support to keep this up. Help Out: $25 Help Out: $50 Help Out: $75 Help Out: $100 I can't wait to meet you on the trail, Ron DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead. If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win. Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. Dear Peter,

I know today is Saturday, but I wanted to reach out and personally thank you for your incredible support this last month. Thanks to you, we have continued to build incredible momentum, and we surpassed our November fundraising goal!

**Your belief in this campaign never ceases to amaze me, and I am so grateful for you, Peter.**

As we enter the last month of 2023, I am reflecting on everything we have built in Orange County: Grassroots supporters who want a better future for this community. A future that puts their families first instead of corporate and special interests. A future that is bright.

That future has never felt more real to me than in this moment, and it is all because of this incredible team. This campaign is powered by you, and I want to win for you.

It is up to you and me to ensure we keep up this momentum through December and into 2024. body:
We want to explain just how critical these messages are to ensuring we re-elect Joe Biden in 2024. | | |
---
Peter -- We sent a number of fundraising emails at the end of November. And because we still need your help -- especially in an FEC deadline month -- we thought it was important to explain just how critical these messages are to ensuring we reelect Joe Biden in 2024. Here we go: As you read this, Republican candidates for President and their outside spending groups are spending millions in states across the country attacking President Biden with negative ad after negative ad. If you live in one of those states, you've no doubt seen them -- and their frequency. Obviously, we have to fight back if we’re going to win this race. What you may not know is that the overwhelming majority of the donations to President Biden's reelection come from lots and lots of people chipping in smaller amounts of money. **And there is no greater source of those donations than emails like this.** So when you see us on the air defending the President; when you see our organizing efforts in communities like yours; when you see our poll numbers rise nationally and in swing states, please know it's the response to emails like this one that make it possible. **We simply couldn't do it without these messages.** [Please use this link to contribute $25 to President Biden's reelection campaign today. clean_body: We want to explain just how critical these messages are to ensuring we re-elect Joe Biden in 2024. | | | Peter -- We sent a number of fundraising emails at the end of November. And because we still need your help -- especially in an FEC deadline month -- we thought it was important to explain just how critical these messages are to ensuring we reelect Joe Biden in 2024. Here we go: As you read this, Republican candidates for President and their outside spending groups are spending millions in states across the country attacking President Biden with negative ad after negative ad. If you live in one of those states, you've no doubt seen them -- and their frequency. Obviously, we have to fight back if we’re going to win this race. What you may not know is that the overwhelming majority of the donations to President Biden's reelection come from lots and lots of people chipping in smaller amounts of money. And there is no greater source of those donations than emails like this. So when you see us on the air defending the President; when you see our organizing efforts in communities like yours; when you see our poll numbers rise nationally and in swing states, please know it's the response to emails like this one that make it possible. We simply couldn't do it without these messages. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We don't expect you to give to every email we send. But with the attacks ramping up against President Biden, we're hoping you will give to this one. Especially in an FEC deadline month. Thank you so much, Team Joe | |

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: I won’t sit on the sidelines
body:
| | | I’ve served on the front lines as a Green Beret.

I’ve seen America’s enemies firsthand, and I understand the threat they pose better than most.

**I’ve had to get inside the enemy’s head and product their next move in order to win.**

**I know America’s enemies like few others do, so trust me when I say: our national security is at risk. **

Joe Biden is rolling out the red carpet for our enemies and letting them get stronger while America falters.

[ I love our country too much to let the inept Biden administration serve it up to our enemies on a silver platter.](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=b121f8f473144cceb9970dd08346ec01&_e=qIvzDchfzTglU64oL4VrIbohAQBHlrEJ6mXT7jQImX7VS8_CFULvKAoyVbDNtp3Py0IHr41bApKLsRR8sDVmnvB4duczOfXxtqN_vKJ046s0ykF61tfz3w77zpe_vlpGqu9uSpjrsyx2T2D-QMM9waoGP1dARgPZCEXqnthNsNrgVRtChmcC5jYp1-S9FiO4kj9eVto6sPdlMOsNTbS0y0RxqOO2Yulx4HZ6ow4WfEgE1-BJcZzoHY8A-l43d0dU1dZnx1Zd7awEzzrJDl31JaRRdYYEjPMTQi3Kz2N8kBbGocuqUvD29av7Lz4koL-cLKcYGO7hmv2umHlau6VpuN8cSkOmwo7ecbI0xBBOQa4i8S8nyUsx1a3D2IDYBKZ5)

Every single American should be _extremely_ concerned about this.

No President in our history has put Americans at risk as much as Joe Biden has.

It’s absolutely despicable, but Democrats in Congress continue to sign onto his agenda of weakness.

**America is a laughing stock on the world stage, and it’s Joe Biden’s fault.**

It’s up to Republicans in Congress to make up for Joe Biden’s weakness, and we’re counting on you to help us hold our majority.

clean_body: | | | I’ve served on the front lines as a Green Beret. I’ve seen America’s enemies firsthand, and I understand the threat they pose better than most. I’ve had to get inside the enemy’s head and product their next move in order to win. I know America’s enemies like few others do, so trust me when I say: our national security is at risk. Joe Biden is rolling out the red carpet for our enemies and letting them get stronger while America falters. Join me today to KEEP AMERICA STRONG and STAND UP to our enemies. Every single American should be extremely concerned about this. No President in our history has put Americans at risk as much as Joe Biden has. It’s absolutely despicable, but Democrats in Congress continue to sign onto his agenda of weakness. America is a laughing stock on the world stage, and it’s Joe Biden’s fault. It’s up to Republicans in Congress to make up for Joe Biden’s weakness, and we’re counting on you to help us hold our majority. | | De Oppresso Liber , Col. Peter,
Juan Ciscomani is at it again.
This time, he’s teaming up with MAGA extremists to allow Big Oil to drill, mine, and pollute Tribal cultural lands.
In June, the Biden Administration protected the Chaco Culture National Historical Park from future leasing and mining claims. This land has deep historical and cultural value to Pueblo and Tribal Nations. It is home to structures that date back thousands of years — a living landscape that could be irrevocably damaged by mineral development.
Nonetheless, Ciscomani joined Paul Gosar, Eli Crane, and other MAGA extremists on an amendment to override the Biden Administration’s protections for this sacred Tribal land.
Ciscomani might not be willing to stand up to Big Oil — but we are.
We created a petition to protect the Chaco Culture National Historical Park from new polluting and mining projects. Will you join us by signing on now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/aRIGQqKaCEqjbntaIFF05w2]

name: =?utf-8?Q?State=20Representative=20Ryan=20Chamberlin?=
subject: Weekly Newsletter
body:
Update from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/voteryanchamberlin/conservative-businessman-ryan-chamberlin-12665402?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | | **UPDATE FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| **My fellow Floridians,**

**I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Thanksgiving with family and friends!** The holiday season is such a wonderful time of year. **December is going to be a busy month for me.** Over the next two weeks, I will be in Tallahassee for interim committee meetings. **I look forward to sharing with you what we are accomplishing for our communities and state.** I am so proud to represent Marion County!

**Thank you for reading this update!** Your support and encouragement mean a great deal to me.**If there is something I can do for you in the Florida House, please do not hesitate to reach out.** It would be an honor to address your concerns in Tallahassee.
---
| | **HB 599: Gender Identity Employment Practices**
---
|
---
| **In this week’s update, I want to talk to you about the landmark legislation I filed in the Florida House that will reinforce biological facts in government workplaces.** HB 599 will prevent state and municipal employees from being required, as a condition of employment, to refer to another person using a preferred pronoun that does not align with his or her biological gender. **Additionally, the bill will prohibit an employee from providing a preferred pronoun to an employer that does not correspond to his or her biological gender.** The legislation will also forbid state-funded nonprofit organizations from requiring LGBTQ-related training as a condition of employment.

**This bill will build on the good work that has already been accomplished in the Florida Legislature to keep woke gender ideology out of the Sunshine State.** I know fighting for this legislation will not be easy, but I am committed to seeing it through until it lands on Gov. Ron DeSantis’s desk. **This is an important issue to me, and I know it is an important issue to many God-fearing Floridians.** It is a privilege to fight for what is right in Tallahassee.

**Click[here](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=5f44e224bf&e=d1c1b9864f) to read the full version of the bill.**

**Since filing this legislation, I have had the opportunity to speak on HB 599 and explain its function and importance in our state.** This week, I was interviewed by **WINK News** to share more about what the bill means for government employees and state-funding nonprofits. **You can read the article[here](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=49d1dfcb04&e=d1c1b9864f)!**
---
| | **MY INTERVIEW WITH TODD STARNES WITH NEWSMAX**
---
| [ ](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=57ee619f97&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| | _**CLICK THE BUTTON ABOVE TO PLAY THE INTERVIEW ON FACEBOOK**_
---
| **Recently, Todd Starnes of NewsMax interviewed me on his podcast. The topic of discussion was my bill, HB 599 - Gender Identity Employment Practices.** Please take a moment to listen to the complete interview by clicking the image above.

**We are taking a stand in Florida against the radical left's attempts to control other's beliefs and make them participants in their delusional ideology.**
---
|
---
| It was great to spend time in the district with my family this week, but starting next week, I will be back in Tallahassee working hard for you.**I look forward to the great things we conservatives will get done for Floridians in our Capital City. **I hope everyone has a great weekend!

Truly yours,
**Representative Ryan Chamberlin**
---
|
---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=a31dbc9a20&e=d1c1b9864f "LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE")
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._
Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative526 E Park AveTallahassee, FL 32301-2568
[Add us to your address book](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=798ab36a48) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=798ab36a48).

---

clean_body: For the first time EVER, we missed a fundraising goal and fell over $24,500 short of our $150,000 end-of-November goal and what we need to finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress. Hello, FIRST: For the first time EVER, we missed a fundraising goal and fell over $24,500 short of our $150,000 end-of-November goal and what we need to finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress. THEN: We extended our deadline so that we could make up the shortfall and help Adam Frisch defeat Lauren Boebert. BUT NOW: With less than 13 hours left until our extended deadline, we’re still $11,637 away from closing the gap and raising what we need to defeat Lauren Boebert! This was the closest race in the entire country last year. If everyone who reads this email chips in even just a few dollars right now, we will blow past our goal with no problem. But we need grassroots donors like you to give now if Adam is going to finally send Lauren Boebert packing. So what do you say? Will you chip in right now so that we can make up our budget shortfall and ensure Adam Frisch has the resources he needs to defeat Lauren Boebert? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’re so grateful for the support we’ve received so far. But we’ll only be able to win this race and send Lauren Boebert packing with the help of grassroots donors like you now. Thank you for helping push us across the finish line in hitting this goal, Team Frisch ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado.
