name: Alex DeGrasse
subject: This could decide who controls the House next year
body:
And it might require a Christmas miracle...
| Fellow American, here are the facts: We narrowly missed our $25,000 goal to end November, and unless we turn our numbers around immediately, we are going to be fighting to win the most hotly contested races in the country in 2024 with one arm tied behind our back. But the battle is not lost yet. _**I just got off the phone with Chairwoman Elise Stefanik and if we bring in $100,000 in the first week of December we will still be on track to end 2023 with the resources needed to fully fund our voter turnout initiatives in the beginning of 2024.**_ I am not going to lie to you, this is a big ask, and it may take a Christmas miracle to make it happen, but if every one of our GOP grassroots supporters steps up to the plate we will reach our goal. By contributing to the House GOP Battleground Fund you are deciding to join the fight to hold the line and protect the House of Representatives from falling into the hands of Left-Wing Radicals. Your support will help America First candidates across the country level the playing field in their elections against Democrats whose campaigns are funded by Leftist Globalists.
---
| [ **DEFEND THE MAJORITY** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=80b4c7961c1d4c92b9e81dfba8616d71&_e=fPy26a2NDEZi4oAQwPujYynTJpuYUTC2x9oYqmpy883Io8Xy16PThIQBmDwwHNgSsw-bEQhjfxIjYsyVklen3l6w8cnw-cOWH5jFKHvbber8wI3_NOUd3JULLhK3bIYrlHEMLp95jN_UqH9nwQTm05SPFu0wH6T9oIqg7KWtfxHh1myORqsCFkVcurBOjS0HtEZmAEKMcYNwiKrwtuO5uM9uCN4qi9gR1m8eUzCpVL-K8-_xncn0bpiX8VHzHL3GO9M85hRUmF1KSB1Ail4WXO7FPcqcnuVo41fV70aNzNwR2xs_JlNpNRzPScftK7Oq-RELx8ZMSZoyTgNeAXw4oQ%3D%3D)
---
I hope that we can count on you to have our backs at this pivotal moment. _Talk soon,_ Alex DeGrasse Executive Director, House GOP Battleground Fund
| **Paid for by House GOP Battleground Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress, E-PAC, and NY Republican Federal Campaign Committee.** **[https://gopbattlegroundfund.com/](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=80b4c7961c1d4c92b9e81dfba8616d71&_e=fPy26a2NDEZi4oAQwPujY0mPc3cZNNCTLYFh55a7Wt0cf9q-rOwvpi_dN2bbFf2uEh3pI8mNJbRcxnU6XoUpC2x4KlKf85RzlTHoGOxbZuv5ZKeXr_bNoFgq9gRxNRle5t1XVIYhjB825WoPQO0wpydbSB12QmKnPrMpmMwcGG_9Jd1QML3c4pmoci1ZvrW25uNk0xwVal6ppaz175DA1WA6rEStiqP6Q78CNZsOXIs%3D)**

Thank you, Peter!

We just finished crunching the numbers, and I’m ecstatic to share that we met our fundraising goal for the month of November.

Knowing I can count on our support is humbling, and it inspires us every day to keep working to flip this seat.

Our Republican opposition is doing everything possible to sink our campaign. But with your help, we continue to show resilience and prove we have the momentum and widespread support to win this race.

In spite of all the chaos and noise coming out of Washington, I’ve never felt more determined and focused on the work ahead. It’s clear voters in CA-27 are ready for some community-centered and forward-thinking leadership. **Your support is putting us one step closer to making that a reality.**

I can’t thank you enough.

George

# Exciting Campaign Update in TWO DAYS on Zoom with Ryan Binkley.

We are just two days away from the Binkley Brigade update with Ryan. Please join us on Zoom for an important meeting this Monday, December 4 at **8:00 pm CT / 9:00 PM ET**

The Binkley 2024 Campaign is gaining momentum as we enter the primary season. During our call, we will cover major updates from Ryan personally, and share how you can help.

You won't want to miss this important call with Ryan & Team Binkley 2024!

Be sure to RSVP at the link below.

body:
We wanted to quickly bump John’s message about getting a big jump on our December fundraising. The truth is, things tend to really slow down once we get passed mid-December because folks are worrying about the holidays and politics tends to fade from a lot of people’s minds.
__ | | | We wanted to quickly bump John’s message about getting a big jump on our December fundraising. The truth is, things tend to really slow down once we get passed mid-December because folks are worrying about the holidays and politics tends to fade from a lot of people’s minds. But now that multiple extremists have jumped into the race to replace Ken Buck, we don’t have the luxury of slowing down. [**So we’re asking for $5 or $10 today to help John get a head start on December fundraising to keep up in this race.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=9780cb2b21f442edb78c63b23e5a1d85&_e=UVWtIATLBrl9kxu0YJ39TjHeXA_r9bY6pugkN9gF0odJ6NqEmWcIbci_A2rpSj7bKwlFs8KY12CriuM0GpT6FaXUjUt18lLw08MrOC2f82li5iX_GX4hiRun3EqCnVfupF22n8LZmB57ybENXWKunDbjGO8Q_38R6suvo-XtLPdNJl-9-FXPLUGHINO0XVfD27ILPdCryJtQFFCTmPLMwae0lo8B7lRfGdhGgM8PkihblKG-_T_LmGBTPDTc766tieYjuYUrDGxK1-rkbntACaetnY0PcH2aDj2gO4YVp5JHJDpO5jXBH5HQYyYIYXX2dq7GqbPVIpRmuLWV-y_YaOMWCS4hkSouovEzpCkrBWyrpz9FRKKjSuksOCiAZC8jtwwcKHPGvGTZcBU8mtZymw%3D%3D) Thanks for anything you can give. – Padora Finance Team \------ Begin original message ------ [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=9780cb2b21f442edb78c63b23e5a1d85&_e=UVWtIATLBrl9kxu0YJ39TjHeXA_r9bY6pugkN9gF0odJ6NqEmWcIbci_A2rpSj7bKwlFs8KY12CriuM0GpT6FaXUjUt18lLw08MrOC2f82li5iX_GX4hiRun3EqCnVfupF22n8LZmB57ybENXWKunDbjGO8Q_38R6suvo-XtLPdNJl-9-FXPLUGHINO0XVfD27ILPdCryJtQFFCTmPLMwae0lo8B7lRfGdhGgM8PkihblKG-_T_LmGBTPDTc766tefgPs-OdCxlSZ8ofTtAsdk2NpP3nSLzpmK5c-OM-idCCh4Oj5M0dLxEQHCUm2fOyRey3mIHIqRpo_clnEtBboK0EzNMlYRCAnp3Wml95x4bTk95srQXeXeajUOjfuDA7R1GU5fyAlou3q_t7n9wNRw%3D%3D) Folks, First of all, I wanted to thank each and every one of you for supporting my campaign this past month. With the holidays, a lot of folks prioritize their spending away from political campaigns. So we need to do everything we can to hit our goals before that holiday lull kicks in. Hi there,

I’m reaching out this afternoon with a heartfelt thank you. **Thanks to your support last month, our campaign surpassed our November fundraising goal.**

With just a few weeks left until our election year ramps up, this milestone is crucial. With your help, I can continue to meet voters across AZ-01 – at their doorstep, at community events, and over the phone or emails like this one.

Our momentum is strong as we head into the end of the year – and our final FEC reporting deadline of 2023. We have achieved so much together thus far, and David Schweikert and the national GOP alike know that we are a force to be reckoned with because we can flip this seat blue.

Political experts have ranked AZ-01 as one of the most competitive races in the nation. Schweikert continues to spout his far-right extremism at every opportunity. **Despite all the noise, my focus remains on giving Arizonans the fearless truthful leader they deserve in Congress.**

So as we charge ahead in this campaign and as you and your families enjoy the holiday season, please know that I am grateful for your support.

Thank you,

Marlene

clean_body: | = = Hi there, I’m reaching out this afternoon with a heartfelt thank you. Thanks to your support last month, our campaign surpassed our November fundraising goal. With just a few weeks left until our election year ramps up, this milestone is crucial. With your help, I can continue to meet voters across AZ-01 – at their doorstep, at community events, and over the phone or emails like this one. Our momentum is strong as we head into the end of the year – and our final FEC reporting deadline of 2023. We have achieved so much together thus far, and David Schweikert and the national GOP alike know that we are a force to be reckoned with because we can flip this seat blue. Political experts have ranked AZ-01 as one of the most competitive races in the nation. Schweikert continues to spout his far-right extremism at every opportunity. Despite all the noise, my focus remains on giving Arizonans the fearless truthful leader they deserve in Congress. So as we charge ahead in this campaign and as you and your families enjoy the holiday season, please know that I am grateful for your support. Thank you, Marlene | **=** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Current and retired Supreme Court justices reflected on Sandra Day O’Connor’s legacy Friday after her passing. O’Connor died Friday morning at 93 from complications related to dementia, “probably Alzheimer’s, and a respiratory illness,” the court announced in a statement. The justices each shared a few words about her life Friday, with those who served during her tenure on the Court from 1981 to 2006

Peter,

Back in January, House Republicans promised that we would change the way Washington works with a strong majority.

We promised that we would "bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud, and corruption of the Biden Administration."

The year has gone by in a flash, and much has changed, including my role as your new Speaker. But one thing remains the same... **we've been busy working for YOU every single day since we were sworn into the majority.**

**The work that we're doing every day in the House is only possible because of you, Peter.**

From day one, we've been working to identify government waste and eliminate it. And since that first moment we were sworn in, we've taken the actions to end corruption.

Almost a year in, I'm curious to know how you think we're doing. [**_Would you mind sparing a moment of your time today to fill out our yearly report card? We need to know if you're satisfied with the job we're doing._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c3ee7d8a019c4bdfbe6923fe6200b2c7&_e=PQu2HgnE-6mPMHf8xTHSemXHi93kspVvWn557lQWSrCyAQtw__d97TGyyFsjezGsP4rUmOpYdQmW4gR8I4bxQKLvhRd0rH979NZw0aOJeVw9i5Z8cRF_sbqTRkmvVS1I0tiNQB1wfY9eqmN5en4A46irNbmrH37hQ1AAJPvcGitZOz74OoE9NaDHlMbqnHA6q86Ro51ZgOHv3r_n24cTuP0QN8VAzTAO4VyltCWOHNRXkAzuQ5oVKKxUWse3wKzCkQTm48FqI1IEwyUYRRexRBLHaZinCH10MDHrNrTYNRQ0O-ewr94JYU8d5bfcRuhyn66O0E4-DrgOzsEi9DlIToK_ECur8wNrz3SDjbEr7cn-TKuuKRb8nQAV1vjdNVoSzi1lmXh6e4iuK-ldsVrq7w%3D%3D)

_**-Grade the Republican Majority-**_ [** Fill Out Report Card Now **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c3ee7d8a019c4bdfbe6923fe6200b2c7&_e=PQu2HgnE-6mPMHf8xTHSemXHi93kspVvWn557lQWSrCyAQtw__d97TGyyFsjezGsP4rUmOpYdQmW4gR8I4bxQKLvhRd0rH979NZw0aOJeVw9i5Z8cRF_sbqTRkmvVS1I0tiNQB1wfY9eqmN5en4A46irNbmrH37hQ1AAJPvcGitZOz74OoE9NaDHlMbqnHA6q86Ro51ZgOHv3r_n24cTuP0QN8VAzTAO4VyltCWOHNRXkAzuQ5oVKKxUWse3wKzCsJknpVCIVXt7dHxi3T57Gnre_vUUioZDfnJ80ohdohzEvXC7fsWX6l-d0taq-7pcbRVEDO9detMz5q90Z97Qev_OAmpt0t0gteCOG-_CBzBfRsDRPKKU6Zke21H8rkXcwVDCFbvKttUlPJ44HQtf0g%3D%3D)

Thank you,

[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c3ee7d8a019c4bdfbe6923fe6200b2c7&_e=PQu2HgnE-6mPMHf8xTHSemXHi93kspVvWn557lQWSrCyAQtw__d97TGyyFsjezGsP4rUmOpYdQmW4gR8I4bxQKLvhRd0rH979NZw0aOJeVw9i5Z8cRF_sbqTRkmvVS1I0tiNQB1wfY9eqmN5en4A46irNbmrH37hQ1AAJPvcGitZOz74OoE9NaDHlMbqnHA6q86Ro51ZgOHv3r_n24cTuP0QN8VAzTAO4VyltCWOHNRXkAzuQ5oVKKxUWse3wKzCbLwFv-4KoqAsPc6Rv42UCQBYuYfjvUi2awVscYYVLIF-dBgfoKexslMbwNvSe1TAKnipv9rORFOFQNIrvo0NmnUZsRgmqUJ81U-Y0HlKtmfy9wq-gId8EH6LnSPfu9bYJ7LntvVkWZ-AorVEODUVUQ%3D%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

* * *

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**

clean_body: Almost one year into the Majority, we’re curious to know how you think we’re doing. | | Peter, Back in January, House Republicans promised that we would change the way Washington works with a strong majority. We promised that we would "bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud, and corruption of the Biden Administration." The year has gone by in a flash, and much has changed, including my role as your new Speaker. But one thing remains the same... we've been busy working for YOU every single day since we were sworn into the majority. The work that we're doing every day in the House is only possible because of you, Peter. From day one, we've been working to identify government waste and eliminate it. And since that first moment we were sworn in, we've taken the actions to end corruption. Almost a year in, I'm curious to know how you think we're doing. -Grade the Republican Majority- Thank you, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? body:
urgent updates from our campaign that I need to share with you today
| | |

Hi, friend, it's Debbie. First, I want to thank you for supporting my grassroots campaign. I cannot express how much your belief in my campaign — and your willingness to fight for a better future for Florida — means to me.
There are some urgent updates from our campaign that I need to share with you today, so I'll get right to it:
* Election experts have been saying for months that Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators in 2024. **Our campaign is polling ONE POINT ahead of him.**

* On the heels of that poll, we did what many people said was impossible: **_Last quarter, w_** _**e outraised Rick Scott,**_ an entrenched incumbent with a multimillion-dollar fortune!

* **Rick Scott could write himself a massive check at _any moment_** to retake the fundraising advantage. We have to be ready.

Control of the Senate could all come down to what happens right here in Florida. We cannot waste this opportunity to flip Florida blue and secure our Senate majority. **[So please, friend, I'm asking you to dig deep today and help me keep this momentum going by rushing a $5 donation before midnight tonight. Every dollar gets us closer to defeating Rick Scott.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74467211/441670374/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk380-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGMxNzNjYjItNDU5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LuaE5IfmVUQAT0Sh4E1TxEWBdP1lYmH7VAOBmlIzmp8=)**

subject: ‘It’s Not Right’:Blue City Struggles To Keep Up With Homeless, Migrant Crises
body:
American BriefingAnd ‘Full Of Grace And Grit’: Current, Retired
Supreme Court Justices Reflect On Death Of First Female Justice

And ‘Full Of Grace And Grit’: Current, Retired Supreme
Court Justices Reflect On Death Of First Female Justice

‘It’s Not Right’: Blue City Struggles To Keep Up With Homeless,
Migrant Crises

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2uofss778u4obqgfpfc2u16epqrq2o3cjudli50_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr4cjkmkpj9ctn6ej3fddnkionctd3muonb8jkmsob2td266qnadd66ion9td6e5p7atpn66qjctd1euqqdd9l61qqas3lktqb2s5lk2rrbd9hmkr7ctd5mirj4t1jm5qqccjkmpqjctt246h22sh2s8i6eo34clhm8or4clh2bs

http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4s0as9euo4m4ndjh21dcct2r0hv519udnva0lgo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr4cjkmkpj9ctn6ej3fddnkionctd3muonb8jkmsob2td266qnadd66ion9td6e5p7atpn66qjctd1euqqdd9l61qqas3lktqb2s5lk2rrbd9hmkr7ctd5mirj4t1jm5qqccjkmpqjctt246h22sh2s8i6eo34clhm8or4clh2bs

Thousands of miles north, Maine’s largest city faces a two-pronged
crisis as a crush of illegal immigrants has overcrowded homeless
shelters and created sprawling tent cities where crime and open drug
use run rampant. The city received more than 1,000 migrants between

I wanted to be the one to share with you that we missed our putting our efforts to take back the White House AT RISK. But we still have one more chance, Peter. I’m sharing this information with you FIRST because I'm EXTENDING your Impact Increase for 1 HOUR. The RNC will play a central role in electing our next Republican President, but if you don’t step up for our Party, I’m afraid we’ll be outraised by Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats. | | | | Thank you and God bless you, | | | | | Ronna McDaniel Chairwoman, Republican National Committee Paid for by the Republican National Committee. body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1276%2E552475%2E8ImKHI)
Well Peter, we called on you and you stepped up -- the numbers are in, and thanks to supporters like you, we were able to close our fundraising gap.
**Thank you.** Whether or not you were able to make a contribution, reading our messages means you’re part of this team, and we appreciate you being by our side as we work to re-elect Bob Casey.
We’re back on track, but our work is far from over. We’re looking ahead to 2024, where we expect to have to compete with hundreds of millions of dollars in GOP spending.
**[So if you’re ready to stay in this fight with us, we hope you’ll consider chipping in your first donation today so we can keep up the fight in December and beyond.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231202-1?refcode=em20231202-1&refcode2=1276_552475_8ImKHI&akid=1276%2E552475%2E8ImKHI)**

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Now that November has officially ended, I wanted to reach out personally
to say thank you. For everything.

With your support, Justice Democrats surpassed our November goal of
raising $100,000 from emails just like this one.

I know we’ve been reaching out a lot over the last two months, and that’s
because the attacks on our progressive incumbents have been unlike ever
before.

By now you probably know that Republican-funded group AIPAC is planning to
spend $100 million over the course of the next year to try and unseat
Squad members like Summer Lee, Rashida Tlaib, Cori Bush, and Jamaal
Bowman.

It’s a lot to go up against, but we’ve done it before and won — directly
because of people like you supporting us with grassroots contributions.

This is a truly people-powered movement to create the change our
communities need and deserve, through bold legislation like Medicare for
All, a Green New Deal, and so much more. But if we’re going to achieve
that progress, we need to protect and expand our bloc of young, Black and
brown, working-class progressives who are fighting harder for these
changes than anyone else in Washington.

Over this final month of 2023, we’re gearing up for some tough fights
ahead in 2024. But with you by our side, I’m confident that we the people
will prevail against corporations and those who wish to maintain the
unfair status quo.

Thanks again,

Alexandra Rojas Executive Director

PS — If you’d like to help us get a jumpstart on our December grassroots
fundraising goal, [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231202.Ai9bPK&refcode=em20231202-32139&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32139%2E1203867%2EXyXqEx ]pitch in $3 or whatever you can today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231202.Ai9bPK&refcode=em20231202-32139&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32139%2E1203867%2EXyXqEx ]Contribute $3

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1003&akid=32139%2E1203867%2EXyXqEx ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1004&akid=32139%2E1203867%2EXyXqEx ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231202-32139-footer&t=1005&refcode2=32139_1203867_XyXqEx&akid=32139%2E1203867%2EXyXqEx

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=32139%2E1203867%2EXyXqEx

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Vandalized Home
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv2gf3hf9qgnqhkvngrjn47088tehns4n7oqvq8o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr8dhheirr7ctl6tr779hnmmrq6d9k65qn4t9h6uh60oj6cui64pt0c9jqcdtlm1oracbl66qfb9bjmtq34sjk6eonac9lk4qjbdd2eko7b9jk6jr7b83ieuqqcd9k6pqj6d5iekqq8dhheipn9djhepqq6t1jm4q33d5iukojb85nmmqjf8h1k8gn48n24hjm0p35cdi66oj1c8iv0

Democratic Rep. Adam Smith of Washington said his home was vandalized
Thursday night by pro Israel-Gaza ceasefire activists. Smith did not
detail how his home was vandalized in a statement. The vandalism came
on the day Israel resumed military operations against Hamas after
efforts to extend a truce cease-fire with the radical Islamic
terrorist group during which multiple groups of hostages were released
failed.

subject: Your last chance to act today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231202-2&t=1&akid=646%2E62735%2EC-CMmz)
Peter, Hill emailed you this morning (see the full message below).
Long story short, we set a $10,000 goal to prepare for attacks from ultra-wealthy donors and special interest groups who HATE that Hill refused to be bought and is speaking out against their corruption.
We’re almost there, but time’s running out to hit this goal before midnight tonight. **[Will you please rush a donation to help Hill take on big money and WIN?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-2?refcode=em20231202-2-646&refcode2=646_62735_C-CMmz&akid=646%2E62735%2EC-CMmz)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-2?amount=5&refcode=em20231202-2-646&refcode2=646_62735_C-CMmz&akid=646%2E62735%2EC-CMmz)**
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Hill Harper
Date: December 2nd, 2023
Subject: I went on MSNBC
_
Peter, did you catch me on ReidOut with MSNBC’s Joy Reid?
I was on to discuss the recent news that a major donor offered me $20 million dollars (!!!) to drop out of the Senate race and primary the only Palestinian member of Congress, Representative Rashida Tlaib, because she’s called for a ceasefire in Gaza.
**I turned it down.** I’ve been clear since Day 1 that I’m running to empower people, not lobbyists. That means uncorrupting our system where calls like this even happen.
Here’s the thing — not many candidates speak out against special interest groups like I have, because the truth is, it puts a target on your back.
**[I will not be bossed, bullied, or bought. But I need grassroots supporters to have my back on this. Will you show your support after watching this clip?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-2?refcode=em20231202-2-646&refcode2=646_62735_C-CMmz&akid=646%2E62735%2EC-CMmz)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-2?refcode=em20231202-2-646&refcode2=646_62735_C-CMmz&akid=646%2E62735%2EC-CMmz)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-2?amount=5&refcode=em20231202-2-646&refcode2=646_62735_C-CMmz&akid=646%2E62735%2EC-CMmz)**
Right now, my team is pushing to **[raise another $10,000 by midnight](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-2?refcode=em20231202-2-646&refcode2=646_62735_C-CMmz&akid=646%2E62735%2EC-CMmz)** to prepare for attacks from angry special interests.
Honestly, I’m excited, Peter. We have a real chance to show the wealthy donor class that not only can we be stronger enough to take them on, we’re serious about ending their corrupt influence.
**[If you’re with me in this fight, please pitch in anything you can.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231202-2?refcode=em20231202-2-646&refcode2=646_62735_C-CMmz&akid=646%2E62735%2EC-CMmz)**
Keep strong,
Hill

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Something I never felt before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
When I saw everything that we’d worked for in Afghanistan washed away in a matter of days, I decided to consider serving in government once again | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=be5de2e46a5d47bdae2114f4c440571b&_t=BWeQzNT2dezaI_aF75mTL1QuZ0w16NC6s3vjLqXluirnF1iVMTHFl2WLld5N_vx-D69mDd9iy5eMeQu332dUGbMbOveQGRROsMTGkfjlHEs%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=be5de2e46a5d47bdae2114f4c440571b&_t=BWeQzNT2dezaI_aF75mTL1QuZ0w16NC6s3vjLqXluirnF1iVMTHFl2WLld5N_vx-D69mDd9iy5eMeQu332dUGbMbOveQGRROsMTGkfjlHEs%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be5de2e46a5d47bdae2114f4c440571b&_e=HZi1PRMcWYmT_uNFbTB5BSRqWZZZ9GQoQqRELk6D2P_mu_vQ5X-LD4bqpONwcts-sfbUzRZKoa5gY4ksWZR8TVV388GorXG9a1AzD3xsxewtLjhVihubD5jSsgVdSTiZI9gjJ43MY9DARPqVkzB2DdO6qJurrGSRvh74JnSRi_Q2YeurWNTRluE-CKA--dhB-Mc7U2WhomKR2HhHomGkTgFy9xF1tKGM-TJB7trmttYq0wT_HUXH2hpzu0PiCxxnHDRPaLfqIirI7EXyJn4VgCT9QaTcQkeP5syb-UD3mRDatMmgB0Ybs8vkhwmj2ZC_EHK37kIkPIjfjVVyoLQGnkQkcWTvw8i_7Jzwy5wwQGDF0oEKXEAnXkOzW6DqLRkLDb7aoMvadbNqsOqKNcJh3q2trnVXk21YxgZGX6yo7s4%3D)

Peter,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be5de2e46a5d47bdae2114f4c440571b&_e=HZi1PRMcWYmT_uNFbTB5BSRqWZZZ9GQoQqRELk6D2P_mu_vQ5X-LD4bqpONwcts-sfbUzRZKoa5gY4ksWZR8TVV388GorXG9a1AzD3xsxewtLjhVihubD5jSsgVdSTiZI9gjJ43MY9DARPqVkzB2DdO6qJurrGSRvh74JnSRi_Q2YeurWNTRluE-CKA--dhB-Mc7U2WhomKR2HhHomGkTgFy9xF1tKGM-TJB7trmttYq0wT_HUXH2hpzu0PiCxxnHDRPaLfqIirI7EXyJn4VgDJhUDiqPNay_c5Rb4elbFQRWdwBN79kYMPbX6GFpRb2Dste_ausAg2FHtmaxb-6I06K23AnEcy3s1gGXMN7waPJ69WZLr81byctuFXcsLKlUIp3kFClU2RBMk-kHFFeR9oOiW3qo8z566jLq6dT9aE%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be5de2e46a5d47bdae2114f4c440571b&_e=HZi1PRMcWYmT_uNFbTB5BSRqWZZZ9GQoQqRELk6D2P_mu_vQ5X-LD4bqpONwcts-sfbUzRZKoa5gY4ksWZR8TVV388GorXG9a1AzD3xsxewtLjhVihubD5jSsgVdSTiZI9gjJ43MY9DARPqVkzB2DdO6qJurrGSRvh74JnSRi_Q2YeurWNTRluE-CKA--dhB-Mc7U2WhomKR2HhHomGkTgFy9xF1tKGM-TJB7trmttYq0wT_HUXH2hpzu0PiCxxnHDRPaLfqIirI7EXyJn4VgDKkPHvU8K6QFvJB2_swR0TQfrG8Qv8TOXMUBnGFQiaMEMkQ2FCv3VLgEwCzo7Ga2G1zPebI7CKSJWZJ9uVICaGjQUacKIoO6dlklyT7EJG-2V7SqauMZmBMXVfTGPQvUlAdIlPPpeBMaxWRAIRijkI%3D)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

**If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right.** If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, **[please do me a quick favor and confirm that I have the correct information on file for you](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be5de2e46a5d47bdae2114f4c440571b&_e=HZi1PRMcWYmT_uNFbTB5BSRqWZZZ9GQoQqRELk6D2P_mu_vQ5X-LD4bqpONwcts-9Bnx6owKKa76Vw5f1FBkq5UZLm-QJTaQ9vDr7bx1o-dEtoVMpt06fvttAHS61RWmurnPrNwJZLliYnzIVia8MSchxfETWDeRAbdGoQ_SBdsyP9MLG2m9szpqo5c9EdN5-ar6CpTacSOaS2AAJb28wgErK2b7Ww7uoeB4fJjD7xNiQBElFXZ5zOEvz5LUQhSmXZ5NxAp0H-Vwpd8nXKMg1aEBdOHQwWr09ocFSDCgj7RXAc6Zf_ec5quzV5eb9e1_9Z2idhpDhsK3Ihfk3LcWFWnMlu6oSKwWXPKQSrVVeVuDnZgMT6XLBBPAxL5uCx8WByxrfxGzElJD06s1WqxXGc2AfktS9WWQ0GZxa1tuCQ8%3D)** ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy.

[**JOIN OUR FIGHT

CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT TODAY->** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be5de2e46a5d47bdae2114f4c440571b&_e=HZi1PRMcWYmT_uNFbTB5BSRqWZZZ9GQoQqRELk6D2P_mu_vQ5X-LD4bqpONwcts-sfbUzRZKoa5gY4ksWZR8TVV388GorXG9a1AzD3xsxewtLjhVihubD5jSsgVdSTiZI9gjJ43MY9DARPqVkzB2DdO6qJurrGSRvh74JnSRi_Q2YeurWNTRluE-CKA--dhB-Mc7U2WhomKR2HhHomGkTgFy9xF1tKGM-TJB7trmttYq0wT_HUXH2hpzu0PiCxxnHDRPaLfqIirI7EXyJn4VgG-g2RNUsXIO70XxiV5UWwUCuzYOI_IX6SawMp8Utuhg_MdE62LzQ0V7RegWxX9TVinOXyMuoT1_T931zOGZyYlhSU-gWQCIIqN8cEAy7RGHcGd4THYKqHgswlnG6yMxr4udOTwlZ10RL7-PD4qOnzU%3D)

I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, **[I’m going to need the help of every conservative donor who reads this letter.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be5de2e46a5d47bdae2114f4c440571b&_e=HZi1PRMcWYmT_uNFbTB5BSRqWZZZ9GQoQqRELk6D2P_mu_vQ5X-LD4bqpONwcts-sfbUzRZKoa5gY4ksWZR8TVV388GorXG9a1AzD3xsxewtLjhVihubD5jSsgVdSTiZI9gjJ43MY9DARPqVkzB2DdO6qJurrGSRvh74JnSRi_Q2YeurWNTRluE-CKA--dhB-Mc7U2WhomKR2HhHomGkTgFy9xF1tKGM-TJB7trmttYq0wT_HUXH2hpzu0PiCxxnHDRPaLfqIirI7EXyJn4VgMxpphI8wiB0DgfVX2eanZ1VB_yGUvNeJul310uBdU44zJ1jT1gkCbJj--LBpV944OenXUfIMfEE1ABr4L58Xy7m7V3yqMzLmwOf3c9bhvE_gV8dK-BxbKjCcBQADyYzk6G9JuEWaBl7JCs15VaJ4Ek%3D) **

Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, _**I was there.**_ We fought in Afghanistan, _**I was there.**_

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to look at my children and tell them, _**“Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.”**_

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=be5de2e46a5d47bdae2114f4c440571b&_e=HZi1PRMcWYmT_uNFbTB5BSRqWZZZ9GQoQqRELk6D2P_mu_vQ5X-LD4bqpONwcts-sfbUzRZKoa5gY4ksWZR8TVV388GorXG9a1AzD3xsxewtLjhVihubD5jSsgVdSTiZI9gjJ43MY9DARPqVkzB2DdO6qJurrGSRvh74JnSRi_Q2YeurWNTRluE-CKA--dhB-Mc7U2WhomKR2HhHomGkTgFy9xF1tKGM-TJB7trmttYq0wT_HUXH2hpzu0PiCxxnHDRPaLfqIirI7EXyJn4VgN4DB9yTRgd7gkRfo1jVs3yJVPs0iWRaLZYrkJEIRh-uISTcRnUZVtsg-YrjIo7972IQaiSGxSnSEM4Lj4032F1OfZ8gKm7S8znCk_rAJTA5jZ-8bUBi3HLPEuG9o3FXqYislZsx5ozMJbgJJAenNxc%3D)
**But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.**

So, Peter \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain.

clean_body: When I saw everything that we’d worked for in Afghanistan washed away in a matter of days, I decided to consider serving in government once again | | Peter, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, “I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’” Every day it got worse. Every day it was a disaster. The adult in the room never materialized. Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport. Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.” I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil. If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right. If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy. It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision; but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes. We fought in Iraq, I was there. We fought in Afghanistan, I was there. And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times. I want to look at my children and tell them, “Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.” But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it. So, Peter \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain. name: Katie Porter
subject: $25 an hour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Derek, the federal minimum wage has been stuck at $7.25 since 2009.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=34106%2E3422442%2EpYXX-L)
Derek, the federal minimum wage has been stuck at $7.25 since 2009, and while California and other states have higher minimums, $15 or $16 an hour still isn’t enough for families to live off of.
**We should boost the minimum wage to $20 per hour nationally and $25 per hour in California, both indexed to inflation.[If you’re with me, can you sign my petition in support of a higher minimum wage?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-minimum-wage/?source=EMAO23_1_MWG_20231202_V1_F&akid=34106%2E3422442%2EpYXX-L)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-minimum-wage/?source=EMAO23_1_MWG_20231202_V1_F&akid=34106%2E3422442%2EpYXX-L)
I’m fighting to lower the cost of the things people need to survive and succeed—everything from housing, to groceries, healthcare, and college. But we also have to put more money back into people’s pockets. Boosting the minimum wage does exactly that. It would directly affect nearly 1 in 5 California workers.
We’ve been stuck at $7.25 because corporations have too much influence in Washington. But the profits we’re seeing from multinational corporations don’t lie: these companies can afford to pay the people who power them a living wage.
**[Can you sign on to my petition to show your support?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-minimum-wage/?source=EMAO23_1_MWG_20231202_V1_F&akid=34106%2E3422442%2EpYXX-L)**
Thanks, Derek.
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_1_MWG_20231202_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=34106_3422442_pYXX-L&akid=34106%2E3422442%2EpYXX-L)**

### Henry Kissinger is finally in hell, where he belongs
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/a42be9b2-6fe4-4000-9c95-d4703ffe36c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=139370356&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5MzcwMzU2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcwMTU0NzAzNywiZXhwIjoxNzA0MTM5MDM3LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XNU2EGIsC3jhpQYtu9FbjBsFi3LhbYQpPvx6MrqQcPs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/the-long-arc-of-justice?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
This Wednesday, war criminal Henry Kissinger finally [died](https://substack.com/redirect/e29939ba-aa90-40af-8635-dfcf28bc1700?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Having rained death and destruction around the planet for decades, claimed powers far beyond his constitutional role, and escaped accountability for international human rights abuses from Laos to Chile, he died in relative peace at the ripe age of 100--proving the unfortunate reality that there is little justice to be found in this world.
But one might maintain some hope for justice beyond it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/07798bb7-d0ce-462b-9e48-2f345eb0851c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **A trail of corpses**
Kisisnger's primary legacy is the preventable death of millions, from southeast Asia to Latin America, who were driven to early graves by his decisions aiming to assert American hegemony over the globe.
Corporate journalists have long dedicated themselves to insulating war criminals from accountability. Share this post to challenge disinformation masquerading as news and educate your friends about history!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=139370356&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5MzcwMzU2LCJpYXQiOjE3MDE1NDcwMzcsImV4cCI6MTcwNDEzOTAzNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.98qtF6Ax_-fYBC_mS472gyIwha3_P3LqH_S1Xze2gwc)
Yale historian Greg Gandlin wrote _[Kissinger's Shadow](https://substack.com/redirect/9fc78ad3-8008-48d9-ad63-71ae45eb5f6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_, a powerful examination of the man's long trail of crimes against humanity. Gandlin wrote that 3-4 million people died due to Kissinger's machinations, which extended the Vietnam war both beyond when it could have otherwise ended, and also beyond the borders of Vietnam into neighboring countries subjected to horrifying civilian casualties in order to serve Kissinger's crass objectives.
America's vicious bombing of Laos and Cambodia were among the most gruesome and heinous crimes in human history. It [continues to haunt](https://substack.com/redirect/0bfc81c2-ef0a-4971-9c5f-ad59d14546bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the region to this day: almost one-third of Laos remains contaminated with unexploded ordnance. [According](https://substack.com/redirect/0bfc81c2-ef0a-4971-9c5f-ad59d14546bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to Cambodian American political scientist Sophal Ear, "To this day, there are people who...lose limb and life in the process of trying to make a living in a land that has been filled with bombs."
Over the course of the decade-long American campaign to bomb neutral countries adjacent to the one in which it waged an overt war of colonial occupation, [Washington dropped more bombs on Cambodia and Laos](https://substack.com/redirect/b6eaa50e-16ce-477d-ad06-e395a57fa8f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) than it deployed during the entirety of the Second World War. Laos tragically became the most bombed country in human history, even though it was not at war with anyone.
Cambodia and Laos were both neutral countries, which is to say the American bombing campaigns were overt violations of international law, acts of international aggression that should have revealed to the world the nature of Washington's work in the world.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ee98dee4-a4cf-4739-bad5-e5490381baa7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
https://twitter.com/ajenglish/status/1730961266838036606?
It's no wonder that Kissinger and his henchmen in Washington worked so hard to suppress the truth, and their role in the mass murder of millions. It was Kissinger who demonized renowned military whistleblower [Daniel Ellsberg](https://substack.com/redirect/45864dd5-9d60-4d72-b2b7-bfd0d1b8369c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who Nixon described before his eventual resignation as "[the most dangerous man in America](https://substack.com/redirect/b21a40cf-6417-4908-a6e1-c53ad2761577?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
The late Anthony Bourdain may have [most fairly described](https://substack.com/redirect/879371b4-2d1f-4e0d-979b-50859c8a62c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this phase of Kissinger's career:
> "Once you've been to Cambodia, you'll never stop wanting to beat Henry Kissinger to death with your bare hands. You will never again be able to open a newspaper and read about that treacherous, prevaricating, murderous scumbag sitting down for a nice chat with Charlie Rose or attending some black-tie affair for a new glossy magazine without choking. Witness what Henry did in Cambodia - the fruits of his genius for statesmanship - and you will never understand why he's not sitting in the dock at The Hague next to Milošević."
But Cambodia & Laos weren't the only places where Kissinger helped engineer the genocidal slaughter of civilians by the millions.
He did the same thing in my native country.
### **Yet another genocide **
In 1971, the military dictator in the country from which my parents had migrated--Pakistan--launched a genocidal massacre lasting nearly a year in what is now Bangladesh.
Pakistani President (and former Army Chief) Yahya Khan had imposed martial law in Pakistan two years before launching his genocidal Operation Searchlight. It killed between half a million and three million Bengalis, and forcibly displaced another eight million. It remains one of the world's most overlooked campaigns of genocide.
This mass murder and mayhem was a campaign of state violence orchestrated to contain the movement for self-determination among Bengalis that had been growing for years, and ultimately proved successful a year after Islamabad's invasion. Its goal was both simple and criminal: denying self-determination and imposing foreign rule on a civilian population that rejected it.
Khan was enabled by the Pakistani military, which owns a vastly disproportionate share of the country's resources and has established a decades-long habit of intervening to interrupt democracy at more or less the drop of a hat. Pakistani generals notoriously based their military industrial complex on that of the United States, and insulated themselves from accountability for their roles in human rights abuses and crimes against democracy.
But Khan--like so many other murderous despots around the world--was backed by Washington.
Kissinger's principal interest in Pakistan was courting China, with whom Islamabad had established close ties. Nixon, following Kissinger's guidance, looked the other way as the Pakistani military massacred millions of Bengalis.
Learn anything new here? Keep going! Sign up for a free subscription to stay informed. Paid subscriptions help expand my work.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..6c6tR41tEag9xsdDuInojJVFOtaFzr4pAU0gLRby1to?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=139370356)
Very little has changed in the time since then.
American interference with Pakistani politics remains prolific and undeterred [to this day](https://substack.com/redirect/5ff77d10-24d3-4653-9edb-3a7b025fba03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Earlier this year, Washington helped removed a democratically elected leader who rejected Washington's proxy war in Ukraine, and then lied about it before getting caught by investigative journalists. Ironically, that former Prime Minister, Imran Khan, shares the same last name as his predecessor whose genocide Washington instead chose to indulge due to Kissinger's substantial influence.
The only difference between Kissinger's support for genocide around the world over the past half century and [Biden's complicity with Netanyahu's genocidal campaign targeting Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/dca1e72e-9517-4b6e-a5b1-41ce339a3368?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) today is the scale of the destruction.
Can one fairly discern progress from today's genocides growing smaller than those of a previous era?
### **The legacy of September 11**
Most Americans recall September 11 as the date of the attacks in 2001 that felled the Twin Towers in New York City. Long before that day, and the [murderous legacy of American imperialism responding to it](https://substack.com/redirect/d5320ca9-6dc9-4261-b42d-e7a8668a99b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), September 11 had been memorialized around the world as an anniversary commemorating American belligerence and the CIA's work undermining democracy in the service of Wall Street.
On that day in 1973 (just two years after the massacre in Bangladesh, and while the Vietnam war continued to escalate), Kissinger directed the CIA to stage a coup in Chile. At the time, a recently democratically elected leader, President Salvador Allende, had promised to [nationalize copper reserves](https://substack.com/redirect/00987e39-6165-4fb3-ad01-0ce25034ee44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on which Wall Street relied.
Like many [other acts of American imperialism](https://substack.com/redirect/e5e9f349-b4f1-437e-adae-844c43e0cc63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the CIA's coup both directly and indirectly undermined environmental sustainability, casting worldwide harms indefinitely into the future to serve the aspirations of a handful of corrupt officials in Washington.
But Kissinger's attacks on democracy were not confined to foreign shores.
Three years after the coup in Santiago, a car bomb [exploded](https://substack.com/redirect/5a8173de-599f-4963-a23c-4d952034f4ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Washington, killing a Chilean diplomat and his American co-worker. Evidence implicated the regime of Augusto Pinchoet, who Kissinger had installed after the CIA's 1973 coup in order to ensure Wall Street's continued access to the country's copper exports. Before the bombing, Kissinger reviewed intelligence reports that Pinochet's government was hatching assassination plots targeting his international critics, but Kissinger [directed](https://substack.com/redirect/c1be784d-f186-4aba-aded-81596527d45a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the CIA not to pursue the intelligence any further, effectively inviting the lethal result.
The later history indicates how Kissinger's depravity institutionally influenced Washington long after he left office. Writing powerfully in Rolling Stone, Spencer Ackerman [explained](https://substack.com/redirect/59c76fe4-4b0c-4376-8eba-616314343cda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that:
> In 1999, Pinochet was arrested in London through an effort by Baltazar Garzon, a Spanish judge investigating Operation Condor. Kissinger urged the British not to extradite the general. "I would be very happy if Pinochet was allowed home," he told an interviewer. "This episode has gone on long enough and all my sympathies are with him." Two years later, the administration of George W. Bush responded contemptuously to the Chilean Supreme Court's efforts to compel Kissinger to testify. "It is unjust and ridiculous that a distinguished servant of this country should be harassed by foreign courts in this way," an official told the Daily Telegraph. The paper noted that Kissinger was an "informal adviser" to Bush, as he was to many presidents.
> Bush's declaration of protection for Kissinger, coupled with his rejection of the Rome Treaty on the International Criminal Court, extinguished a glimmer of hope that Kissinger would someday join Pinochet under arrest. It was always a fantasy. The international architecture that the U.S. and its allies established after World War II, shorthanded today as the "rules-based international order," somehow never gets around to applying the same pressure on a hegemonic United States as it applies to U.S.-hostile or defiant powers. It reflects the organizing principle of American exceptionalism: America acts; it is not acted upon. Henry Kissinger was a supreme architect of the rules-based international order.
### **Subverting democracy in Washington**
Rather than confine his influence to foreign policy, Kissinger also committed domestic constitutional crimes for which he was never held responsible.
His role [extending](https://substack.com/redirect/664f4561-b25c-472f-be9a-1c8070dd96e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the Vietnam War offers the most glaring example. Working with the Nixon campaign (which he had opposed until after Nixon won the 1968 Republican primary), Kissinger infamously used his ties to a diplomatic delegation negotiating peace talks with Vietnam to subvert the talks. Kissinger was concerned that if President Johnson were able to secure peace in Vietnam, it would swing the election to Democrats.
But Kissinger's orchestration of foreign policy directly undermining the Johnson White House was a constitutional crime akin to treason.
Kissinger also displayed a remarkable willingness to gaslight the public. He [lied to Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/0dc58511-8281-482f-977f-341a4b5103e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about bombing Cambodia, and the lies didn't stop there.
Kissinger lied in public not only about the arenas in which he enabled one genocide after another, but also his own legacy and values. Observing the Arab Spring in 2011, he had the audacity to [publicly write](https://substack.com/redirect/49aceb63-4f59-4d41-96db-13eb14fdd001?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in _the Washington Post_ :
> Like most Americans, we believe that the United States should always support democracy and human rights politically, economically and diplomatically, just as we championed freedom for the captive peoples of the Soviet empire during the Cold War. Our values impel us to alleviate human suffering.
If his genocidal machinations, lies in public to cover them up, and lifelong unaccountability were not bad enough, Kissinger also overtly disrespected U.S. service members, many of them are compelled by what amounts to a "[poverty draft](https://substack.com/redirect/bf19f279-e975-4f51-afd6-5873412ad173?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" to risk their lives to serve American imperialism. His [reprehensible comments](https://substack.com/redirect/3545bef0-82bf-4d9e-b857-b3d60a7af0b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) included this gem: "Military men are just dumb, stupid animals to be used as pawns in foreign policy."
It is one thing to murder millions, lie about it and one's own values, and to live out a long life in impunity. Insulting the people on whose backs (and graves) he built his legacy reveals just how disgusting, depraved, and deplorable Henry Kissinger was.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bae4b578-0098-4207-9380-7580ed2afde9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
https://twitter.com/codepink/status/1730072310005010449?
Humanity could breathe a sigh of relief at his death, had Kissinger's life not done so much to ensure death, destruction, and the [decline of democracies](https://substack.com/redirect/dca1e72e-9517-4b6e-a5b1-41ce339a3368?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) around the world.
Paid subscribers can gain access to a collection of comedy sketches and memes that addressed Kissinger's legacy more thoughtfully than most American [corporate news outlets](https://substack.com/redirect/6fcd3c35-ced7-4dfe-9f7e-0111b70cf07f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The man's left a hateful and revolting legacy, and since justice for his crimes remained lacking during his life, he deserves relentless ridicule in death...

Corporate journalists have long dedicated themselves to insulating war criminals from accountability. Share this post to challenge disinformation masquerading as news and educate your friends about history! Over the course of the decade-long American campaign to bomb neutral countries adjacent to the one in which it waged an overt war of colonial occupation, than it deployed during the entirety of the Second World War. name: Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
subject: The final month of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re in the final month of the year, so I wanted to quickly connect with you and share some thoughts on my outlook for December.
#
Hey Peter, it's Lauren, Pramila's Campaign Manager!
We’re in the final month of the year, so I wanted to quickly connect with you and share some thoughts on my outlook for December.
**2024 is right around the corner, and that means our campaign is kicking into high gear.** More organizing, stronger fundraising, and a deep impact down-ballot are all on the horizon for this movement — but only if we start putting in the work right now.
As the month continues, our team will be sharing more ways you can get involved in supporting our progressive movement and our campaign. In the meantime, one of the strongest ways you can support this campaign is by starting a monthly donation to help us continue to plan for our future endeavors.
[**Can we count on you to help us kick-start our December campaign fundraising by starting a monthly donation of $3, $5, $10, or whatever makes sense to you today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47892?refcode=em20231202-3232&t=1&akid=3232%2E420207%2EUHCgau)
_(You can use the buttons and links in this email to start a monthly donation)_
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47892?refcode=em20231202-3232&t=20&akid=3232%2E420207%2EUHCgau)**
Thank you for believing in the work that we’re doing together.
Let’s do this,
Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231202-3232-footer&t=21&refcode2=3232_420207_UHCgau&akid=3232%2E420207%2EUHCgau)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=22&akid=3232%2E420207%2EUHCgau)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=3232%2E420207%2EUHCgau)

name: Ro Khanna
subject: George Santos is OUT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Yesterday, I was among the 311 House representatives who voted to expel George Santos from Congress. Santos’ disgraceful conduct during both his campaign and his time in Congress makes him one of only six members of the House of Representatives to ever be expelled.

Now New York’s 3rd Congressional District will be headed to the polls within the next 90 days for a special election, and we have the chance to turn this seat blue ahead of next year’s congressional races.

Will you split a contribution between the NY-03 Special Election Nominee Fund and my campaign to help us elect a new Democratic to the House? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ny-03-special-election-nomination-fund-split]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ny-03-special-election-nomination-fund-split]

To be clear, George Santos didn’t just lie about his background. He didn’t just establish himself as an embarrassment to Congress and to himself. The House Ethics Committee showed he defrauded his supporters to pay for Botox, vacations, and luxury goods [https://www.cbsnews.com/news/santos-hermes-botox-atlantic-city-campaign-funds/] , and hid the state of his personal and campaign finances from federal regulators.

The next representative for New York’s 3rd Congressional District must be a Democrat to help ensure we can take back the majority in the House in 2024.

That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting the NY-03 Special Election Nominee Fund by splitting a contribution between us today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ny-03-special-election-nomination-fund-split]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ny-03-special-election-nomination-fund-split]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

Paid for by Ro for Congress

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/yk8ji3C_lRB5XYAqkMrvbA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnThKZP0TOaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9vcmdhbml6ZXJzLWRlc2FudGlzX2VuLXJzJmNkbWM9Mll4TDdEclpkVUtZS2l3UW5SazBQRUp3OUQ3JnJlZmNvZGUyPTJZeEw3RHJaZFVLWUtpd1FuUmswUEVKdzlENyZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yWXhMN0RyWmRVS1lLaXdRblJrMFBFSnc5RDdXA3NwY0IKZWqZjWtlYChbY1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) [**Salon: _“Florida GOP election bill makes it harder for Gen Z to vote”_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/NqkU3Mm3V-4UAAqieoKtQA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnThKZP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9vcmdhbml6ZXJzLWRlc2FudGlzX2VuLXJzJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJZeEw3RHJaZFVLWUtpd1FuUmswUEVKdzlENyZyZWZjb2RlMj0yWXhMN0RyWmRVS1lLaXdRblJrMFBFSnc5RDcmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9Mll4TDdEclpkVUtZS2l3UW5SazBQRUp3OUQ3VwNzcGNCCmVqmY1rZWAoW2NSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Over and over again, Ron DeSantis has stood in the way of our rights and forced his fascist agenda on Floridians. And Florida youth are bearing the brunt of his attacks - but we’re determined to make Ron feel the consequences of his actions.

**I started a student organizing team that will hold him accountable year-round.** Together, we’ve been on the ground with youth organizers on their college campuses, empowering other eligible students to register to vote.

**_We’ve even brought on paid fellows – all high school and college students – to join our team and fuel our youth-powered movement!_**

Powering our team means you’ll have a direct impact on how many students on college campuses are reached, register to vote, and change the course of action in Florida politics. We’ll have a real chance at change, but we can’t do it alone. [**_If we want to keep our organizing teams going across Florida, we need YOU to help power this movement before my end-of-week deadline tomorrow. Chip in $27 to fuel my campaign’s efforts to mobilize more youth than ever before to defeat DeSantis’ fascist agenda >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/NqkU3Mm3V-4UAAqieoKtQA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnThKZP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9vcmdhbml6ZXJzLWRlc2FudGlzX2VuLXJzJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJZeEw3RHJaZFVLWUtpd1FuUmswUEVKdzlENyZyZWZjb2RlMj0yWXhMN0RyWmRVS1lLaXdRblJrMFBFSnc5RDcmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9Mll4TDdEclpkVUtZS2l3UW5SazBQRUp3OUQ3VwNzcGNCCmVqmY1rZWAoW2NSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Over the past year, Florida youth have had to endure DeSantis banning books in schools, directly attacking LGBTQ+ youth, and signing a permitless-carry law that will endanger thousands.

But young people have demonstrated that we are ready to fight back against these violations. We won’t stand on the sidelines and watch our Sunshine State go up in flames at the hands of a far-right extremist.

That’s why we are organizing across college campuses, right here in Florida, to give more young people a say in their future. But your support is critical in keeping up our work. **College campuses are just the start. We’re ready to help Florida youth build a bold movement and fight back against fascist attacks.** [**_But I need you, Peter! So stand with us: donate $27 NOW to fuel our organizing efforts before our end-of-week fundraising deadline. >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/NqkU3Mm3V-4UAAqieoKtQA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnThKZP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9vcmdhbml6ZXJzLWRlc2FudGlzX2VuLXJzJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJZeEw3RHJaZFVLWUtpd1FuUmswUEVKdzlENyZyZWZjb2RlMj0yWXhMN0RyWmRVS1lLaXdRblJrMFBFSnc5RDcmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9Mll4TDdEclpkVUtZS2l3UW5SazBQRUp3OUQ3VwNzcGNCCmVqmY1rZWAoW2NSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/Gvlcwy8o-uGe4bYI3jqrUw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnThKZP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9vcmdhbml6ZXJzLWRlc2FudGlzX2VuLXJzJmFtb3VudD0xMCZjZG1jPTJZeEw3RHJaZFVLWUtpd1FuUmswUEVKdzlENyZyZWZjb2RlMj0yWXhMN0RyWmRVS1lLaXdRblJrMFBFSnc5RDcmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9Mll4TDdEclpkVUtZS2l3UW5SazBQRUp3OUQ3VwNzcGNCCmVqmY1rZWAoW2NSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

clean_body: | ~ Over and over again, Ron DeSantis has stood in the way of our rights and forced his fascist agenda on Floridians. And Florida youth are bearing the brunt of his attacks - but we’re determined to make Ron feel the consequences of his actions. I started a student organizing team that will hold him accountable year-round. Together, we’ve been on the ground with youth organizers on their college campuses, empowering other eligible students to register to vote. We’ve even brought on paid fellows – all high school and college students – to join our team and fuel our youth-powered movement! Powering our team means you’ll have a direct impact on how many students on college campuses are reached, register to vote, and change the course of action in Florida politics. We’ll have a real chance at change, but we can’t do it alone. Over the past year, Florida youth have had to endure DeSantis banning books in schools, directly attacking LGBTQ+ youth, and signing a permitless-carry law that will endanger thousands. But young people have demonstrated that we are ready to fight back against these violations. We won’t stand on the sidelines and watch our Sunshine State go up in flames at the hands of a far-right extremist. That’s why we are organizing across college campuses, right here in Florida, to give more young people a say in their future. But your support is critical in keeping up our work. College campuses are just the start. We’re ready to help Florida youth build a bold movement and fight back against fascist attacks. | | | | ~~ | ~~ ~ Thank you, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. He isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you become a Founding Donor of this movement today? | ~ | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

clean_body: | | | | Corruption, Bribery, and Extortion | Peter, The House just voted to expel NY GOP Rep. George Santos in response to his severe ethics violations. Congressman Mike Lawler played a critical role in ensuring Santos' expulsion stating, “ "I’ve been very clear. He’s unfit to serve and I’ve been clear from the start that he needed to go”", (USA Today, Ken Tran). While this is a huge victory for Mike, for common sense, and for the American People – we can’t let up in the battle against unethical and sinister happenings in Washington. Take Senator Bob Menendez for example... He has been federally charged with conspiracy to commit bribery, conspiracy to commit honest services fraud, conspiracy to commit extortion, and conspiracy for a public official to act as a foreign agent. How can Santos be expelled – but Menendez be allowed to stay? If you agree with Mike, then we need you to step up, and help us fight the blatant hypocrisy of the left. | Thank you, | | Team Lawler | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | = \- =

clean_body: Upon placing my hand upon the Bible... | | | | | Patriot, On January 20, 2025, I will place my hand upon the Bible and take the Oath of Office as I am inaugurated as your 47th President of the United States. I will thank God for granting us the strength to prevail against the most vicious witch hunts ever conceived. But I will also remember to thank a very special group of patriots... ...You see, as I make my way through the crowd and wave to our many, many supporters, I will quickly be able to identify who has been with me since this pivotal __moment right now when they show me their 2024 Campaign Membership Card specially printed with an early renewal of 2023. | | I’ll know that YOU peacefully defended our movement as Democrats tried to remove my name from the ballot and disenfranchise a majority of American voters before the 2024 election even began. Our victory will be thanks to YOU. In fact, it will be thanks to you that my name could even appear on the ballot. With you peacefully standing by my side, we will cast off the political ruling class that hates our country, we will DISMANTLE the Deep State, we will rout the warmongers and globalists from our government, and above all else, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN by firing the most corrupt and incompetent president to ever occupy the White House – Crooked Joe Biden!
