name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: I felt betrayed watching everything unravel
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The day 13 Americans were vaporized at the entrance to the Kabul airport was the first time I’d ever considered serving in government again | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_t=oHKVI4dFdhzEWQ5SoCLgfvtAmvQhfIabONrqlVF48p6dR7fV-GPErNh1OfBgWaxJN1nJRtZHsd6OXKhAKG8PLtK5fHfRO3B-pj-TJ8I3Msk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_t=oHKVI4dFdhzEWQ5SoCLgfvtAmvQhfIabONrqlVF48p6dR7fV-GPErNh1OfBgWaxJN1nJRtZHsd6OXKhAKG8PLtK5fHfRO3B-pj-TJ8I3Msk%3D)
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLfCfTuqcb7dPo60OJO3ILyElMcHmwIKW-NT2ILrD2NTmj9v2MHEbjqrvyEgcIofV2zYDM0z3t7qB82hHW4bkA5ZJeDq7B44ycpD0Ts4VLB5cUCHktQtRRwNVLbIs-e1e0xRsRbW_UGk4JykzMYYqie8FdVlDl-VFoZ5PvLqAf_efFiU3TQe3yJGPMQtvBGR-WeOc8yBvXuh9-BtTn4RVrt6tzO47m1WfB1U2M56J7q6NSULLYHOnF0WL2bu_U6MRLPiA3XhuR3cnQSW4m3RmuF9IVNY8meGiDD__DSf7PA_ty3LEXvgitUix4kIlVwPx94lBQRoSqY1cvRHeRg_vBqYDTXZRh1591Obi050xomxTgsugAnrdqYNaoVqoiCmUKu)

Peter,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLfCfTuqcb7dPo60OJO3ILyElMcHmwIKW-NT2ILrD2NTmj9v2MHEbjqrvyEgcIofV2zYDM0z3t7qB82hHW4bkA5ZJeDq7B44ycpD0Ts4VLB5cUCHktQtRRwNVLbIs-e1e0xRsRbW_UGk4JykzMYYqie8FdVlDl-VFoZ5PvLqAf_efFiU3TQe3yJGPMQtvBGR-WeOc8yBvXuh9-BtTn4RVrt6uvU24YWz2MX9La9oCneF6tUnU316Z0OMz4ql4VOz0Y-b1de7PZuAgq1mpeC-uxyEAU2o060-1zgZsbfmnhfqtX0yRKfO5EMUtAzrs_P6isHBSpt9k66CNjvarrtIkxUhqWpKuqO6NF4vQA0FQUVEmhL_vqDGmXnWaiHvJlWTeoP)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLfCfTuqcb7dPo60OJO3ILyElMcHmwIKW-NT2ILrD2NTmj9v2MHEbjqrvyEgcIofV2zYDM0z3t7qB82hHW4bkA5ZJeDq7B44ycpD0Ts4VLB5cUCHktQtRRwNVLbIs-e1e0xRsRbW_UGk4JykzMYYqie8FdVlDl-VFoZ5PvLqAf_efFiU3TQe3yJGPMQtvBGR-WeOc8yBvXuh9-BtTn4RVrt6rIkTeQLK69TuowhhAttwxfgTB7IHOMYZHzPTk8ylY3SMIdAHrJBy03C5LajopLxpjh4E0ScV6eY3pjGHQ0SDAq8p7zp1LZ230Zv2Qjxb8mqiOTCkhECGA4IH2qSy9SDmAuZGhRQbhjlCqqdQ6q-EcQthwwxpitg9NGwvJR3a9vG)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

**If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right.** If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, **[please do me a quick favor and confirm that I have the correct information on file for you](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLf_SqQBp7QDuSGaUoK9AwIS0EyrCFQ703e3ukPuhQK5fhO20NqcRnD7ldiVkiw6f65VfeD8cD0dKlxA0N0pO4y1LdfskZz6OCQvv6UKfRd_sq9RlQQfl5OPJ881BPzxIugewTRA1Yq5AQcZYLiybpddKKQjbzidTOb7pdlozhqJ-Dpw6i7yty9dMeZWcjs6uvlDemvyB_kACHGYMjgGCm3933aCMFf32aiR9L4LZh_jiE2M8UTKc3J0CcBh4el4XFT09TbQ6bSlHDI-pHeBtfXCGbFuwgkPRNyBmCY_robEVmicFPNionoGXzyxKZDWHeV6Q-yXNkz9EMI1ZBd-4U-KIice6gIN2kXHB339kJwnVQ%3D)** ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy.

[**JOIN OUR FIGHT
ENLIST WITH TIM TODAY->** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLfCfTuqcb7dPo60OJO3ILyElMcHmwIKW-NT2ILrD2NTmj9v2MHEbjqrvyEgcIofV2zYDM0z3t7qB82hHW4bkA5ZJeDq7B44ycpD0Ts4VLB5cUCHktQtRRwNVLbIs-e1e0xRsRbW_UGk4JykzMYYqie8FdVlDl-VFoZ5PvLqAf_efFiU3TQe3yJGPMQtvBGR-WeOc8yBvXuh9-BtTn4RVrt6l8_12vUyCChLxPTBJCoGjNpGN-EX_Ha_qqdxg7tp3ENdVqp8lqN9dRywYCpC7Hdez-jwWe63e11re_yXQo7nTen5NPybvickgtxuzrlhGU1XfctaqqvE-przcTiQ44rFzpMSZA0JJGpbrfArqyfcKyyyGXiS1O96BB4mLoj-CRc)

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision; **but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. **

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLfCfTuqcb7dPo60OJO3ILyElMcHmwIKW-NT2ILrD2NTmj9v2MHEbjqrvyEgcIofV2zYDM0z3t7qB82hHW4bkA5ZJeDq7B44ycpD0Ts4VLB5cUCHktQtRRwNVLbIs-e1e0xRsRbW_UGk4JykzMYYqie8FdVlDl-VFoZ5PvLqAf_efFiU3TQe3yJGPMQtvBGR-WeOc8yBvXuh9-BtTn4RVrt6mEuTmIfPEkWw8ylrYe-PVtgPLcP7sskvMgvpktdqcb_omOjNsre94ni98edGGzh3fFMtuNDayLC5h7TT7gLpNPwPqHkhjbSeyygAxJ4FfKy2A3Pq7KmO5mAhl7kZrfsFp-J2Imh2vERMkp7c97vHhqkszNlYxoClW7xEprmBPXn)
**Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.** I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. [**ENLIST WITH TIM
CONFIRM YOUR SUPPORT TODAY->** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLfCfTuqcb7dPo60OJO3ILyElMcHmwIKW-NT2ILrD2NTmj9v2MHEbjqrvyEgcIofV2zYDM0z3t7qB82hHW4bkA5ZJeDq7B44ycpD0Ts4VLB5cUCHktQtRRwNVLbIs-e1e0xRsRbW_UGk4JykzMYYqie8FdVlDl-VFoZ5PvLqAf_efFiU3TQe3yJGPMQtvBGR-WeOc8yBvXuh9-BtTn4RVrt6rbP7i7Rmn-E4rDpWqRpQrbonWKgt-HbXM7MUKCVBXXbx630KXOiO_XUL_ySRUQOCEICn8oVJpkCTWjh8Rl_mHhNCyWlmCYuvsHFhgD-vduQGWe7wtxX6KRrFKVnNDXwiGtojQLFAtvL4qYt-TIehgaxCyYacmlnXS2l8_dS5_oU)

I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, **[I’m going to need the help of every conservative donor who reads this letter.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLfCfTuqcb7dPo60OJO3ILyElMcHmwIKW-NT2ILrD2NTmj9v2MHEbjqrvyEgcIofV2zYDM0z3t7qB82hHW4bkA5ZJeDq7B44ycpD0Ts4VLB5cUCHktQtRRwNVLbIs-e1e0xRsRbW_UGk4JykzMYYqie8FdVlDl-VFoZ5PvLqAf_efFiU3TQe3yJGPMQtvBGR-WeOc8yBvXuh9-BtTn4RVrt6jlaQNlKaa_cTxMvFA1U8ZFlITqmInAcxta17HSKHlW8-vb7AKbP769o2EWXpZr4RNJhnlLJS_uOx5lOtRGgO40La6DIzSMDJlcg8M2NGkkpuVNXwrt9Fi-mRh2eqjoocqrtFeU3mAE3DGLo3dVnWpSqACBwGF5jBw4WF_BLrvzT) **

Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, _**I was there.**_ We fought in Afghanistan, _**I was there.**_

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to look at my children and tell them, _**“Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.”**_

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLfCfTuqcb7dPo60OJO3ILyElMcHmwIKW-NT2ILrD2NTmj9v2MHEbjqrvyEgcIofV2zYDM0z3t7qB82hHW4bkA5ZJeDq7B44ycpD0Ts4VLB5cUCHktQtRRwNVLbIs-e1e0xRsRbW_UGk4JykzMYYqie8FdVlDl-VFoZ5PvLqAf_efFiU3TQe3yJGPMQtvBGR-WeOc8yBvXuh9-BtTn4RVrt6r9KkY8FxRwVfOeXQxOcYznas-AKdQ0equbsZZD-V_wq5Z3WdlXlU3hJR9qAh3gwlSo-PyRQRnSJcHZA6CkL7YFWQaLPW4xOlgHybE7D0rNJXhnyRymZJEkWzMalKAsYjznIxoGTulBNJ533x1mmv2WRuJpyuu8lUw65thqMt2Xd)
**But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.**

So, Peter \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain.

[**HELP ME FLIP THIS SEAT
ELECT A FIGHTER TO THE U.S. SENATE->** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLfCfTuqcb7dPo60OJO3ILyElMcHmwIKW-NT2ILrD2NTmj9v2MHEbjqrvyEgcIofV2zYDM0z3t7qB82hHW4bkA5ZJeDq7B44ycpD0Ts4VLB5cUCHktQtRRwNVLbIs-e1e0xRsRbW_UGk4JykzMYYqie8FdVlDl-VFoZ5PvLqAf_efFiU3TQe3yJGPMQtvBGR-WeOc8yBvXuh9-BtTn4RVrt6hgUC3lTxHj3bYa_Fns_FpZU1ucska5whI2i-vUVnyADvlobjp5q_RBEluSsZEbuow1uDouGneb232VaWsy5NxjyuPowK_yaEJ1f_sFQaVHWWpenBpTcPLRg78ZHLBO68Q_ZLDHemMyD0lSN1XgqndQK9BRCt-noga0Wnjq_wR3r)

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

[**CHIP IN TODAY** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLfCfTuqcb7dPo60OJO3ILyElMcHmwIKW-NT2ILrD2NTmj9v2MHEbjqrvyEgcIofV2zYDM0z3t7qB82hHW4bkA5ZJeDq7B44ycpD0Ts4VLB5cUCHktQtRRwNVLbIs-e1e0xRsRbW_UGk4JykzMYYqie8FdVlDl-VFoZ5PvLqAf_efFiU3TQe3yJGPMQtvBGR-WeOc8yBvXuh9-BtTn4RVrt6u8JMkdBrc_ppE1LMRQkIqc_gXywL_dmj_ZUCZU1BhCSG3wEfSHsiSN3rnC8WF-IX-2xyFHDwkJvL6sG82ypl9uwZOUwOoW6uWOvmHYmzJahmfWzLBA5-05yT_-7rIJ_XAd9VmpSljCwc5MAhwkLhoc6s9ekUvUsh0tPZeodJ8vE)

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7364f62b926141a293fb3835447e4369&_e=AqK_nuVyHNloUntUZEYNkd0u86et-jrMLMYdrED9HW0lXd2BviDyKA5BEZft4SLfCfTuqcb7dPo60OJO3ILyElMcHmwIKW-NT2ILrD2NTmj9v2MHEbjqrvyEgcIofV2zYDM0z3t7qB82hHW4bkA5ZJeDq7B44ycpD0Ts4VLB5cUCHktQtRRwNVLbIs-e1e0xRsRbW_UGk4JykzMYYqie8FdVlDl-VFoZ5PvLqAf_efFiU3TQe3yJGPMQtvBGR-WeOc8yBvXuh9-BtTn4RVrt6mbD-ECGOz6CXi7qx5xNvqDip3xUXNXhqDcDM6ZBjpcWlWWs9O2PlvSuEPgT_G1UeLny82kb62UNnbcmNVJp3DeT9oKftto2beBhSmwUY-yUYqtoy10MJtec2aNEPA8X17tlC3R19LWmmVYge2IALq8ye6zZEeOqOedB6vDSkb7T)

clean_body: The day 13 Americans were vaporized at the entrance to the Kabul airport was the first time I’d ever considered serving in government again | | Peter, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, “I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’” Every day it got worse. Every day it was a disaster. The adult in the room never materialized. Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport. Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.” I had sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I had promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil. If you're thinking this email is on the longer side, you're right. If you're short on time and unable to finish reading to the end right now, ; my opponent and his allies will not make winning this seat easy. It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision; but the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes. We fought in Iraq, I was there. We fought in Afghanistan, I was there. And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times. I want to look at my children and tell them, “Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.” But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it. So, Peter \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. The average person is 50X less likely to die of a climate-related cause than in 1920. [**Why? Fossil fuels – drill, frack, burn coal.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=02a4bac70edc4b3988e91d3ad9cfb623&_e=F3Fd3EJedhM8UWjFDBxmj2giPiYR5BNL54WNjYNywtE0kN8-eHGdnkcUC0eW4iKL3Xmu0bWFDz3V7zPMLnUkcUVHxowEIG1OE3vO3TJfyP82ZT4eWMQQgd1rxlUPiyU8_g0DUdoKDrBr-5lntSSZeOjSUvtEIWtorpPpnDn0hEkSARvgTy7T1vMkqdAPi6DYN14Czw3mjfjxyZEy3GL_vleC698e7oQ4hxu3z-z_naIM_j8n61bQT1DgoDwqcmfzc26a3hGeq-QKR5OESjQ58xYFAOrOgSipVORWMFjJp2lT0Mc8arnt_TIGX-YhD4nJkh7NuOT5vyiv8h9Ja0ApqssryBPeUwAoIGKSJTbFt5BJKboPKlY84a3nq6k_tJ_0kaPo4qieeGaxIPQI3bof-A%3D%3D)

The right answer to all temperature-related deaths is, again, more abundance of fossil fuels and advancing technology. These are inconvenient truths for the climate cult to accept. **The real emergency isn’t climate change, it’s the man-made disaster of climate change policies that threaten U.S. prosperity.**

The government picking winners and losers, giving some crony companies an edge over brave detracters who refuse to give in to the climate change mandates is here and it’s coming closer to your backyard.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: What I’ve been up to lately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
My team put together an End-of-Year Priorities Survey for you. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74469445/441678555/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWMxYjFmNy01MjkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Slqz6o0ZkijcTVdSmZxdmAYd--PJIK10aLdiqPCRAyw=&emci=cba1d745-5091-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=49c1b1f7-5291-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=252045)
---
As we start the month, I want to share what I've been up to lately. This week, I introduced the _Gas-Operated Semi-Automatic Firearms Exclusion (GOSAFE) Act_ to meaningfully address the gun violence epidemic. I also celebrated the two-year anniversary of the bipartisan infrastructure law, which has already helped strengthen New Mexico's water and energy infrastructure, roads, bridges, and high-speed internet. But this is only the beginning. Earlier in November, I introduced the _Puerto Rico Status Act_ to ensure Puerto Ricans finally have the right to self-determination after over 100 years of U.S. citizenship. These are just a few of my priorities. It's equally as important to me to hear what your priorities are as I fight to make a difference in the U.S. Senate. **[That being said, can you take just a few minutes to fill out my team's End-of-Year Priorities Survey? Your responses will help guide my team's work in the months ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74469447/441678557/430371301?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWMxYjFmNy01MjkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Slqz6o0ZkijcTVdSmZxdmAYd--PJIK10aLdiqPCRAyw=&emci=cba1d745-5091-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=49c1b1f7-5291-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=252045)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74469449/441678559/430371301?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWMxYjFmNy01MjkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Slqz6o0ZkijcTVdSmZxdmAYd--PJIK10aLdiqPCRAyw=&emci=cba1d745-5091-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=49c1b1f7-5291-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=252045)

My **number one priority** is creating a future for New Mexico that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities. Thank you for all you do to help make this vision a reality.
— Martin

body:
Special election in one of the country’s most competitive districts

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Protect wolf pups and bear cubs from violent trophy hunters
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2169994?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **December is officially here -- for many, it’s the most wonderful time of the year.** But for gray wolves and grizzly bears, _it’s one of the toughest._ The harsh winds, freezing cold temperatures, and layers of snow make winter a highly vulnerable time for wolves and bears, especially for wolf pups and bear cubs who are too weak and fragile to survive on their own. Right now, mama grizzlies are preparing their nursing dens for hibernation season, and gray wolves are gathering together to ensure the greatest chance of survival together as a pack. But while wolves and bears are doing everything they can to ensure their survival for the long winter ahead, _**vicious trophy hunters are making preparations of their own...**_ They are stocking up on loads of dangerous weapons -- _**guns, ammo, steel leg traps, bait, choking snares, and more**_ \-- with ruthless plans to target and _**BRUTALLY KILL**_ innocent wolves and bears at their weakest and most vulnerable. _**Friend, gray wolves and grizzly bears are two of the most treasured symbols of North American wilderness -- and they deserve to be safe from inhumane and violent trophy hunters who are intent on wiping them out.**_ **[Please don’t let these beloved animals down when they’re counting on us for their survival. TAKE ACTION NOW: Demand federal protections for gray wolves and grizzly bears before it’s too late to save them>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2169995?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2169996?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Nature on this planet is truly fascinating, Friend._ As temperatures drop, wolves grow thick fur coats and will curl their tails over their snouts to filter and catch their warm breath. Bears use their fat stores as energy and can even lower their own body temperature during hibernation to keep themselves warm!
Sadly, these incredible natural evolutionary adaptations that are designed to help gray wolves and grizzly bears survive the long winter, are not enough to compete with the powerful machinery and artillery that trophy hunters use to _**TORMENT and MURDER.**_ Even the most agile of animals would not be able to dodge _**rapid fire gun bullets traveling at THOUSANDS of miles per hour.**_ And how would an unsuspecting wolf or bear even try to defend themselves against _**explosive dynamite**_ thrown into their dens to **_BLOW THEM UP_** while they sleep?
No animal deserves to suffer inhumane and cruel death at the hands of merciless trophy hunters -- but even since the Trump administration rolled back critical Endangered Species Act (ESA), some states allow these _**SAVAGE killing methods**_ to remain completely**_LEGAL._ **
_Entire packs of gray wolves and hundreds of grizzly bears_ have already been _**MASSACRED**_ by brutal trophy hunters. Now, corrupt GOP politicians and their hunting lobby allies want to __**REMOVE**__ ESA protections even further -- which could be what finally pushes these two iconic species to _**EXTINCTION.**_ [**Will you fight back against extremist attempts to dismantle life-saving ESA protections and help keep gray wolves and grizzly bears safe from violent trophy hunters? Add your name now before the petition deadline at 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2169997?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2169996?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Your voice and your action could help save innocent gray wolves and grizzly bears from unimaginable death.
**Thanks for your support,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I wish I had better news…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I need to be frank with you: _**I just learned I missed my End of Month Goal.**_ **[_As of 4pm, I’m still 92 donations short of where I need to be. If I can close this gap by midnight, I’ll be on track to help Democrats take back the House and end MAGA Republicans’ reign of chaos. So I’m personally asking: Will you rush in $14 now? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74469673/441679397/-1810142053?refcode=20231202_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTNhZWZjMi01NTkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7xYx26Z-AMYTYjZ58R8TfIV_ZnDFSx4gjcOKobhYaPY=)** Peter, I need you to understand why this fundraising deadline is so important. name: OLCV
subject: Thank you for your support!
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Email%20Header%20-%20Thank%20You%20%281%29.png]
Dear Peter,
Now that Giving Tuesday is over, we want to take a moment to express our deepest gratitude for your support. Our work is funded by grassroots supporters like you and even though there are so many good causes to support, you’ve chosen to invest in OLCV and for that we are so grateful.
Our work–protecting Oregon’s natural legacy, electing pro-climate and pro-environment candidates, and holding our elected leaders accountable–is always challenging, but it’s easier knowing that we are in it together. Thousands of OLCV supporters including you give us the strength and power we need to continue protecting the Oregon we love.
From all of us at OLCV, thanks for everything you do.
Sincerely,
Lindsey, Morgan, April, Julia, Sam, Charlotte, Gordon, and Britney
DONATE: https://secure.everyaction.com/YnnBhNxoe0-gdDf_E1iL8Q2
Connect With Us:Facebook [http://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv/] Contact Info:Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
Instagram [http://www.instagram.com/olcv/]
Twitter [https://twitter.com/OLCV]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=2UtDVz51B7BDKGFMpvq%2FLhdwIj14RUF8qkNgNGHSA%2BdWIiM%2Bs%2FaP2w4n3AgsuGo1HQ%2FBMcqiZEXCr29ZzwzhzL4oiHQ8Ph9NfUHda5h9IW9j92ypcjhHrX5ALfLPdBfvFmPpO48b%2Bc73XpyZwTV9L78FbaiN8diZnHBpS3OdUfQ2NG6KBQai7qvuPzR8s%2FmK2ADF9q%2BabU6G9isksRbKzvJluHxnZ8xjuvmR0m4gde81jN75dILg2xWWfCzSXkiGD2jZFEltlTuj6zeefeSLn3or8mmklvM87a6%2FkZtXynZlmsRUrf6GdI991%2FxqfaJ%2FNRHtlRV8SybFDowuFmAhkML09clLLseSefS6eSI4vLZYH0zdXuPS9kOYMrtrbgevoLxCNzQVRysJYh%2FV0hTA5Ypx8erTzvYOZKe%2B%2FkAMX6I%3D .

Sincerely, Lindsey, Morgan, April, Julia, Sam, Charlotte, Gordon, and Britney DONATE: Connect With Us:Facebook [] Contact Info:Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States Instagram [] Twitter [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Your endorsement will mean the world to Nikki.
Thank you!
— Team Nikki
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Nikki Budzinski
Date: Tuesday, November 28, 2023
Subject: Your endorsement is critical
Friends, I’m running for reelection in Illinois 13th Congressional District because I am more fired up than ever to continue championing the issues that matter most to families, farmers, and veterans in Central and Southern Illinois and across the country.
Last year, we proved that we have what it takes to win and made history by flipping this seat blue for the first time in **decades** and electing me as the first Democratic woman to represent IL-13.
I know we have what it takes to win again, but it will require building a strong grassroots campaign.
One important way we can grow our campaign is by bringing in thousands of small-dollar supporters to power our work to reach voters in communities all around IL-13.
Another way is by showing the strength of our campaign early on. That’s why I’m reaching out for your help today:
**[The most important endorsement we can get is yours, friend. Will you be one of the first people to personally endorse this reelection campaign and show your support for our shared values?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74469956/441680664/-1916740360?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_LAU_PET_AC_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzAxMjhlZi01OTkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-5-Tubvj9fhuKFcC97aH8jerLqxn0ub9Ua3FV81kfE=&emci=d5bdc594-cd8f-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=930128ef-5991-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=13891387)**
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74469957/441680665/-1916740360?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_LAU_PET_AC_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzAxMjhlZi01OTkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-5-Tubvj9fhuKFcC97aH8jerLqxn0ub9Ua3FV81kfE=&emci=d5bdc594-cd8f-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=930128ef-5991-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=13891387)
---
Whether it’s lowering everyday costs, investing in early childhood education, or accelerating our clean energy transition, we've accomplished so much together. But our work is not over.
While signing on may seem like a small action, your support will make all the difference as we enter this race and build early momentum.
Thank you,
Nikki
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74469958/441680666/-593305170?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_LAU_PET_AC_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzAxMjhlZi01OTkxLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5-5-Tubvj9fhuKFcC97aH8jerLqxn0ub9Ua3FV81kfE=)

name: Our Revolution
subject: Americans deserve healthcare as a right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Despite Americans spending more than twice what people in other wealthy countries spend on healthcare, our healthcare system is deeply broken.

While Healthcare executives rake in millions and buy influence with campaign donations, nearly 40% of our neighbors have skipped or delayed necessary medical care because they can’t afford it, and more than 1⁄3 report not being able to afford medically necessary prescription drugs.

Healthcare is a guaranteed right in almost every other advanced democracy, and the fact that Americans go without needed care is immoral.

That’s why we’re asking you to join Our Revolution by signing here to support Rep. Ro Khanna’s State-Based Universal Health Care Act, which would give states the power and resources to create comprehensive health care for their residents, regardless of income or employment status. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12550?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231202_PT_healthcare_0_6MOCA_ourrevolution_na_na_healthcare&t=1011&akid=4958%2E5885482%2E_RAKFn)

HEALTHCARE FOR ALL (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12550?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231202_PT_healthcare_0_6MOCA_ourrevolution_na_na_healthcare&t=1012&akid=4958%2E5885482%2E_RAKFn)

By empowering states to provide healthcare as a right, we can prevent so much unneeded medical and financial suffering.

There is no reason that private companies should profit from sickness, and it’s time we put an end to this crue practice.

The bottom line is this: Americans should have access to quality, affordable healthcare as a right, not a privilege.

Join Our Revolution ally Ro Khanna by signing on to his State-based Universal Healthcare Act! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12550?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231202_PT_healthcare_0_6MOCA_ourrevolution_na_na_healthcare&t=1013&akid=4958%2E5885482%2E_RAKFn)

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: We’re officially kicking off my reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74469960/441680697/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231202_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGE3YmE1YTYtNWE5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gtBR1Y22noBCHV8cjoVG4h5KeJNmClVzEjpD1rqoHWU=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74469961/441680698/587787572?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231202_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGE3YmE1YTYtNWE5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gtBR1Y22noBCHV8cjoVG4h5KeJNmClVzEjpD1rqoHWU=) I wanted you to be the first to know, Peter: This week, I officially filed for reelection in Illinois’ 13th district. **[_Before I explain more about the significance of this moment, will you become a Founding Donor and help kick my campaign off strong by splitting a contribution of $10 or more between my campaign and HER Time?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74469962/441680699/587787572?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231202_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGE3YmE1YTYtNWE5MS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gtBR1Y22noBCHV8cjoVG4h5KeJNmClVzEjpD1rqoHWU=) ** I was born in Peoria, Illinois where my parents taught me from a young age the importance of family, community, and service to others. **Thanks to the values instilled in me by my family, I’ve spent my entire life fighting on behalf of working families. ** After graduating college, I traveled the country fighting to get hardworking people the pay and workplace safety conditions they deserve. I worked for the International Association of Fire Fighters’ union to help look out for our first responders who put their lives on the line for us every day and make sure they have the equipment, training, and health protections they need. Then I stood with United Food and Commercial Workers International Workers union, helping successfully secure a fair day’s pay and workplace protections at dangerous processing plants. **As a senior advisor to Illinois Governor JB Pritzker, I successfully brought workers, small businesses, and elected officials to the negotiating table and secured a $15 minimum wage so that all working families across Illinois can maintain a decent standard of living. ** **But I knew I needed to do more.** So I took my fight to Congress to build on my accomplishments and ensure that every family across the country has access to affordable education, reproductive healthcare, and accessible child care — leaving no one behind. This grassroots movement supported me all the way through Election Day and helped me make history by electing me as the first woman to represent IL-13 and flipping this seat blue for the first time in decades. Since then, I’ve cut through the noise and gridlock to build bipartisan relationships in Washington to lower everyday costs for working families, invest in economic development for rural communities, and make quality healthcare more accessible. **And my work is just getting started.** That’s why I am so grateful to you and our entire movement for powering my campaign’s efforts to gather the required signatures needed to get my name on the ballot to run for election here in Illinois. It is because you’ve opened emails, chipped in when you can, and offered your support by knocking door to door that I was able to file moments ago and can now officially kick off my reelection campaign. It was no easy feat to get my name on the ballot. But with National Republicans already eyeing our district and looking to spend big to expand their narrow House majority, this is just the beginning of our fight to reelect me in 2024. clean_body: | = = I wanted you to be the first to know, Peter: This week, I officially filed for reelection in Illinois’ 13th district. = I was born in Peoria, Illinois where my parents taught me from a young age the importance of family, community, and service to others. Thanks to the values instilled in me by my family, I’ve spent my entire life fighting on behalf of working families. After graduating college, I traveled the country fighting to get hardworking people the pay and workplace safety conditions they deserve. I worked for the International Association of Fire Fighters’ union to help look out for our first responders who put their lives on the line for us every day and make sure they have the equipment, training, and health protections they need. Then I stood with United Food and Commercial Workers International Workers union, helping successfully secure a fair day’s pay and workplace protections at dangerous processing plants. As a senior advisor to Illinois Governor JB Pritzker, I successfully brought workers, small businesses, and elected officials to the negotiating table and secured a $15 minimum wage so that all working families across Illinois can maintain a decent standard of living. But I knew I needed to do more. So I took my fight to Congress to build on my accomplishments and ensure that every family across the country has access to affordable education, reproductive healthcare, and accessible child care — leaving no one behind. This grassroots movement supported me all the way through Election Day and helped me make history by electing me as the first woman to represent IL-13 and flipping this seat blue for the first time in decades. Since then, I’ve cut through the noise and gridlock to build bipartisan relationships in Washington to lower everyday costs for working families, invest in economic development for rural communities, and make quality healthcare more accessible. And my work is just getting started. That’s why I am so grateful to you and our entire movement for powering my campaign’s efforts to gather the required signatures needed to get my name on the ballot to run for election here in Illinois. It is because you’ve opened emails, chipped in when you can, and offered your support by knocking door to door that I was able to file moments ago and can now officially kick off my reelection campaign. It was no easy feat to get my name on the ballot. But with National Republicans already eyeing our district and looking to spend big to expand their narrow House majority, this is just the beginning of our fight to reelect me in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Nikki Budzinski and HER Time will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = From the bottom of my heart, thank you for being an important part of this team. — Nikki HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f46bfad69f0d4a2899853341c575105d&_e=ieCcY-goRH7ZYuAAtGSEctBuPHyi3AdN-T6cq0zsbF3aMAleooRgdie24NwZkIqBPMPM2Ja-xyZZMaRXyalu4xBjXOw_r8U7h68BnZc2xNyfPZ7dHJUk7Vnqcgq10o0XI6Y4QSJ5lX5-nb-CoaJKVh06hPrgQpiZNfAxCqCZblwKXgFuULUAQKJIlJ84fhVvorlFaWka_f0roLSmysGkA_V17zwtQGY7-gyD4wu4Wt-NvbVren7NFaVBE5avAaZw3y8toW-XdzkI-jrYp5TUXFE2S5S0I6L9hrMeeOevTYgaeu57BPKi0LlaI2h_IpMTNWJ5noiAb6zrxrBbKGqSSXFTtzayw8J0CRuJvu3co0Bs8OUJ5ClNJIAzcThaumNvvuomPLlMC7w803wSkzBwqA%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f46bfad69f0d4a2899853341c575105d&_e=ieCcY-goRH7ZYuAAtGSEctBuPHyi3AdN-T6cq0zsbF3aMAleooRgdie24NwZkIqBPMPM2Ja-xyZZMaRXyalu4xBjXOw_r8U7h68BnZc2xNyfPZ7dHJUk7Vnqcgq10o0XI6Y4QSJ5lX5-nb-CoaJKVh06hPrgQpiZNfAxCqCZblwKXgFuULUAQKJIlJ84fhVvorlFaWka_f0roLSmysGkA_V17zwtQGY7-gyD4wu4Wt-NvbVren7NFaVBE5avAaZwb4l_Yeok1cMre9cVovl-F_hqcU8ByKwC2VPvTL_gNuBPMY58RNgQ5y99Ftjh-tl3Vj9SMXaI7yIWNesag2uDzn0az81w95yCstBcMP-L79oe1tsr7ZFp4L551VtjUXJUO6F_lrlnfeam-8gaKDAG2Q%3D%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f46bfad69f0d4a2899853341c575105d&_e=ieCcY-goRH7ZYuAAtGSEctBuPHyi3AdN-T6cq0zsbF3aMAleooRgdie24NwZkIqBPMPM2Ja-xyZZMaRXyalu4xBjXOw_r8U7h68BnZc2xNyfPZ7dHJUk7Vnqcgq10o0XI6Y4QSJ5lX5-nb-CoaJKVh06hPrgQpiZNfAxCqCZblwKXgFuULUAQKJIlJ84fhVvorlFaWka_f0roLSmysGkA_V17zwtQGY7-gyD4wu4Wt-NvbVren7NFaVBE5avAaZwM_9sKdRsrx-lOxfAgKlCumDcMQ6yX3dMhqR4uL9Y8P3PJUOLEhA2uYBR-lbfE9-qQEc-IeQrOv0j_I2YzSkfRLfOAedi4rfTx1f2j4V6VYP0BE8O5B-b6HBgGPQDaPl9Btm3xM2ZerH4_QqHg-_CuQ%3D%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---

---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

This is Steve Scalise.

clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Remember Kid Rock? Yeah, that Kid Rock. Well, he had some choice words for me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| What’s most important is the concerted, coordinated effort between Donald Trump, his far-right celebrity friends, and the Fox News echo chamber to push out attacks on me one day after another to make me one of the MAGA movement’s most hated politicians in America.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)
Derek, I have some surprising news.
**Country musician Kid Rock recently attacked me by name live on the set of Sean Hannity’s _Fox News_ show:
**
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)
Now before you roll your eyes too hard (believe me, I did too when I saw this), consider this — **Hannity’s show is one of the most-watched programs in cable news, with _millions_ of viewers tuning in every night to watch.**
**[They’re all taking their cues from Donald Trump with one goal — drag my name through the mud by any means necessary often enough to prevent me from winning this Senate race. Will you chip in $3 or a contribution of any amount to help my campaign respond?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $3](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=6&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=7&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=8&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=9&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=10&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)
---
Believe it or not, I’ve apparently been a personal target of Kid Rock’s for _years_ — here is a picture we dug up where he’s with Don Jr. at one of Trump’s golf clubs in 2020, with a t-shirt caricaturing yours truly:
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=12&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)
Look, I have a thick skin and what Kid Rock and Hannity said about me isn’t going to bother me personally, because the latest schoolyard insults aren’t what’s most important.
**What’s most important is the concerted, coordinated effort between Donald Trump, his far-right celebrity friends, and the _Fox News_ echo chamber to push out attacks on me one day after another to make me one of the MAGA movement’s most hated politicians in America.
**
And the sad truth is that _it may be working._
And we have an election to win. There are real issues at stake. The extremely high cost of living and affordable housing. The climate crisis. Wages not keeping pace with inflation.
That’s what I want to talk about. Not more baseless far-right attacks. But we also can’t allow them to pick up steam online and in the media. This is especially true in California’s open primary in which Trump and I will be on the same ballot, along with his MAGA supporters down ballot.
So one last time, I’m personally asking:
**[Chip in any amount to our campaign to help me respond to Kid Rock, Sean Hannity, and Donald Trump’s attacks, and let’s win this Senate race for all of California.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=13&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)**
Thanks,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=14&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=dec2023_abs_em.1JhQQ9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20231202_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=15&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)
---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---

Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=17&akid=4595%2E5257348%2ETLcHKL)

Fellow American,

Back in January, House Republicans promised that we would change the way Washington works with a strong majority.

We promised that we would "bring much-needed accountability to bureaucrats like Fauci, Mayorkas, and the whole cast of characters behind the waste, fraud, and corruption of the Biden Administration."

The year has gone by in a flash, and much has changed, including my role as your new Speaker. But one thing remains the same... **we've been busy working for YOU every single day since we were sworn into the majority.**

**The work that we're doing every day in the House is only possible because of you, Fellow American.**

From day one, we've been working to identify government waste and eliminate it. And since that first moment we were sworn in, we've taken the actions to end corruption.

Almost a year in, I'm curious to know how you think we're doing. [**_Would you mind sparing a moment of your time today to fill out our yearly report card? We need to know if you're satisfied with the job we're doing._**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=db235a2af9c847a7bd1a2d89d724ee8f&_e=1pw2F73_XWpWitVtqonK42zZBKjPsiAPsS4UcJzZO86zLfpyqFEo9iyvy551BPei3Q4-dZbdZyZN_s1sPgCet7dRdwQqvu9Jd6YnpCBlhMiy8yCh5dbYfBroUJS-QrNRR1OIzyeKnBbsmbOBr2xvGZxiNF5soR4vr7-UsZEdltQfkZqicebVs6OkPIqTizwxEZngcIK-Y-FEiuSjuCvqGVndV4Ts1QOAWTMvwgOKyIl63JuA3O0O3x7qae-atVt1nCpgpjj93z8MMGIvthNtejQKVwxCxITLgdi015YlVzTFO0seZ8_zrNjxfxA7n3ZeNygxz5Tsmo8zDgjfxZNvAZs3VtHbhE0XzYKALOQ-qfVt2YmSEG_fzTXGGceQj0My2zfbhftN1vpYeqz6dYoVlg%3D%3D)

_**-Grade the Republican Majority-**_ [** Fill Out Report Card Now **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=db235a2af9c847a7bd1a2d89d724ee8f&_e=1pw2F73_XWpWitVtqonK42zZBKjPsiAPsS4UcJzZO86zLfpyqFEo9iyvy551BPei3Q4-dZbdZyZN_s1sPgCet7dRdwQqvu9Jd6YnpCBlhMiy8yCh5dbYfBroUJS-QrNRR1OIzyeKnBbsmbOBr2xvGZxiNF5soR4vr7-UsZEdltQfkZqicebVs6OkPIqTizwxEZngcIK-Y-FEiuSjuCvqGVndV4Ts1QOAWTMvwgOKyIl63JuA3O0O3x7qae-atVt198BwYYR9lESrwbry3s156xXRTqegRI7ZsiPKEHVA7XlYGey3HMRSSo_tqR3KNyvJhO783TfsdcY9pRD2u1gOit8-hBfP_l_RCgqtFiTk5rMjOmKvOt14VAWnsxythpTU-p8_0vEQAK3v1du6R_5y-w%3D%3D)

Thank you,

clean_body: = Daily Kos: “Fanatical Republican Extremist of the Day: Mike Erickson” November 23, 2023 Team – Remember Mike Erickson? Andrea Salinas’ anti-choice, anti-climate, anti-democratic MAGA Republican opponent from 2022? Well, it’s hard to forget someone that extreme. But here’s the thing: Last week’s Daily Kos profile on Erickson perfectly illustrates the type of GOP extremists we’re up against in this election. They’re all that extreme. These types of MAGA Republicans – the ones who want to criminalize your right to choose, gut your healthcare, and peddle dangerous election fraud conspiracies – are prepared to do whatever it takes to defeat Andrea and force their agenda on folks like you. name: Bob Casey
subject: Pennsylvania can’t afford this outcome
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1277%2E552475%2EaPhaf8)
From growing up in Scranton, to coaching eighth-grade basketball in Philadelphia, to my wife, Terese, and I raising our four daughters in the same town where I grew up — Pennsylvania is my home.
That’s why I’m a tireless advocate for Pennsylvania’s hardworking families in the U.S. Senate. Because I know how hard Pennsylvanians work to provide for their kids, save for their families’ futures, and give back to their communities. They deserve a Senator who works just as hard to represent their voices in Washington.
But here’s the reality: national Republicans are coming for this seat in hopes of regaining Senate control. These are the same folks who want to make cuts to Social Security, which nearly 3 million Pennsylvanians rely on to get by.
_The people of our state can’t afford a Republican Senate majority._
**[Peter, I’m running for re-election to keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in the U.S. Senate, but I won’t be able to win without your support. Will you donate $5 or any amount now to help defend this seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?refcode=em20231202-2&refcode2=1277_552475_aPhaf8&akid=1277%2E552475%2EaPhaf8)**
[Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?amount=250&refcode=em20231202-2-el&refcode2=1277_552475_aPhaf8&akid=1277%2E552475%2EaPhaf8) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?amount=100&refcode=em20231202-2-el&refcode2=1277_552475_aPhaf8&akid=1277%2E552475%2EaPhaf8) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?amount=50&refcode=em20231202-2-el&refcode2=1277_552475_aPhaf8&akid=1277%2E552475%2EaPhaf8) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?amount=25&refcode=em20231202-2-el&refcode2=1277_552475_aPhaf8&akid=1277%2E552475%2EaPhaf8) [Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?amount=15&refcode=em20231202-2-el&refcode2=1277_552475_aPhaf8&akid=1277%2E552475%2EaPhaf8) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231201-2?refcode=em20231202-2&refcode2=1277_552475_aPhaf8&akid=1277%2E552475%2EaPhaf8)
---
I’m no stranger to a hard fight, Peter, and I’m grateful for your support as we build this campaign.
With gratitude,
Bob

body:
We're about to miss...

|
---
Friend,

I hate to say this - but we're about to miss one of our upcoming fundraising deadlines.

This was one of the biggest pushes we've had so far this year -- and it is troubling to tell you we're about to miss it. We are SO CLOSE to being able to show the Democrats that we are READY for them in 2024. After the results of the recent elections -- we need this boost more than ever.

I'm letting you know how close we are to reaching our goal. In fact -- we are only $250 away...

We can't step off the gas so close to the finish line. **[If you and nine other patriots contributed $25, we could make up lost ground and finish this deadline with a BANG.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=793051f0380d49e58bb1f00e3c5005e0&_e=B6lCHcnicSxDIFldqqTu1J0xb7dqB8ilXMyHvfIfahDCYM49VmsXjYd31QG1JAp8KsLbBoK0wrLYBJxvzmQQq_UZdeQryaTYaKMz3lrxynstYgOJyz4ToD3c8zTOOIFx76flpZa1liyit3HHW1MlQexdmc3nHssaGNpFRZ4nRkfFzfiMrm9ZgCMwJdTkl7asDg7pCTUIuboZ-ul0k_sQ6Lid12Y9Q-85Vq4jqt_ZC_zJPMOD_irDh8sQoZusDdaVpyYgasmg4Fkuliuj6UfAZYZSHUok0ctfabl3wzy_m-Bppe4ay4NOchuRxumYDURA8HagmhoA5CqGAOeqCmtwd_FvCGAcJTZTbWiL0VW-_OdLz276IgJzlN8TjxwsPlXk)**

** With your support, we can hold our heads high, knowing that when the Democrats come after us, they'll run straight into a solid wall of PATRIOTS ready to stop them from increasing their stranglehold on this nation.

name: Data Team (via DR)
subject: 🔴 LIVE POLL: Electoral College
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
Peter, five presidents in history, including Donald Trump, captured enough Electoral College votes to win the election, but actually lost in the popular vote. In fact, in 2016, Hillary Clinton walked away with nearly 3 million more votes than Trump.
This system should trouble us all! The fate of our nation's leadership should not be left to chance or complicated electoral calculations.
Prominent elected officials, like Representative Jamie Raskin, have voiced their support for dismantling the Electoral College:
https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_231202_1_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917 [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_231202_1_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Please take 30 seconds right now to tell us before midnight: [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_231202_1_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Should we abolish the Electoral College?
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_231202_1_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_231202_1_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
The Electoral College allows minority rule, bypassing basic democratic principles. It favors white and rural areas, reducing the value of more diverse populations and minorities.
Above all, the Electoral College ensures that only a handful of swing states receive any attention during the presidential race.
One person should equal one vote.
To gauge the pulse of our community, we need 294 more responses from PA. Let your voice be heard: Should we abolish the Electoral College? [https://secure.everyaction.com/C3cGhOkjr0GV2tOFz2HXKg2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_231202_1_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Thank you for your participation,
Defeat Republicans
